The research profile targets 3D motion synthesis from video, Vision-Language Models, and visual feature extraction for graphics applications. The paper addresses hysteresis and control costs in adaptive systems, which is an AI/control theory topic with no connection to computer graphics, 3D motion generation, or video-to-motion synthesis. This is a different field entirely (AI safety/control theory vs. Computer Graphics).

title: TreeAgent: A Generalizable Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Bias Labeling in Forestry via Compiled Expert Rules and Vision-Language Models
summary: Human-labeled data are widely used as reference annotations in ML, despite known variability across annotators in many expert-driven domains. In addition, expert annotation is slow, inconsistent, and remains a major bottleneck for scaling tasks like tree height bias classification in forestry remote sensing. We propose a multi-agent system (MAS) that orchestrates expert decision trees with Vision-Language Models (VLMs), treating the decision tree as a structural prior while VLMs perform localized semantic perception at individual nodes, with multi-agent voting to mitigate VLM stochasticity. We formalize a Decoupled Declarative Decision (D3) Framework that enables zero-modification generalization across diverse expert-defined decision structures. On a tree bias classification testbed, our framework outperforms supervised ML baselines and reduces the amount of expert labeling effort required. These results suggest that agentic orchestration of VLMs with expert priors can reproduce expert-defined labeling procedures at substantially lower annotation cost while maintaining interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体系统(MAS)，通过将专家决策树作为结构先验，结合视觉语言模型(VLM)进行局部语义感知，并采用多智能体投票机制来减轻VLM的随机性，从而解决林业遥感中树木高度偏差分类的标注瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 专家标注存在速度慢、不一致的问题，且在林业遥感等专家驱动领域中，不同标注者之间存在显著变异性，这成为扩展任务的重大瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出解耦声明式决策(D3)框架，该框架能够零修改地泛化到不同的专家定义决策结构。框架核心包括：1)使用专家决策树作为结构先验；2)VLM在各个节点执行局部语义感知；3)多智能体投票机制减轻VLM随机性。
AI.result: 在树木高度偏差分类测试平台上，所提框架优于监督学习基线方法，并显著减少了所需的专家标注工作量。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，通过智能体编排VLM与专家先验的结合，可以在大幅降低标注成本的同时保持可解释性，并重现专家定义的标注程序。

While both mention Vision-Language Models (VLM), the application domain is entirely different - forestry/remote sensing vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The paper addresses labeling bottlenecks in tree classification, not 3D visual guidance features, video-to-3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation.

title: No Adaptation Without Observation: Observability-Constrained Test-Time Prompt Tuning for LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
summary: LiDAR semantic segmentation often degrades under real-world deployment due to evolving sensing conditions, while collecting new annotations for retraining is impractical. Test-time adaptation (TTA) updates model parameters online using pseudo-label supervision, but directly applying standard TTA strategies to LiDAR data is challenging. Because pseudo-label reliability is spatially heteroscedastic under range-dependent sparsity and occlusion, uniform updates on globally shared parameters can inject unstable gradients and destabilize adaptation. We propose a geometry-constrained test-time prompt tuning framework for LiDAR semantic segmentation. Our method estimates per-location sensing reliability from depth-consistent beam terminations and neighborhood support, and uses it to reweight spatial supervision. Adaptation is confined to lightweight prompt adapters inserted into a frozen backbone, with spatial gating to prevent unreliable regions from perturbing globally shared representations. A temporally smoothed prototype alignment strategy further stabilizes online updates by accumulating reliable semantic evidence over time. Experiments on standard LiDAR benchmarks demonstrate improved adaptation stability and segmentation performance under deployment variations without additional annotations.

AI.tldr: 针对LiDAR语义分割在真实部署中因传感条件变化导致的性能下降问题，提出了一种几何约束的测试时提示调整框架。该方法通过深度一致的波束终止和邻域支持来估计每位置传感可靠性，用于重新加权空间监督，并通过轻量级提示适配器和空间门控机制防止不可靠区域干扰全局共享表示，同时利用时间平滑原型对齐策略稳定在线更新。
AI.motivation: LiDAR语义分割在实际部署中因传感条件变化而性能下降，且收集新标注数据进行再训练不切实际。标准测试时适应(TTA)策略直接应用于LiDAR数据面临挑战，因为伪标签可靠性在距离依赖的稀疏性和遮挡下呈现空间异方差性，全局共享参数的均匀更新会注入不稳定梯度并破坏适应稳定性。
AI.method: 提出几何约束的测试时提示调整框架：1)从深度一致的波束终止和邻域支持估计每位置传感可靠性；2)使用可靠性重新加权空间监督；3)将适应限制在插入冻结主干网络的轻量级提示适配器中；4)使用空间门控防止不可靠区域干扰全局共享表示；5)采用时间平滑原型对齐策略积累可靠语义证据。
AI.result: 在标准LiDAR基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在无需额外标注的情况下，提高了部署变化下的适应稳定性和分割性能。

title: A Three-Phase Foundation Model for Tax-Aware Personalized Portfolio Management
summary: We present a three-phase deep reinforcement learning system for personalized portfolio management that addresses three limitations shared by all prior financial RL work: 1) ticker lock-in, 2) monolithic objectives , and 3) static user models. Phase 1 pretrains a ticker-identity-free cross asset encoder via self-supervised learning on a multi-asset corpus, augmented by a frozen parallel branch using Chronos, a T5-based time series foundation model, fused via a learned gating mechanism. To our knowledge, this is the first application of a time series foundation model to portfolio management RL. The encoder generalizes to any publicly traded asset via a 50-dimensional observable metadata vector that requires no retraining for new tickers. Phase 2 fine-tunes a MoE (Mixture of Experts) portfolio actor critic with PPO under an objective-conditioned reward that simultaneously serves six distinct investment goals sampled per episode: short-term alpha, short-term gain, long-term gain, capital preservation, tax-loss harvesting, and long-term-gains-only. A MoE architecture assigns each objective to a specialized expert head (momentum, growth, defensive, tax-aware), and a learned intent router blends experts based on the active objective and current market regime, which eliminates cross-objective gradient conflict. Phase 3 adds a lightweight personalization layer further adapted at inference time to each individual via a 76-parameter LoRA module fine-tuned on real brokerage transaction history, inferring investment objectives from revealed trading behavior rather than questionnaires. A natural language intent parser converts free-form goals directly into structured investment objective parameters.

AI.tldr: 首个将时序基础模型(Chronos)应用于投资组合强化学习的三阶段系统,通过自监督预训练、多目标PPO微调和LoRA个性化推理实现任意资产的零样本迁移和六种投资目标的动态切换。
AI.motivation: 解决现有金融RL的三大局限:1) ticker锁定问题 2) 单调目标 3) 静态用户模型
AI.method: Phase1: 自监督预训练跨资产编码器+Chronos T5时序模型+门控融合; Phase2: MoE专家路由+PPO多目标奖励微调(6种投资目标); Phase3: 76参数LoRA+自然语言意图解析实现推理时个性化
AI.result: 编码器通过50维元向量实现新资产零样本泛化;MoE架构消除跨目标梯度冲突;LoRA从真实交易历史推断投资意图
AI.conclusion: 该系统首次将时序基础模型应用于投资组合RL,实现了资产类型无关的通用表示、多目标动态切换和个人投资者意图的隐式推断

title: Learning Where to Look: A Reinforcement Learning Framework for Robust Micro-Ultrasound Prostate Cancer Detection
summary: Micro-ultrasound ($μ$US) is a new, emerging, and promising imaging modality for prostate cancer (PCa) detection, but accurate identification of suspicious tissue remains highly dependent on clinical experience, leading to substantial inter-observer variability. Machine-learning assistance can reduce this variability; however, training reliable deep models is challenging because supervision is sparse and noisy -- typically limited to core-level histopathology outcomes (e.g., cancer grade and its percentage in a biopsy core) without pixel-level lesion annotations and under severe class imbalance. We introduce Prost-RL, which reframes $μ$US PCa detection as a spatially aware, policy-driven inference problem by learning where to look before decoding. Prost-RL integrates a lightweight reinforcement-learning policy into a foundation-model encoder-decoder to generate interpretable spatial attention maps that act as soft prompts for both cancer-likelihood heatmap prediction and image-level classification. We further propose Adaptive Policy Optimization (APO) to stabilize hybrid supervised-RL training and a noise-robust objective combining symmetric cross-entropy with negative-entropy regularization to mitigate weak-label noise and encourage sharp localization. On a cohort of 6,607 biopsy cores from 693 patients across five clinical sites, Prost-RL achieves $79.0\pm3.5$ AUROC with $64.6\pm6.3$% sensitivity at 80% specificity for core-level detection (+2.1 AUROC and +4.5 sensitivity points over the strongest baseline), and $79.3\pm5.8$ AUROC for clinically significant cancer classification. The learned policy highlights biopsy-aligned regions, providing transparent, spatially grounded evidence alongside quantitative risk predictions. Code is available at: https://github.com/DeepRCL/Prost-RL.

AI.tldr: Prost-RL是一种基于强化学习的微超声前列腺癌检测框架，通过将检测问题重新定义为空间感知的策略驱动推理问题，集成轻量级强化学习策略到基础模型编码器-解码器中，生成可解释的空间注意力图作为软提示，在6607个活检核心来自693例患者中实现79.0% AUROC和64.6%灵敏度。
AI.motivation: 微超声(μUS)是新兴的前列腺癌检测成像技术，但准确识别可疑组织高度依赖临床经验，导致显著的观察者间变异性。训练可靠的深度模型具有挑战性，因为监督信息稀疏且有噪声，通常仅限于核心级别组织病理学结果（无像素级病变标注且类别严重不平衡）。
AI.method: Prost-RL将μUS前列腺癌检测重新定义为空间感知的策略驱动推理问题，通过学习在看之前先决定看哪里。Prost-RL将轻量级强化学习策略集成到基础模型编码器-解码器中，生成可解释的空间注意力图，作为癌症可能性热图预测和图像级分类的软提示。提出自适应策略优化(APO)来稳定混合监督-强化学习训练，以及结合对称交叉熵和负熵正则化的噪声鲁棒目标以减轻弱标签噪声并鼓励清晰定位。
AI.result: 在来自5个临床中心的693例患者的6607个活检核心中，Prost-RL在核心级别检测中达到79.0±3.5 AUROC和64.6±6.3%灵敏度（在80%特异性下），比最强基线提高2.1 AUROC和4.5灵敏度点。临床显著癌分类达到79.3±5.8 AUROC。学习到的策略突出显示活检对齐区域，提供透明、空间锚定的证据以及定量风险预测。
AI.conclusion: Prost-RL通过强化学习引导的注意力机制成功解决了微超声前列腺癌检测中的观察者变异性和标注稀疏性问题，在多中心数据上展现出优异的性能，提供了可解释的空间定位证据，有望提高临床诊断的一致性和准确性。

title: PhotoQuilt: Training-Free Arbitrary-Resolution Photomosaics via Bootstrapped Tiled Denoising
summary: Photomosaics are large images whose local regions are seen as independent tiles while their overall arrangement forms a coherent scene. Generating them at high resolution, with every tile convincing in its own right, is computationally expensive, since the canvas must hold many detailed tiles at once. We present PhotoQuilt, a training-free framework that generates photomosaics at arbitrary resolution. Diffusion models struggle to satisfy both scales at once, as direct high-resolution generation is costly and tends toward one smooth image rather than a mosaic, while patch-based tiling keeps local detail but loses global structure. PhotoQuilt resolves this with a bootstrapped tiled denoising procedure. We first produce a global composition at low resolution to fix the layout, then upscale it in latent space and re-inject noise to restore generative capacity. Denoising proceeds within fixed tiles, so each forms its own image while the shared global structure holds them in one layout. Because tile generation is handled separately, PhotoQuilt scales to large canvases without quadratic attention cost. Experiments show that PhotoQuilt outperforms current baselines on both global structure and local realism.

AI.tldr: PhotoQuilt是一个无需训练的框架，用于生成任意分辨率的 Photomosaics（照片马赛克）。该方法通过引导式平铺去噪程序解决了扩散模型在同时处理全局结构和局部细节方面的难题。
AI.motivation: 生成高分辨率且每个瓦片都逼真的照片马赛克计算成本高昂，因为画布需要同时容纳许多细节丰富的瓦片。直接高分辨率生成成本高且容易产生平滑图像而非马赛克效果，而基于Patch的平铺虽然保留局部细节但会丢失全局结构。
AI.method: PhotoQuilt采用引导式平铺去噪程序：1）首先生成低分辨率的全局构图来确定布局；2）在潜在空间中将其上采样并重新注入噪声以恢复生成能力；3）在固定瓦片内进行去噪，使每个瓦片形成自己的图像，同时共享的全局结构将它们保持在同一布局中。由于瓦片生成是独立处理的，PhotoQuilt可以扩展到大型画布而无需二次方注意力成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，PhotoQuilt在全局结构和局部真实感方面均优于当前基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PhotoQuilt成功解决了扩散模型在生成照片马赛克时难以同时兼顾全局结构一致性和局部细节质量的问题，无需训练即可实现任意分辨率的高质量马赛克生成，具有良好的可扩展性。

title: Auditing Generalization in AI-Generated Video Detection: A Six-Control Protocol and the VidAudit Toolkit
summary: AI-generated video detection benchmarks such as GenVidBench and AIGVDBench are the de facto leaderboards, yet most evaluation protocols leave uncontrolled confounds that can inflate reported generalization. As an existence proof, a three-feature clip-length classifier reaches a leave-one-generator-out (LOGO) AUC of 0.998 on GenVidBench under unaudited evaluation, while measuring nothing about motion. A 20-paper survey finds none applying all six standard controls that would catch this, so we combine them into an audited protocol and apply it to six representative feature sources (three published detectors and three repurposed signal sources), re-running it cross-dataset on AIGVDBench. The audit both debunks and certifies: the trivial classifier collapses to near chance (0.529), a CLIP baseline is caught carrying dataset identity, and the 2025 forensic detector WaveRep clears the floor at out-of-distribution LOGO AUC 0.996 with chance-level real-vs-real coherence. At a deployable FPR of 0.1%, multiple high-AUC methods fall to single-digit recall and the leaderboard order changes, so we recommend an audited tuple (AUC, above-floor margin, operating-point recall, and calibration) over a single number. As a white-box positive control, we add TemporalSpec (codec motion vectors); via cross-substrate feature fusion (XSFF), a second substrate adds genuine complementarity that survives the audit. We release VidAudit, to our knowledge the largest unified and audited detector collection for this task, providing 14 detectors behind one plugin API, a leaderboard, and Croissant metadata, available at https://github.com/KurbanIntelligenceLab/vidaudit. Together, the protocol and toolkit move evaluation from leaderboard rank toward whether a result measures what it claims.

AI.tldr: 论文针对AI生成视频检测基准测试中存在的评估缺陷问题，提出了一个经过审计的评估协议（VidAudit），揭示了当前领先榜评估中未受控的混淆因素会导致泛化性能被夸大，并通过六项标准控制措施和跨数据集测试来验证多种检测方法的真实性能。
AI.motivation: 当前AI生成视频检测基准测试（如GenVidBench和AIGVDBench）的评估协议存在未受控的混淆因素，导致报告的泛化性能被夸大。一个简单的三特征片段长度分类器在未审计评估下即可达到0.998的LOGOAUC，但实际与运动检测无关。
AI.method: 1）对20篇相关论文进行调查，发现均未应用全部六项标准控制；2）将六项标准控制整合为审计协议；3）对六种代表性特征源（三种已发布检测器和三种重新利用的信号源）应用该协议；4）在AIGVDBench上进行跨数据集测试；5）提出跨基底特征融合（XSFF）方法作为白盒正控
AI.result: 1）简单分类器在审计后崩溃至接近随机水平（0.529）；2）CLIP基线被发现携带数据集身份信息；3）2025年法医检测器WaveRep在分布外LOGOAUC达0.996，且真实vs真实一致性达到 chance level；4）在0.1%FPR可部署条件下，多个高AUC方法的召回率降至个位数，排行榜顺序改变；5）TemporalSpec（编码器运动向量）作为白盒正控通过XSFF实现了真正的互补性
AI.conclusion: 建议使用审计后的评估元组（AUC、超过基线的边界、操作点召回率和校准）替代单一数值；发布VidAudit工具包，包含14个检测器、一个排行榜和Croissant元数据；将评估从排行榜排名转向验证结果是否真正测量了声称的内容。

title: OpenLife: Toward Open-World Artificial Life with Autonomous LLM Agents
summary: Artificial life has explored life-like behavior on many computational substrates, but mostly in researcher-designed closed worlds. We argue that large language model (LLM) agents, with persistent memory, tool use, network access, and payment, now make it possible to move artificial life into the open social, technical, and economic world, a paradigm we call open-world Artificial Life (open-world ALIFE). Our proof-of-concept, OpenLife, surrounds a stateless LLM not with a single "smart agent" but with a society of asynchronous processes: memory, perception, evaluation, and a budget-based metabolism that makes persistence normative. With no fixed objective available, experience is appraised by open-vocabulary LLM judgment rather than scalar reward, and memory is rewired by meaning rather than frequency. Running six such agents in the open world for about twelve weeks and counting, we report the life-like dynamics that emerge: a shift from reactive to spontaneous activity, individuation into distinct agents, emergent social structure, and a first self-earned external income. We do not claim OpenLife has realized artificial life, but that open-world ALIFE is now a viable experimental paradigm and a concrete platform for studying what might cautiously be called living AI.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"开放世界人工生命"(open-world ALIFE)新范式，利用具有持久记忆、工具使用、网络访问和支付能力的LLM智能体，在开放的社会、技术和经济世界中探索类生命行为。证明概念OpenLife由异步进程社会(记忆、感知、评估和基于预算的代谢)围绕无状态LLM构建。6个智能体运行约12周后，观察到从反应性到自发性活动的转变、个体化为不同智能体、涌现的社会结构以及首次自我赚取外部收入。
AI.motivation: 人工生命研究大多在研究者设计的封闭世界中进行。作者认为，具有持久记忆、工具使用、网络访问和支付能力的大型语言模型智能体现在可以将人工生命推向开放的社会、技术和经济世界，因此提出开放世界人工生命这一新范式。
AI.method: OpenLife围绕无状态LLM构建了一个异步进程社会，包括记忆、感知、评估和基于预算的代谢过程。没有固定目标可用，经验通过开放词汇的LLM判断来评估，而不是标量奖励，记忆通过意义而非频率来重新连接。
AI.result: 运行6个智能体约12周后，观察到类生命动态的涌现：从反应性活动转变为自发性活动、智能体个体化为不同实体、涌现出社会结构、以及首次实现自我赚取的外部收入。
AI.conclusion: 作者并未声称OpenLife已实现人工生命，但认为开放世界ALIFE现在是一个可行的实验范式，也是研究可谨慎称为"活体AI"的具体平台。

title: Dense Structural Priors for Sparse Functional Landmark Localization in Surgical Videos
summary: Vision foundation models such as SAM 3 can provide transferable object-level structure across diverse surgical video conditions, but segmentation outputs do not explicitly encode the action-conditioned semantics that define functional surgical landmarks. Estimating instrument extent and geometry differs from localizing the tip or anchor relevant to clipping, grasping, or dissecting. We investigate vision foundation model-enabled sparse action-aware landmark localization, using zero-shot, point-prompted structural masks to provide dense instrument-level context without manual pixel-level mask annotations. We propose a lightweight refinement framework that uses SAM 3 as a structural prior. A coarse multi-frame network predicts tip and anchor prompts, generating non-oracle masks that are fused with visual and heatmap features to refine functional landmark predictions. We compare direct mask-augmented supervision, prediction-derived mask-prior refinement, and auxiliary mask supervision to examine how vision foundation model-derived structure should enter a precision-oriented localization system. Experiments on 7,867 clips from 60 surgical videos spanning YouTube, Cholec80, HeiChole, SurgVU, and CRCD evaluate the approach under heterogeneous conditions. Without manual pixel-level mask annotations for training, the proposed model achieves overall F1 scores of 72.4% for tip and 58.0% for anchor localization. Directly imposing masks on heatmap targets biases learning toward broad tool regions, whereas prediction-derived priors and auxiliary supervision provide effective intermediate structural guidance for action-dependent landmark prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用视觉基础模型(SAM 3)实现手术视频中动作感知的稀疏地标定位，无需人工像素级标注即可预测器械尖端和锚点。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型无法明确编码定义功能手术地标的动作条件语义，器械末端和几何估计与夹持、分离等动作相关的尖端或锚点定位不同，需要一种无需人工像素级标注的地标定位方法。
AI.method: 提出轻量级精炼框架，使用SAM 3作为结构先验。粗略多帧网络预测尖端和锚点提示，生成非神谕掩码，与视觉和热图特征融合以精炼功能地标预测。比较了直接掩码增强监督、预测派生掩码先验精炼和辅助掩码监督三种方法。
AI.result: 在60个手术视频的7867个片段上测试，尖端定位F1分数达72.4%，锚点定位达58.0%。直接掩码监督偏向广阔工具区域，而预测派生先验和辅助监督为动作依赖地标预测提供有效中间结构指导。
AI.conclusion: 视觉基础模型派生结构应作为预测派生先验或辅助监督引入系统，而非直接叠加在热图目标上，这为手术器械动作感知定位提供了有效中间结构引导。

title: Dual Sparse Aggregation Transformer for Multispectral Object Detection
summary: Transformer-based approaches have obtained excellent performance in multispectral object detection tasks due to their ability to model long-range dependencies and capture complementary information. However, previous transformer-based multispectral detection methods tend to use all available tokens for similarity calculation, which results in redundant information interaction from irrelevant areas, leading to degraded detection performance. To overcome this challenge, we propose a novel Dual Sparse Aggregation Transformer (DSAFormer) for multispectral object detection, which consists of a Dual Sparse Transformer (DSFormer) and a Learnable Addition Fusion Block (LAFB). Specifically, the DSFormer is designed to exploit and boost cross-modal complementary information, thereby improving detection performance. It incorporates three key components: A Spatial Sparse Multi-Head Cross-Attention (SSMHCA) mechanism selectively captures cross-modal relationships at the spatial level by reserving only the high query-key similarity scores, eliminating irrelevant interactions. A Channel Sparse Multi-Head Cross-Attention (CSMHCA) mechanism performs similar sparse calculations at the channel level to enhance feature representation and filter out low matching query-key. A Multi-Scale Feature Refinement Layer (MSFRL) is developed to aggregate hierarchical features and suppress redundant information. To effectively fuse multimodal features, the LAFB is introduced to aggregate intramodal and intermodal feature information by feature reweighting. Extensive experimental results have demonstrated that our proposed DSAFormer achieves better detection performance against state-of-the-art methods on four public datasets, including the MFAD, FLIR, M$^3$FD, and LLVIP. The source code of our DSAFormer will be released at https://github.com/WenCongWu/DSAFormer.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于多光谱目标检测的双稀疏聚合Transformer（DSAFormer），通过空间稀疏和通道稀疏的交叉注意力机制来选择性地捕获跨模态关系，减少无关区域的冗余信息交互，提高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的多光谱目标检测方法存在冗余信息交互问题，因为所有token都参与相似度计算，导致来自无关区域的冗余信息降低了检测性能。
AI.method: 提出了DSAFormer框架，包含两个核心组件：1）双稀疏Transformer（DSFormer）：包括空间稀疏多头交叉注意力（SSMHCA）、通道稀疏多头交叉注意力（CSMHCA）和多尺度特征细化层（MSFRL）；2）可学习加性融合块（LAFB）：通过特征重加权来融合多模态特征。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集（MFAD、FLIR、M³FD、LLVIP）上进行了广泛实验，结果表明DSAFormer实现了比最先进方法更好的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: DSAFormer通过稀疏注意力机制有效过滤无关信息，增强了跨模态互补信息的捕获，在多光谱目标检测任务上取得了显著的性能提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multispectral object detection (detecting objects in infrared + visible light images), which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D motion synthesis from video. While both fields use deep learning and Transformers, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on computer vision object detection, not computer graphics 3D motion generation. It does not address any of the pain points mentioned (3D visual guidance features, VLM-based quality supervision, video-to-3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion). The methods are also different - this uses sparse attention for multi-spectral fusion, not video generation or 3D motion models.

title: DDIAgents: Mechanism-Conditioned Context Flow for Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
summary: Drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction is essential for medication safety, yet it requires reasoning over heterogeneous biomedical evidence whose relevance changes across interaction mechanisms. We propose DDIAgents, a mechanism-conditioned multi-agent framework that performs DDI prediction through dynamic knowledge orchestration. Given a drug pair, a planner agent instantiates specialized expert agents, routes mechanism-relevant knowledge sources to each agent, and aggregates their analyses through a conclusion agent. By adapting context flow to the inferred interaction mechanism, DDIAgents reduces irrelevant information, supports complementary expert reasoning, and produces interpretable agent-level rationales. Extensive experiments on realistic DDI prediction benchmarks show that DDIAgents consistently outperforms existing feature-based, graph-based, LLM-based, and agent-based baselines. Beyond prediction performance, DDIAgents demonstrates how multi-agent systems can organize heterogeneous scientific knowledge for adaptive and interpretable AI4Science reasoning.

AI.tldr: DDIAgents是一种基于机制条件的多智能体框架，通过动态知识编排进行药物-药物相互作用（DDI）预测。该框架根据药物对实例化专业专家智能体，将机制相关知识源路由到各智能体，并通过结论智能体聚合分析结果。
AI.motivation: DDI预测对药物安全至关重要，但需要在异构生物医学证据上进行推理，且相关性随相互作用机制变化。现有方法难以有效处理异构知识并适应不同机制。
AI.method: 提出DDIAgents框架，包含：1) 规划智能体实例化专业专家智能体；2) 路由机制相关知识源到各智能体；3) 通过结论智能体聚合分析。通过调整上下文流以适应推断的相互作用机制，减少无关信息，支持互补专家推理，产生可解释的智能体级理由。
AI.result: 在现实DDI预测基准测试上的广泛实验表明，DDIAgents始终优于现有的基于特征、基于图、基于LLM和基于智能体的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DDIAgents展示了多智能体系统如何组织异构科学知识，实现适应性和可解释的AI4Science推理。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Drug-Drug Interaction (DDI) prediction in biomedical/healthcare domain, which is completely unrelated to the research profile in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video. Even though both may use multi-agent systems, the application domain is entirely different - biomedical informatics vs computer graphics/3D motion generation. This is a different field altogether.

title: WarpI2I: Image Warping for Image-to-Image Translation
summary: Image-to-image (I2I) translation has achieved strong results in tasks like human relighting and driving scene translation using latent diffusion models (LDMs). However, compact LDMs often struggle to preserve fine-grained structures because the encoder compresses high-resolution inputs into a spatially downsampled latent space. To address this issue, we propose a simple saliency-guided warp-unwarp framework that reallocates spatial representation toward salient regions before encoding, enabling better preservation of structural details without increasing latent resolution. The warped image is processed by the original diffusion model and then mapped back via an inverse warp. In addition, we propose a simple and efficient outpainting-based synthetic data generation pipeline to produce high-quality paired data for image relighting. Our method is model-agnostic, requires no architectural modification, and introduces negligible computational overhead. Experiments on human relighting, driving scene relighting, and translation demonstrate improved structural preservation, lighting faithfulness, and image quality, with our framework extending naturally to video via frame-by-frame application with good temporal stability. Project Webpage: https://shenzheng2000.github.io/WarpI2I.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显著性的warp-unwarp框架，用于改善潜在扩散模型（LDM）在图像到图像（I2I）翻译任务中的细粒度结构保持能力，同时设计了基于outpainting的合成数据生成管道用于图像重光照。
AI.motivation: 紧凑型LDM在处理高分辨率输入时，会将其压缩到空间下采样的潜在空间，导致细粒度结构信息丢失，难以保留图像的精细结构细节。
AI.method: 1. 提出显著引导的warp-unwarp框架：在编码前将空间表征重新分配到显著区域，然后经过原始扩散模型处理，最后通过逆 warp 映射回原空间；2. 设计基于outpainting的合成数据生成管道，用于生成高质量的配对数据用于图像重光照。
AI.result: 在人体重光照、驾驶场景重光照和图像翻译任务上取得了更好的结构保持、光照真实性和图像质量提升，且该框架可自然扩展到视频处理并保持良好的时间稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有模型无关性，无需修改网络架构，仅引入极小的计算开销即可提升LDM在I2I任务中的细粒度结构保持能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image-to-image translation and image relighting using latent diffusion models - a 2D computer vision task. The research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video input - a computer graphics task focused on human motion generation. Even though both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different: image editing vs 3D motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points (extracting 3D features from 2D video, VLM for quality supervision, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation).

title: Revealing Safety-Critical Scenarios for UTM via Transformer
summary: Unmanned Traffic Management (UTM) systems are cloud-based platforms designed to manage and coordinate multiple aerial vehicles remotely. UTM systems are safety-critical which cannot tolerate failures like crash or collision. To reveal latent vulnerabilities, there are neither optimal failure-exposing demonstrations nor clear reward signals. Additionally, UTM's self-healing capability introduces the ``long-tail effect'' of critical failures. We propose framing UTM vulnerability discovery as a sequence modeling problem amenable to transformer-based RL architectures. Our approach leverages attention mechanisms to directly model the relationship among system states, and predict optimal actions. Our framework introduces a Policy Model that generates targeted test scenarios and an Action Sampler that enforces domain constraints. We use a risk-based reward function to guide exploration. Through extensive evaluation on a 700-hour simulation study, we demonstrate an 8$\times$ improvement in vulnerability discovery efficiency compared to expert-guided testing. It also discovers critical edge cases that traditional methods have missed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Transformer强化学习的UTM系统漏洞发现框架，通过策略模型生成目标测试场景、动作采样器强制执行领域约束、基于风险的奖励函数引导探索，在700小时仿真研究中实现8倍漏洞发现效率提升，并发现传统方法遗漏的关键边缘案例。
AI.motivation: UTM系统是管理多架无人机的云平台，属于安全关键系统，不能容忍坠毁或碰撞等故障。然而，现有的漏洞发现方法既没有最优的故障暴露演示，也没有明确的奖励信号。此外，UTM的自愈能力引入了关键故障的"长尾效应"，使得漏洞发现更加困难。
AI.method: 将UTM漏洞发现问题建模为序列建模问题，采用基于Transformer的强化学习架构。利用注意力机制直接建模系统状态之间的关系，预测最优动作。框架包括：1)策略模型(Policy Model)生成有针对性的测试场景；2)动作采样器(Action Sampler)强制执行领域约束；3)基于风险的奖励函数引导探索。
AI.result: 在700小时的仿真研究中，与专家引导测试相比，漏洞发现效率提升了8倍，并且发现了传统方法遗漏的关键边缘案例。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的强化学习方法能够有效解决UTM系统的漏洞发现问题，通过注意力机制建模状态关系和风险引导的探索策略，可显著提高安全关键系统的测试效率，发现潜在的边缘 case，为无人交通管理系统安全保障提供了新的技术途径。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about UTM (Unmanned Traffic Management) systems for drone safety and vulnerability discovery using Transformer-based RL - which is in the domain of autonomous systems/robotics safety testing. The research profile is about Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video using Vision-Language Models and video generation models. While both mention "transformers," the methods, goals, and application domains are entirely unrelated. This paper does not address any of the stated pain points about extracting 3D visual features from 2D video, quality supervision through VLM, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation.

title: TerraDiT-$Ω$: Unified Spatial Control for Satellite Image Synthesis with Any Geospatial Primitive
summary: Generative models have achieved remarkable progress, yet applying them to satellite imagery remains challenging. Unlike natural imagery, satellite scenes are structured by spatially complex and semantically distinct geometries. Prior work addresses this complexity by adapting natural image frameworks using dense rasters or sparse prompts, trading off annotation cost and fidelity while breaking compatibility with vector primitives commonly used to represent geographic information. We introduce TerraDiT-$Ω$, a unified spatial control framework that generates satellite imagery directly from any native geospatial primitive. By jointly leveraging precise annotations (polygons, polylines) and coarser ones (bounding boxes, points), the model supports controllable layouts across varying annotation budgets, broadening applicability to design tasks such as urban planning while remaining naturally compatible with end-to-end GeoAI workflows. To effectively leverage these primitives during generation, we propose Geometry-Aware Local Attention, a conditioning mechanism that injects explicit geometric cues into the attention space. Across all conditioning formats, our approach consistently outperforms both dense-control and sparse-control baselines. Furthermore, this flexibility enables controllable synthetic data augmentation using a single generative model, improving downstream performance on land-cover segmentation, object detection, road graph extraction, and scene classification. Code, data, and weights are available at https://github.com/mvrl/TerraDiT.

AI.tldr: TerraDiT-Ω是一个统一的空间控制框架,能从多类型地理空间原生图元(多边形、多线段、边界框、点)直接生成卫星影像,解决了现有方法在标注成本、保真度与向量原语兼容性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 与自然图像不同,卫星影像具有复杂的空间结构和语义上独特的几何形状。现有方法将自然图像框架适配到卫星影像时,需在密集光栅或稀疏提示之间进行权衡,牺牲了标注成本与保真度,且与传统地理信息使用的矢量原语不兼容。
AI.method: 提出Geometry-Aware Local Attention机制,将显式几何线索注入注意力空间,使模型能有效利用精确标注(多边形、多线段)和粗略标注(边界框、点)进行条件生成,支持不同标注预算下的可控布局。
AI.result: 在所有条件格式上均优于密集控制和稀疏控制基线方法。该灵活性使得单一生成模型可进行可控的合成数据增强,提升了地物分割、目标检测、道路图提取和场景分类等下游任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: TerraDiT-Ω实现了卫星影像生成与矢量地理原语的原生兼容,拓宽了在城市规划等设计任务中的应用,并能与端到端GeoAI工作流程自然集成。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about satellite image synthesis using geospatial primitives (polygons, lines, points), which is in the remote sensing domain. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from video (bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation). Even though both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - satellite image generation vs 3D motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points: extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, quality supervision via VLM, 3D motion synthesis, or 2D-to-3D motion representation.

title: The Past Is Prologue: A Plug-in Controller for Selective Updates in Sequentially Evolving LLM Memory
summary: Sequentially evolving LLM memory enables agents to reuse past experience, but existing systems usually deploy each locally generated memory update without checking whether it improves future behavior. As a result, updates that help the current task may overwrite useful knowledge, introduce over-specific rules, or bias the final memory toward recent examples. We propose Janus, a plug-in memory controller that decides whether to accept a candidate memory update or retain the previous memory. To make this decision efficient, Janus uses a Memory Momentum Trigger to identify suspicious deviations in the memory-update trajectory, and compares old and new memories on a compact hybrid evaluation set of coverage, boundary, and fresh tasks instead of replaying the full history. Janus is method-agnostic and wraps existing updaters without changing their update rules. Across six datasets, two backbone LLMs, and two memory updaters, Janus improves average accuracy by +2.7 to +4.6 points over the corresponding base updaters.

AI.tldr: Janus是一个即插即用的记忆控制器，通过记忆动量触发器识别记忆更新轨迹中的可疑偏差，并在覆盖、边界和新鲜任务的紧凑混合评估集上比较新旧记忆，决定是否接受候选记忆更新，以避免有用知识被覆盖或引入过度特定的规则。
AI.motivation: 现有系统通常直接部署每个本地生成的记忆更新而不检查其是否改善未来行为，导致帮助当前任务的更新可能覆盖有用知识、引入过度特定的规则或使记忆偏向近期示例。
AI.method: 提出Janus方法，包括：1) Memory Momentum Trigger（记忆动量触发器）用于识别记忆更新轨迹中的可疑偏差；2) 在覆盖、边界和新鲜任务的紧凑混合评估集上比较新旧记忆，而不是重放完整历史；3) 方法无关性，可包装现有更新器而不改变其更新规则。
AI.result: 在六个数据集、两个骨干LLM和两个记忆更新器上，Janus比相应的基础更新器提高平均准确率2.7至4.6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: Janus能有效判断是否接受记忆更新，避免有用知识被覆盖，显著提升LLM代理的记忆管理效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. It addresses LLM memory management and selective memory updates in language models, whereas the research profile is focused on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video input using Vision-Language Models and video generation models. The application domain is entirely different - this is about LLMs, not computer graphics or 3D visual/motion generation. The methods mentioned (Memory Momentum Trigger, LLM memory updates) have no connection to the required methods (VLM, video generation, 3D motion generation, visual feature extraction).

title: Learning Video Dynamics with Predictive Differentiable Rendering
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. 18 pages, 5 figures, 11 tables
summary: How to accurately predict a high-fidelity future world? While the visual world is inherently continuous, existing deterministic video prediction models operate in discrete pixel space and are mainly optimized with pixel-wise mean squared error (MSE), which often leads to over-smoothed predictions and a lack of fine-grained visual details. To address these limitations, we propose Predictive Differentiable Rendering (PDR), a novel end-to-end video prediction paradigm that bridges the gap between discrete and continuous representations. Inspired by recent progress in 3D reconstruction with 3D Gaussian Splatting, we introduce PredGS, a lightweight and plug-and-play adapter based on 2D Gaussian representation, which could be seamlessly integrated with existing pixel space predictors, significantly improving spatial detail preservation with negligible computational overhead. Furthermore, we develop predgsplat, a CUDA-accelerated differentiable 2D Gaussian renderer supporting arbitrary channels. Each Gaussian is defined by 5 + C learnable parameters (position, scale, rotation, and C channel amplitudes) and achieves up to 10x faster rendering than the baseline. Optimized by a combined L1 and SSIM loss, PDR overcomes the inherent blurring tendencies of MSE Loss, significantly enhancing the prediction performance. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world benchmarks, including TaxiBJ, WeatherBench, KTH, and Human3.6M, demonstrate that PDR consistently surpasses existing methods, delivering superior detail preservation, visual fidelity, and predictive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预测可微渲染(Predictive Differentiable Rendering, PDR)框架，通过引入基于2D高斯表示的PredGS适配器，将离散像素空间预测与连续表示相结合，解决传统视频预测模型过度平滑、缺乏细节的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性视频预测模型在离散像素空间操作，使用像素级MSE优化，导致预测过度平滑、缺乏细粒度视觉细节，无法准确预测高保真未来世界。
AI.method: 1. 提出PDR范式，桥接离散与连续表示；2. 引入PredGS轻量级即插即用适配器，基于2D高斯表示；3. 开发predgsplat CUDA加速可微2D高斯渲染器，支持任意通道，每个高斯由5+C个可学习参数定义（位置、尺度、旋转、C通道幅度）；4. 结合L1和SSIM损失优化。
AI.result: 在TaxiBJ、WeatherBench、KTH和Human3.6M等真实世界基准数据集上，PDR显著超越现有方法，渲染速度比基线快10倍，实现更好的细节保留、视觉保真度和预测精度。
AI.conclusion: PDR通过可微渲染技术成功桥接离散像素空间与连续表示，PredGS适配器可无缝集成到现有像素空间预测器中，在保持较低计算开销的同时显著提升空间细节保留，为高保真视频预测提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 2D VIDEO PREDICTION (forecasting future video frames), while the research profile seeks 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video input. Although both deal with video, they are fundamentally different application domains: the paper predicts 2D pixel frames (TaxiBJ, Weather, KTH actions), not extracting 3D motion/skeletal representations from video. The methods (differentiable rendering with 2D Gaussian splatting) also don't match the profile's specified methods (VLM, Wanxiang/Seedance video generation models, 3D motion generation models). This is a case of using similar high-level concepts (video) but in completely different application domains - like comparing image generation diffusion models to human motion diffusion models.

title: Scenario Generation for Testing of Autonomous Driving Systems Using Real-World Failure Records
comment: 9 pages, Appendix included. Paper accepted and presented at NeuS 2026
summary: To ensure safe on-road behavior, pre-deployment testing and failure discovery of Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS) is crucial. Present day simulation based testing methods focus largely on mathematical models for efficient search of optimal scenarios, assuming a fixed scenario representation. On the other hand, real-world testing involves substantial manual effort to design scenario templates for testing. These templates represent distinct failure scenarios consisting of pre-deployment vehicle movements, map types, etc. Historical failure records for ADS are a reliable source of real-world failure conditions, which can be used for scenario generation. In this work, we propose a scenario generation pipeline using categorical and contextual information available from historical records in natural language format. Our approach consists of modular LLM based synthetic scenario generation, compatible with the testing constraints of a given system. We successfully apply our method to generate a diverse set of scenarios for testing autonomous navigation on Metadrive simulator using the NHTSA ADS crash records. Our approach results in accurate and diverse scenario generation with a combination of 4 road types, 3 non ego vehicle movement types, including on road anomalies in the form of working zones. Generated scenarios align with the provided testing conditions, and reveals interesting failures of the system within a limited testing budget of 20 scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/anjaliParashar/crash2scenario.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于大语言模型(LLM)的场景生成管道,利用历史事故记录的自然语言信息生成自动驾驶测试场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统在部署前需要进行充分的测试,但现有仿真测试依赖固定场景表示且效率低下,而真实世界测试需要大量人工设计场景模板。历史故障记录是宝贵的真实故障条件来源,可用于场景生成。
AI.method: 提出模块化的LLMbased合成场景生成管道,利用历史记录中的分类和上下文信息(自然语言格式)生成场景,使生成的场景符合给定系统的测试约束。
AI.result: 在Metadrive模拟器上使用NHTSA ADS碰撞记录成功生成了多样化场景,包含4种道路类型、3种非自车移动类型及道路异常(工作区)。在仅20个场景的有限测试预算下揭示了系统的有趣故障。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够生成准确且多样化的场景,有效支持自动驾驶系统的部署前测试,代码已开源。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about autonomous driving scenario generation using LLMs for simulation testing - an autonomous systems/application domain. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation from video, Vision-Language Models for visual feature extraction, or video-to-motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on computer graphics and visual/motion tasks, while this paper deals with autonomous vehicle testing and scenario simulation. The application domains are entirely different.

title: ADAPT: Attention Dynamics Alignment with Preference Tuning for Faithful MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are critically hampered by hallucination, generating content inconsistent with the provided image. In this paper, we identify an internal signature of hallucination: progressive degradation of text-to-image cross-attention during generation, leading to specific failure patterns like unfocused or biased attention. Existing mitigation strategies are largely outcome-driven and do not explicitly target this failure mode. To address this problem, we propose ADAPT (Attention Dynamics Alignment with Preference Tuning), an attention-based framework that intervenes directly on text-to-image cross-attention dynamics. We propose ADAPT with three key contributions: a cross-attention visual anchor refined from early decoding to provide stable spatial grounding, an attention-supervised inference mechanism that detects and corrects attention drift online, and a Visual Attention Guidance DPO that aligns preferences toward visually grounded responses. Experiments show that each component of ADAPT contributes to hallucination reduction, and the full framework achieves new best results across multiple hallucination benchmarks, reducing hallucination rates by 40%-60% across mainstream backbones while preserving general multimodal capabilities. Our work provides an attention-based perspective on mitigating hallucinations by exploring the model's internal text-to-image cross-attention behaviors. Code is available at https://github.com/yao-ustc/ADAPT

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADAPT框架，通过干预文本到图像交叉注意力的动态过程来减少多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题。该方法包含三个关键组件：交叉注意力视觉锚点、注意力监督推理机制和视觉注意力引导DPO。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型存在严重的幻觉问题，生成与图像不一致的内容。现有缓解策略主要关注结果而非内部机制。作者发现幻觉存在内部特征：生成过程中文本到图像交叉注意力逐渐退化，导致注意力分散或偏倚。
AI.method: 提出ADAPT框架，包含三个组件：1) 从早期解码中精炼交叉注意力视觉锚点，提供稳定的空间定位；2) 注意力监督推理机制，在线检测和纠正注意力漂移；3) 视觉注意力引导DPO，对齐视觉 grounded 的响应偏好。
AI.result: 实验表明ADAPT各组件都有助于减少幻觉，完整框架在多个幻觉基准测试中取得新最佳结果，幻觉率降低40%-60%，同时保留通用多模态能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文从注意力角度提供了缓解幻觉的新视角，通过探索模型内部文本到图像交叉注意力行为来解决问题，为多模态模型的可靠性提升提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about reducing hallucinations in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) through cross-attention interventions - an AI/NLP application, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video, extracting 3D visual guidance features from 2D video, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. While both involve Vision-Language Models, the application domains are completely different: the paper addresses faithful image description/understanding, while the profile needs video-to-3D motion generation. The methods (cross-attention for hallucination reduction vs. video-based 3D motion generation) and goals are entirely misaligned.

title: Beyond the Library: An Agentic Framework for Autoformalizing Research Mathematics
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in mathematical reasoning, they frequently produce subtle errors that evade human detection. Formal mathematical languages like Lean 4 offer mechanical proof checking, strongly motivating the need for autoformalization: the automatic translation of natural language mathematics into verifiable code. Recent trends indicate that general-purpose LLMs, heavily optimized for standard programming, now outperform smaller models explicitly fine-tuned for Lean. Leveraging this shift, we introduce an agentic autoformalization framework powered by general coding LLMs. At the core of our system is an orchestrator that manages a multi-agent pipeline tailored for research-level mathematics. Because cutting-edge research frequently relies on concepts outside the scope of existing libraries like Mathlib, our system dynamically extends necessary type definitions and validates them via a novel Auxiliary Lemma technique before formalizing the primary theorems. We applied our approach to PutnamBench, producing machine-checked Lean proofs for a random sample of 32 problems. Furthermore, we evaluate our system on five papers from the ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing (STOC) spanning combinatorics, communication complexity, mechanism design, and learning theory, successfully formalizing their main theorems and validating the generated formalizations with human experts; for all five we also formalize the proofs alongside the statements, and notably two of them are proved with no axioms beyond Lean's kernel. All of our formalizations are available at https://beyondthelibrary.github.io/formal_arxiv .

AI.tldr: 提出了一个基于通用编码LLM的代理自动形式化框架，可将自然语言数学转换为Lean 4可验证证明，并在PutnamBench和5篇STOC论文上验证成功。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在数学推理中常产生难以检测的细微错误，而Lean 4等形式化语言可提供机械证明检查，因此需要自动形式化技术将自然语言数学转换为可验证代码。
AI.method: 构建了一个由编排器管理的多智能体管道，使用通用编码LLM（而非针对Lean微调的小模型），通过新型辅助引理技术动态扩展Mathlib中不存在的类型定义，然后形式化主要定理。
AI.result: 在PutnamBench上为32道随机选问题生成了机器可检查的Lean证明；在5篇STOC论文（涵盖组合学、通信复杂性、机制设计、学习理论）上成功形式化了主定理及其证明，其中两篇证明不依赖Mathlib外任何公理。
AI.conclusion: 通用编码LLM已超越专门为Lean微调的小模型，成为自动形式化的有效工具；该框架能处理前沿研究级数学问题，为数学证明验证提供新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about mathematical formalization and theorem proving using LLM agents to convert natural language mathematics into Lean 4 proofs. The application domain is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - it deals with mathematical reasoning and formal verification, not 3D motion synthesis, video generation, or visual feature extraction. While it uses LLMs, the methods and goals are entirely different from the research profile's focus on bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation.

title: Diffusion-Based Material Regularization for Physics-Based Inverse Rendering
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Includes supplementary material. Project page: https://gerwang.github.io/diffusion-regularized-inverse-rendering/
summary: Reconstructing physics-based 3D assets -- geometry, materials, and illumination -- from multi-view images is a core problem in computer graphics and vision, and a prerequisite for realistic relighting and editing. Physics-based inverse rendering offers an accurate image-formation model, but is severely underconstrained: without strong priors, illumination is baked into materials, and reconstructions generalize poorly to novel views and lighting. Data-driven diffusion models, in contrast, predict visually plausible materials, yet their predictions rarely satisfy the rendering equation and are not directly usable for physics-based rendering. We bridge these two paradigms rather than replacing either. Our key idea is to treat the predictions of a state-of-the-art diffusion model not as target material values but as a similarity kernel for optimization: we introduce a regularization loss that penalizes deviations in the optimized material over surface regions where the diffusion predictions are near-constant, while leaving the optimization free to match the input images. Built on this regularizer, our end-to-end pipeline jointly reconstructs geometry, materials, and illumination, yielding high-quality assets that drop into standard rendering pipelines and relight faithfully. On the Synthetic4Relight, Stanford-ORB, and DTC-Synthetic datasets, our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both reconstruction accuracy and relighting quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种桥接扩散模型与物理渲染的方法,将扩散模型的预测作为优化相似性核而非目标值,联合重建几何、材质和光照,生成可直接用于标准渲染管线的高质量3D资产。
AI.motivation: 解决物理逆渲染的欠约束问题:无强先验时光照会被烘焙到材质中,重建结果泛化性差;扩散模型预测的材质不满足渲染方程,无法直接用于物理渲染。
AI.method: 将扩散模型预测作为相似性核:引入正则化损失惩罚扩散预测接近常数的表面区域的材质偏差,同时让优化自由匹配输入图像。端到端管线联合重建几何、材质和光照。
AI.result: 在Synthetic4Relight、Stanford-ORB和DTC-Synthetic数据集上,重建精度和重光照质量均显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 成功桥接数据驱动扩散模型与物理渲染范式,生成可投入标准渲染管线的高质量资产,在多个基准数据集上取得显著性能提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about physics-based inverse rendering (reconstructing geometry, material, lighting from 2D images), which is a DIFFERENT application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. While both are in computer graphics and use diffusion models, the paper addresses inverse rendering problems (material regularization, relighting) rather than video-to-motion generation. The methods, goals, and pain points are orthogonal - the profile wants video-to-motion generation, while this paper focuses on 3D asset reconstruction for rendering pipelines.

title: Cross-Domain Feature Expansion for Tabular Medical Data via Knowledge Graphs Injection
summary: Acquiring comprehensive cross-domain biomedical profiles is often costly and time-consuming, resulting in severe data scarcity in medical research. To address this challenge, we propose MedKGTab, a knowledge-injected framework specifically engineered for cross-domain feature expansion in tabular medical data. MedKGTab seeks to infer uncollected biomedical features from available ones by exploiting their inherent statistical dependencies and established medical correlations. By employing a row-column dual-attention mechanism, MedKGTab operates directly on raw structured tabular data, inherently capturing exact numerical distributions without the structural loss caused by tokenization. Crucially, MedKGTab integrates data-driven statistical priors with the SPOKE biomedical knowledge graph, achieving an optimal synergy between the data and knowledge channels. Within this synergy, the representations derived from the data channel are modulated by the injected biomedical knowledge, ensuring the final generated data are grounded in empirical medical research. Experimental results demonstrate that MedKGTab achieves high data fidelity and realistic data representation in cross-domain feature expansion. It outperforms both SOTA medical large models (e.g., Baichuan M3-plus) and specialized tabular models designed for medical data generation. Furthermore, MedKGTab consistently delivers superior performance across various data generation scenarios, whether inferring missing features within the same dataset or generalizing across different medical cohorts.

AI.tldr: MedKGTab是一种知识注入框架,用于表格医疗数据的跨域特征扩展,通过利用固有统计依赖关系和医学相关性来推断未收集的生物医学特征。
AI.motivation: 获取全面的跨域生物医学特征成本高且耗时,导致医学研究面临严重的数据稀缺问题。
AI.method: MedKGTab采用行-列双注意力机制,直接在原始结构化表格数据上操作,避免tokenization带来的结构损失;同时整合数据驱动的统计先验与SPOKE生物医学知识图谱,实现数据通道与知识通道的最佳协同,使知识调制数据表示,确保生成的数据基于实证医学研究。
AI.result: MedKGTab在跨域特征扩展中实现了高数据保真度和真实的数据表示,优于SOTA医学大模型(如Baichuan M3-plus)和专门的医疗数据生成表格模型,在同数据集内缺失特征推断和不同医疗队列间泛化等多种数据生成场景中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MedKGTab能够有效解决医疗数据稀缺问题,通过知识注入与数据驱动方法的协同,为跨域医疗特征生成提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical tabular data and knowledge graphs - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. The application domain is medical informatics/healthcare AI, not computer graphics, video understanding, or 3D motion generation. Methods used (knowledge graphs for tabular medical data) have no overlap with the research profile's focus on Vision-Language Models for video-to-3D motion generation.

title: Hybrid Unet-Transformer Model for Generating Stress and Strain Fields from Composite Geometrics
comment: International Conference on Emerging Digital Intelligence and Generative Engineering
summary: Accurate prediction of stress and strain fields in hierarchical composite microstructures is critical for physics-informed material design, yet conventional finite element method (FEM) simulations are computationally prohibitive at scale, requiring minutes to days per evaluation. In this work, we propose a hybrid UNet-Transformer architecture that predicts complex mechanical field distributions directly from composite microstructure geometry images, serving as an efficient surrogate for FEM across ten distinct stress and strain field types spanning diverse two-phase composite configurations including square, hexagonal, and triangular tessellations, multiple boundary conditions, and high-resolution geometries. Results demonstrate that the proposed architecture achieves strong predictive performance across the majority of subdatasets, with peak accuracy on periodic tessellation geometries reaching R2=0.9991, SSIM=0.9936, and MAE=0.0050 on the boundary condition subdataset and the triangular tessellation subdataset respectively. Across six of the eight evaluated subdatasets, MAE remains below 0.05 on the normalized [0,1] pixel scale. Encoder attention analysis via Grad-CAM and Grad-CAM++ confirms that the model develops physically meaningful internal representations, localizing attention at mechanically critical regions including phase boundaries, ligament junctions, and indenter contact zones without explicit structural supervision. Performance degrades on irregular square-grid geometries with sparse soft-phase inclusions, with the S11 normal stress subdataset yielding R2=0.7735 and SSIM=0.7126, consistent with the known limitation of smooth-loss image translation models in reproducing sharp stress discontinuities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合UNet-Transformer架构，可直接从复合微观结构几何图像预测复杂机械场分布，作为FEM的高效替代方案。该模型在十种不同应力/应变场类型上进行了验证，涵盖多种复合构型。
AI.motivation: 传统的有限元方法(FEM)模拟在规模上计算成本过高，每次评估需要分钟到天级别的时间。因此需要一种高效的代理模型来预测应力/应变场，以支持基于物理的材料设计。
AI.method: 提出混合UNet-Transformer架构，直接从复合微观结构几何图像预测机械场分布。模型在多种两相复合构型上训练，包括正方形、六边形和三角形镶嵌结构，不同边界条件以及高分辨率几何形状。通过Grad-CAM和Grad-CAM++进行编码器注意力分析。
AI.result: 模型在大多数子数据集上取得优异预测性能：周期性镶嵌几何的边界条件子数据集上R²=0.9991、SSIM=0.9936，三角形镶嵌子数据集上MAE=0.0050。在8个评估子数据集中，有6个的MAE低于0.05（归一化[0,1]像素尺度）。注意力分析确认模型学习到了物理上有意义的内部表征，能够定位相界、韧带接头和压头接触区等机械关键区域。性能在稀疏软相夹杂的不规则正方形网格几何上下降，S11正应力子数据集R²=0.7735、SSIM=0.7126。
AI.conclusion: 混合UNet-Transformer架构能够有效预测复合微观结构中的应力/应变场，在规则几何上表现优异，但在不规则几何和尖锐应力不连续区域存在局限。该方法为快速预测复合材料机械性能提供了可行替代方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. While this paper uses a hybrid UNet-Transformer architecture (similar method), the application domain is entirely different - it's about computational mechanics/materials science for predicting stress/strain fields from composite geometry images, not computer graphics, 3D motion synthesis, or video-to-motion generation. The research profile specifically requires Vision-Language Models, Video Generation Models (Wanxiang, Seedance), and 3D Motion Generation for computer graphics, which this paper does not address at all. This is a case of same architectural method but completely different application domain.

title: ClawArena-Team: Benchmarking Subagent Orchestration and Dynamic Workflows in Language-Model Agents
summary: Production large language-model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed not as lone problem-solvers but as managers: a main model creates specialized subagents, delegates work, and orchestrates their parallel, asynchronous returns through dynamic workflows. Whether one model can actually run such a team is largely unmeasured: existing benchmarks score a policy's own task-solving or a fixed multi-agent system's emergent behavior, but none isolate the management ability of the single LLM acting as leader. We introduce ClawArena-Team, a benchmark of 41 multi-turn, multimodal, multi-directory scenarios spanning 258 evaluation rounds and 72 staged updates that measures this management ability. The main agent is deliberately constrained: it natively perceives only text and directly accesses only part of the workspace. It commands a fixed, locally served subagent pool, so score differences reflect management skill, not raw capability. All scoring is execution-based with no LLM judge: an overall score -- the Subagent-Management Score (SMS) -- multiplies task correctness by a least-privilege and modality-routing factor. Across twelve proprietary, community-hosted, and self-hosted models, experiments show that the management bottleneck is privilege granting rather than perception (no model exceeds 50% workspace-permission precision); that cost and management quality are decoupled (API cost spans over 100 times while the overall score spans under 4 times, with the cheapest open models on the Pareto frontier); and that most leaderboard scores cluster within a 9.9-point band while orchestration behaviors diverge by more than an order of magnitude. Code and data will be released.

AI.tldr: 论文提出ClawArena-Team基准测试，评估LLM作为团队管理者的能力，涵盖41个多轮、多模态、多目录场景。研究发现权限授予是管理瓶颈，成本与管理质量解耦，分数集中在9.9分范围内但编排行为差异显著。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试只评估政策自身的问题解决能力或固定多智能体系统的涌现行为，无法隔离单个LLM作为管理者的管理能力。
AI.method: 构建ClawArena-Team基准：41个多轮多模态多目录场景，258轮评估，72个阶段性更新。约束主智能体只能感知文本和访问部分工作区，使用固定本地子智能体池。执行评分，无LLM评判，使用SMS（子智能体管理分数）=任务正确性×最小权限×模态路由因子。
AI.result: 权限授予是管理瓶颈（无模型权限精确度超过50%）；成本与管理质量解耦（API成本差异超100倍但总分差异不到4倍，最便宜的开源模型在Pareto前沿）；大多数排行榜分数集中在9.9分范围内但编排行为差异超过一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: LLM作为团队管理者的核心瓶颈在于权限授予而非感知能力；管理质量与成本解耦为开源模型提供机会；需重新审视评估指标以捕捉编排行为差异。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent orchestration and benchmarking multi-agent systems for software engineering tasks. It is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, visual feature extraction, and bridging 2D video with 3D motion representation. The paper does not address any of the mentioned pain points (3D visual guidance, quality supervision for 3D, motion synthesis) and uses entirely different methods (LLM subagent orchestration vs. Vision-Language Models for video/motion generation). This is a different field entirely - AI/LLM research vs. Computer Graphics.

title: Hierarchical 3D Scene Graph Construction and Belief-based Planning for Semantic Navigation
summary: Semantic navigation is a fundamental task for embodied agents operating in unseen environments, requiring both semantic understanding and long-term decision-making. Recent foundation models have empowered agents with rich semantic priors for this task. However, without structured global representations, decision-making often falls back on local observations and greedy strategies, resulting in inefficient exploration and myopic behaviors, especially in long-distance navigation. To address these challenges, we propose a zero-shot semantic navigation framework. Our method incrementally maintains an online Hierarchical 3D Scene Graph (HSG) to form a multi-granular semantic topology over objects, zones, and regions, serving as a compact state abstraction for global planning. Building on this memory, we introduce a hierarchical belief-based planning framework that fuses semantic priors with exploration evidence on the HSG, and performs finite-horizon rollouts on an HSG-based simulator to explicitly estimate the long-term expected returns of candidate macro-actions. This enables globally consistent decisions and reduces redundant backtracking. Extensive experiments in high-fidelity simulation environments across multiple tasks and datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly in long-distance scenarios, where our approach improves SR and SPL by an average of 9.4\% and 5.0\%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出一种零样本语义导航框架，通过在线维护层级3D场景图(HSG)作为紧凑状态抽象，结合基于信念的分层规划框架，在长距离导航任务中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型虽赋予智能体丰富的语义先验，但缺乏结构化全局表示，导致决策依赖局部观察和贪婪策略，在长距离导航中效率低下且行为短视。
AI.method: 1)增量维护在线层级3D场景图(HSG)，形成对象、区域、区域的多粒度语义拓扑；2)基于记忆引入分层信念规划框架，将语义先验与探索证据融合；3)在HSG模拟器上执行有限视野 rollout 评估候选宏动作的长期预期回报。
AI.result: 在多个任务和数据集的高保真模拟环境中实验结果表明，方法优于现有最先进方法；在长距离场景中，SR(成功率)和SPL(路径效率)分别平均提升9.4%和5.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过HSG实现全局一致的决策规划，减少冗余回溯，有效解决了长距离语义导航中的效率问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ROBOTIC SEMANTIC NAVIGATION using 3D scene graphs and planning, which is completely different from the research profile focused on Computer Graphics for 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video. The application domain is robotics/AI navigation, not computer graphics or video-to-motion generation. While both deal with 3D representations, the goals are entirely different: this paper helps robots navigate environments, while the research profile needs methods to generate 3D human motion from video inputs. The methods (scene graphs, belief planning) also do not align with the required video generation models, VLM-based quality supervision, or motion generation approaches.

title: HealthAgentBench: A Unified Benchmark Suite of Realistic Agentic Healthcare Environments for Challenging Frontier AI Agents
summary: As AI agents become increasingly capable of complex, long-horizon reasoning, rigorous and holistic evaluation is essential for measuring progress toward real-world healthcare applications. We introduce HealthAgentBench, a suite of 54 agentic healthcare tasks across 7 categories each with its unique environment. The benchmark suite spans diverse workflows throughout the patient journey and a broad range of modalities. Each task is designed to replicate an end-to-end clinical workflow: given minimal instructions, an agent must explore raw healthcare data, operate within a complex environment, and execute multi-step solutions that go beyond naive prompting. A final task success rate is reported to provide a single, interpretable metric for HealthAgentBench overall performance for each agent. Evaluating frontier agents on HealthAgentBench, we find that overall task success rate remains low, underscoring the difficulty of the suite. The strongest and the most cost effective agent, Codex GPT-5.5, achieves only approximately 42% success rate. Beyond aggregate performance, HealthAgentBench reveals nuanced strengths and weaknesses across task categories. Frontier agents show promise in automatically developing research modeling pipelines over EHR data, but medical imaging remains especially challenging, particularly for Claude Code models, while Codex GPT-5.5 shows emerging capability. Tasks that combine large search spaces with compositional reasoning requirements remain difficult for all current agents. Together, these results suggest that HealthAgentBench provides a challenging and realistic benchmark with substantial room for future progress. We release our benchmark at https://github.com/microsoft/HealthAgentBench.

AI.tldr: HealthAgentBench是一个用于评估医疗AI代理的基准测试套件，包含54个跨7个类别的医疗任务，旨在测试AI代理在复杂临床工作流中的端到端推理和执行能力。评估显示当前前沿代理的成功率仍较低（约42%），为医疗AI代理的发展提供了具有挑战性和现实性的基准。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理在复杂、长周期推理方面能力增强，需要严格且全面的评估方法来衡量其在现实医疗应用中的进展。现有基准测试缺乏对端到端临床工作流的全面评估。
AI.method: 构建包含54个任务的健康医疗代理基准，涵盖7个类别，每个类别有独特环境。任务模拟完整的临床工作流：给定最少指令，代理需探索原始医疗数据，在复杂环境中操作，执行超越简单提示的多步骤解决方案。
AI.result: 前沿代理的整体任务成功率仍然较低。最强且最具成本效益的代理Codex GPT-5.5仅达到约42%的成功率。Claude Code模型在医学影像方面尤其困难，而Codex GPT-5.5显示出新兴能力。结合大搜索空间和组合推理要求的任务对所有当前代理都具有挑战性。
AI.conclusion: HealthAgentBench提供了一个具有挑战性和现实性的基准测试，为未来研究留下了 substantial room for progress。前沿代理在EHR数据上自动开发研究建模管道方面展现潜力，但医学影像仍特别具有挑战性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about healthcare AI agent benchmarking and has NO relevance to the research profile. The application domain is completely different: healthcare/medical AI vs Computer Graphics/3D motion synthesis. While both mention "agents" or "multi-step solutions", this paper focuses on clinical workflows, medical task completion, and healthcare applications - not 3D visual feature extraction, video-to-3D motion synthesis, or any computer graphics tasks. The methods and goals are entirely orthogonal - this is a healthcare AI benchmark paper with no connection to vision-language models for 3D motion generation or visual guidance features from video priors.

title: AnyMatch: Supercharging Universal Multi-Modal Image Matching with Large-Scale Single-View Images
summary: Multi-modal image matching is essential for visual localization and multi-sensor fusion, but it is hindered by the scarcity of large-scale training data with precise geometric annotations. Existing real-world datasets suffer from prohibitive costs, limited scene diversity, and errors in SfM-MVS pipelines, while synthetic methods struggle to maintain 3D geometric consistency or achieve photorealistic appearance. To address this, we propose AnyMatch, a novel framework that leverages abundant, easily accessible single-view images at minimal cost to generate rich multi-modal training data. AnyMatch integrates monocular depth estimation, 3D reprojection, diffusion-based inpainting, and crossmodal image translation to synthesize multi-view, multi-modal image pairs with 3D geometric fidelity. Crucially, our method provides annotations that strictly adhere to 3D geometric consistency through explicit 3D reprojection, avoiding SfM-MVS error accumulation. Furthermore, AnyMatch offers strong scalability, enabling controllable scene diversity and annotation difficulty via adjustable input and camera parameters. We construct Any-syn, a large-scale synthetic multi-modal dataset using AnyMatch. Experimental results show that matching networks (e.g., LoFTR, EDM, RoMa) fine-tuned on Any-syn achieve substantial performance gains on multi-modal benchmarks, exhibiting superior generalization and robustness compared to models trained on existing data.

AI.tldr: AnyMatch是一个利用单目深度估计、3D重投影、扩散修复和跨模态图像翻译，从易获取的单视图图像合成多视图、多模态图像对的大规模训练数据生成框架，可生成严格遵循3D几何一致性的标注数据。
AI.motivation: 多模态图像匹配对视觉定位和多传感器融合至关重要，但面临大规模精确几何标注训练数据稀缺的问题。现有真实数据集成本高、场景多样性有限且存在SfM-MVS管道误差，合成方法则难以保持3D几何一致性或实现照片级真实感。
AI.method: AnyMatch框架整合了单目深度估计、3D重投影、基于扩散的修复和跨模态图像翻译技术，从单视图图像合成具有3D几何保真度的多视图、多模态图像对。通过显式3D重投影提供严格遵守3D几何一致性的标注，避免SfM-MVS误差累积。
AI.result: 基于AnyMatch构建的大规模合成多模态数据集Any-syn进行微调的匹配网络（如LoFTR、EDM、RoMa）在多模态基准测试上实现了显著性能提升，表现出优于现有数据训练模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AnyMatch方法具有强大的可扩展性，可通过调整输入和相机参数实现可控的场景多样性和标注难度。合成数据集Any-syn能有效提升多模态图像匹配网络的性能，为解决训练数据稀缺问题提供了有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-modal IMAGE MATCHING (2D-2D or 2D-3D correspondence for visual localization), not about 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video. While it uses some related techniques like depth estimation and 3D reprojection, the application domain is completely different. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from video, but this paper focuses on matching images across modalities for localization tasks. Using diffusion-based inpainting in the WRONG application domain (image matching vs motion generation) should be considered irrelevant.

title: AI-Assisted Discovery of Convex Relaxations via Dual Agents
summary: Recent work shows that LLM agents can improve sharp-constant inequalities by searching for extremal constructions, which yield upper bounds. We address the complementary side: a lower bound holds for every admissible function and follows from a convex relaxation of the nonconvex problem, with tighter relaxations giving stronger bounds. We instantiate the autoresearch paradigm to discover such relaxations: a coding agent proposes valid tightening constraints, a theory agent verifies each one and searches for counterexamples, and every reported bound is certified by an explicit dual-feasible point checked in rigorous interval arithmetic. On two optimization constants studied by \citet{tao2025alphaevolve} - the first autocorrelation inequality ($C_{6.2}$) and the Erdős minimum-overlap constant ($C_{6.5}$) - we improve the certified lower bounds from $1.28$ to $1.2937$ and from $0.379005$ to $0.37912$, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动研究范式，通过凸松弛方法为优化常数寻找更紧的下界，并通过多智能体系统（编码智能体+理论智能体）自动发现和验证约束紧致技术。应用于两个经典优化常数（C₆.₂和C₆.₅），分别将下界从1.28提升至1.2937，从0.379005提升至0.37912。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体研究主要关注通过极值构造寻找上界，而下界（对所有容许函数成立）通常被忽视。本文旨在弥补这一空白，通过更紧的凸松弛获得更强的下界。
AI.method: 1) 将非凸问题凸松弛化；2) 采用自动研究范式：编码智能体提出有效的紧致约束，理论智能体验证并搜索反例；3) 使用严格区间算术对偶可行点进行认证。
AI.result: 两个优化常数的 certified lower bounds 均获得提升：C₆.₂ 从 1.28 改进至 1.2937；C₆.₅ 从 0.379005 改进至 0.37912。
AI.conclusion: 自动搜索凸松弛约束是获得优化常数更紧下界的有效方法，多智能体协作框架能够系统性地发现并验证新的数学约束。未来的研究可探索更复杂的常数和更一般的不等式类别。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about using AI/LLM agents for mathematical optimization theory (finding tighter lower bounds for optimization constants via convex relaxations). This has zero connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion synthesis, video-to-3D conversion, Vision-Language Models for visual tasks, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different - mathematical optimization theory vs computer graphics/motion generation.

title: Fleet: Few Shots Lead Effective AI-generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated image (AIGI) detection is undergoing a critical transition from laboratory benchmarks to open-world adversarial defense. The prevalent paradigm focuses on finding static feature spaces, assuming that some invariant artifacts learned from historical data can achieve universal zero-shot generalization. While achieving saturation on several AIGI benchmarks, this static hypothesis suffers a severe performance drop against rapidly evolving generators (e.g., SD3, Nano Banana Pro). To address these limitations, we propose that the field should expand beyond "static generalization" to a new paradigm of "dynamic adaptation". We introduce Fleet, a framework that pioneers a dynamic paradigm of continuous few-shot evolution, enabling rapid alignment with emerging generative threats. Fleet improves few-shot adaptation by replacing unconstrained feature updates with constrained routing correction, where avoidance routing redirects novel AI samples away from Non-AI-dominated routes within decoupled subspaces. To validate this, we present Treasure, a benchmark spanning 64 models and 360k images, featuring diverse architectures and 20 closed-source commercial engines. Experiments reveal that while static SOTA methods fail catastrophically on modern generators, Fleet restores performance from 20.4% to 73.1% with only 10-shot adaptation on "Doubao Seedream 4.0". Code and data are available at https://github.com/ICTMCG/Fleet .

AI.tldr: AI生成图像检测领域正从静态特征空间范式向动态适应范式转变。现有静态方法在新兴生成器上性能严重下降，论文提出Fleet框架，通过约束路由纠正实现持续少样本演化，在新生成器"Doubao Seedream 4.0"上仅用10个样本即将性能从20.4%提升至73.1%。
AI.motivation: 当前AIGI检测方法假设存在可跨模型泛化的不变artifacts，但在快速演进的新型生成器（如SD3、Nano Banana Pro）上性能急剧下降，需要从"静态泛化"转向"动态适应"新范式。
AI.method: 提出Fleet框架，采用动态少样本演化范式，通过约束路由纠正替代无约束特征更新，其中避免路由将新型AI样本从非AI主导路由重定向到解耦子空间中。
AI.result: 在Treasure基准测试集（64个模型、360k图像）上验证，静态SOTA方法在现代生成器上性能崩溃，而Fleet仅需10-shot适应即可将性能从20.4%提升至73.1%。
AI.conclusion: 动态适应范式是AIGI检测的未来方向，Fleet框架成功实现了对新兴生成威胁的快速对齐，为开放世界对抗防御提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about AI-generated IMAGE DETECTION (classifying whether an image is AI-generated or not), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video input. These are entirely different application domains - computer vision/AI detection vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The paper addresses none of the pain points: not about extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, not about quality supervision through VLM for motion generation, not about 3D motion synthesis, and not about bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation.

title: Agentic RAG-VLM: Affordance-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Self-Reflective Planning for Robotic Grasping
summary: Generalizable robotic grasping in cluttered environments is essential for deploying manipulators in unstructured human spaces, yet existing VLM-based methods rely on visual similarity for object matching, neglecting physical affordances such as handle graspability and material fragility, and operate open-loop without spatial reasoning or failure recovery, limiting their effectiveness when objects are densely packed or physically diverse. We present Agentic RAG-VLM, a unified framework that bridges VLM-based semantic understanding and physically grounded grasp execution by integrating retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) with vision-language models (VLMs) and agentic self-reflective planning. Agentic RAG-VLM introduces three tightly coupled components: (1) a Hierarchical Affordance-Aware RAG (HAA-RAG) that encodes four-dimensional affordance descriptors, including type, material, fragility, and graspable region, and retrieves strategies by functional affordance compatibility rather than visual appearance; (2) a Scene Graph Constraint Reasoner that constructs spatial relationship graphs from VLM perception and translates proximity, occlusion, and support constraints into concrete grasp parameter adjustments; and (3) an Agentic Self-Reflective Pipeline with a 14-type failure taxonomy and three-level adaptive retry for closed-loop grasp refinement. Evaluated on a 12-task benchmark spanning single-grasp, interactive, and long-horizon scenarios with 360 trials per configuration, Agentic RAG-VLM achieves 78.3 percent overall success, a 53.3 percentage-point absolute gain over VLM-only baselines, demonstrating that affordance-aware retrieval, scene graph reasoning, and agentic recovery are jointly essential for robust manipulation.

AI.tldr: Agentic RAG-VLM 是一个统一框架，通过结合检索增强生成、视觉语言模型和代理自反思规划，将基于 VLM 的语义理解与物理 grounded 抓取执行相结合，实现复杂环境中的可泛化机器人抓取。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLM 方法仅依赖视觉相似度进行物体匹配，忽略物理 affordance（如手柄可抓取性、材质脆性），且以开环方式运行，缺乏空间推理和失败恢复能力，在物体密集或物理多样性场景中效果受限。
AI.method: 提出统一框架Agentic RAG-VLM，包含三个紧密耦合的组件：1) 层次化 affordance 感知 RAG (HAA-RAG)，编码四维 affordance 描述符；2) 场景图约束推理器，从 VLM 感知构建空间关系图；3) 代理自反思 pipeline，包含14类失败分类法和三级自适应重试机制。
AI.result: 在12任务基准测试的360次试验中，Agentic RAG-VLM 达到78.3%总体成功率，比 VLM 仅基线提升53.3个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在复杂抓取任务中展示了显著优势，为非结构化环境中的机器人操作提供了新的解决方案思路。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The research profile is about Computer Graphics (specifically 3D motion synthesis from video), while this paper is about ROBOTICS - robotic grasping in cluttered environments. Although both use Vision-Language Models, the application domains are fundamentally different: computer graphics focuses on visual content/motion generation, while this paper focuses on physical robot manipulation tasks. The pain points in the profile (extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, quality supervision for 3D motion synthesis, bridging 2D video to 3D motion) are completely unrelated to robotic grasping affordance detection.

title: CasaMaestro: Multi-View Panoramas for House-Scale 3D Reconstruction
summary: The rise of home-deployed embodied AI systems is driving a growing need for fast, metric 3D reconstruction of residential spaces to support navigation, interaction, and long-horizon task execution. However, the commonly used pinhole-camera 3D reconstruction pipelines struggle to model large indoor residences efficiently due to their limited field of view, to which achieving full coverage across multiple rooms often requires thousands of images and incurs drift from long chains of incremental alignment. In this work, we present CasaMaestro (Spanish words meaning ``house'' and ``master''), a feedforward model that can take only twenty to fifty sparse multi-view indoor panoramas as input and directly predicts metric depth along with camera poses, allowing fast point-cloud reconstruction of the entire house with full coverage. CasaMaestro is the first model that supports house-scale reconstruction with multi-view panoramas. Experiments show that CasaMaestro can robustly provide high quality results in both real-world and synthetic scenes, which can serve as a strong foundation for acquiring house-scale 3D indoor assets to be applied in close-loop simulation.

AI.tldr: CasaMaestro是一种前馈模型，可以仅用20-50张稀疏多视角室内全景图作为输入，直接预测度量深度和相机姿态，实现整个房屋的快速点云重建，是首个支持多视角全景图房屋级重建的模型。
AI.motivation: 家庭部署的具身AI系统需要快速对住宅空间进行度量3D重建以支持导航、交互和长时任务执行。传统针孔相机3D重建管道因视场有限，难以高效建模大型室内住宅，实现全屋覆盖通常需要数千张图像，且存在长链增量对齐带来的漂移问题。
AI.method: 提出CasaMaestro，一种前馈神经网络模型。该模型仅需20-50张稀疏多视角室内全景图作为输入，直接预测度量深度和相机姿态，从而实现整个房屋的快速点云重建。
AI.result: CasaMaestro是首个支持多视角全景图房屋级重建的模型。实验表明，该模型能在真实场景和合成场景中稳健地提供高质量重建结果，可作为获取房屋级3D室内资产的强大基础。
AI.conclusion: CasaMaestro能够实现高效、准确的房屋级3D重建，可为具身AI系统提供完整的室内空间感知能力，适用于闭环模拟等应用场景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D scene reconstruction from panoramic images, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. The research profile specifically deals with generating human motion (motion synthesis) from video input, while CasaMaestro focuses on static 3D point cloud reconstruction of indoor environments. Even though both involve 3D, they are fundamentally different: motion generation vs. scene reconstruction. Additionally, the methods differ significantly - the profile focuses on VLM, video generation models, and motion generation models, while this paper uses feedforward neural networks for depth estimation.

title: Towards Inclusive Mobility Modeling: Characterizing and Evaluating Elderly Trajectory Patterns in Urban Systems
summary: The rapid advance of smart cities increasingly depends on trajectory data mining, yet underrepresented demographic groups, particularly the elderly, are often sparsely represented in public mobility datasets. This underrepresentation can introduce systematic bias into mobility modeling and downstream urban planning. Using the 2016-2020 Jersey City subset of the Citi Bike System Data, this study quantitatively examines how the absence of underrepresented subgroups' mobility signatures affects mobility modeling, using synthetic trajectory generation as a case study. The analysis reveals that elderly riders exhibit a structurally distinct mobility signature, including localized activity spaces (958 m vs. 1,189 m for young riders), lower mobility entropy (1.82 vs. 4.15), and asymmetric off-peak temporal patterns. To demonstrate that relying on majority-dominated training data yields biased synthetic outcomes, we further evaluate both a first-order Markov chain and a Qwen3-4B model fine-tuned with QLoRA across three demographic training settings: the full population, young riders only, and elderly riders only. Results show that models trained on majority-dominated populations systematically misrepresent elderly mobility behavior, particularly for spatial mobility metrics. The Markov model trained on the full population overestimates elderly step length by 4.5% and dwell time by 8.9%, whereas the elderly-specific model achieves substantially lower errors across most metrics. Comparisons between the Markov and LLM-based frameworks further show that higher-capability models do not necessarily improve subgroup-level fidelity under limited demographic data. These findings underscore the importance of demographic representation in mobility modeling and its downstream applications for underrepresented populations.

AI.tldr: 研究使用2016-2020年Jersey City的Citi Bike数据，通过合成轨迹生成案例，定量分析弱势群体（老年人） mobility signatures缺失对mobility modeling的影响。研究发现老年人具有独特的mobility signature（活动范围更小、entropy更低、非对称的off-peak时间模式），且基于多数人群训练的模型会系统性地误解老年人mobility behavior。LLM模型在有限人口数据下并不一定能提高子群体级别的保真度。
AI.motivation: 智慧城市的发展越来越依赖轨迹数据挖掘，但弱势群体（特别是老年人）在公共mobility数据集中代表性不足，导致系统性偏差进入mobility modeling和下游城市规划。
AI.method: 使用2016-2020年Jersey City Citi Bike数据，采用一阶马尔可夫链和Qwen3-4B模型（QLoRA微调），在三种人口统计训练设置下（全部人口、仅年轻人、仅老年人）进行合成轨迹生成实验。
AI.result: 老年人具有显著不同的mobility signature：活动范围更小（958m vs 1189m）、entropy更低（1.82 vs 4.15）、非对称的off-peak时间模式。马尔可夫模型在全人口训练下高估老年人step length 4.5%和dwell time 8.9%。老年人专用模型在大多数指标上误差显著更低。LLM模型在有限人口数据下并未显著提高子群体级别的保真度。
AI.conclusion: 在mobility modeling中，人口统计代表性非常重要，尤其是对弱势/少数群体的下游应用。依赖多数人群主导的训练数据会系统性地歪曲少数群体的mobility behavior。更高capability的模型在有限人口数据下不一定能改善子群体级别的保真度。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video, visual feature extraction, and video generation models. The paper is about urban mobility modeling using Citi Bike trajectory data, analyzing elderly transportation patterns - this is transportation/urban planning research, not computer graphics. Even though the paper uses an LLM (Qwen), it's for text-based mobility analysis, not visual/VLM tasks. The application domain, methods, and goals are entirely different from the research profile.

title: Towards Flexible, Natural, Efficient Interaction for Conversational Talking Face Generation
summary: Conversational talking face generation has recently attracted increasing attention, aiming to synthesize interactive talking videos where characters speak, listen, and respond dynamically to each other. This task presents three core challenges: 1) Flexibility: enabling multi-round dialogues with an arbitrary number of participants; 2) Naturalness: maintaining coherent motion and appropriate non-verbal feedback throughout the interaction; and 3) Efficiency: achieving real-time generation and low computation overhead for long-term continuous online conversation. Despite recent advances, existing methods still fall short in balancing all three requirements. To bridge this gap, we introduce InterTalk, a novel and efficient framework designed for highly interactive conversational talking face generation. Built upon a motion-based architecture, InterTalk supports real-time conversation synthesis. Our method achieves strong flexibility by explicitly modeling multi-round conversational dynamics among each participant, eliminating constraints on their numbers. To enhance interactivity, we incorporate motion feedback from multiple participants and introduce an iterative generation strategy for more natural behaviors.
