title: Learning to Deny: Action Denial in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have rapidly advanced video understanding, achieving strong zero-shot and few-shot recognition across standard benchmarks. Yet their ability to deny an action by recognizing when an activity is not happening despite strong contextual cues remains largely unexplored. We introduce UCF101-AD, a large-scale benchmark consisting of paired Action-Presence and Action-Denial clips, designed to evaluate this capacity for denial. Each negative video in UCF101-AD preserves the same contextual and motion cues, including persons, objects, and locations, as its positive counterpart, but the defining action itself is explicitly absent. Evaluating 20 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals a consistent failure: models that exceed 85% accuracy on the positive action classes collapse below 50% on their action-denial counterparts, indicating a strong inclination to affirm plausible actions rather than verify that they truly occur. This exposes a critical blind spot in modern video understanding: the inability to reason causally about whether a motion actually happens. To probe this issue, we explore a causal graph formulation, CausalAct, which expresses scene structure through natural-language prompts linking context, interaction, and motion. Incorporating such causal cues substantially reduces false positives, demonstrating that denial is a learnable reasoning skill. UCF101-AD provides a new lens for diagnosing and improving causal reasoning in multimodal models. Dataset and relevant code: https://github.com/raiyaan-abdullah/Learn-to-Deny.

AI.tldr: UCF101-AD是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）动作否定能力的大规模基准数据集。研究发现当前最先进的MLLMs在动作识别上准确率超过85%，但在动作否定任务上准确率低于50%，揭示了模型无法进行因果推理判断动作是否真正发生的关键缺陷。提出CausalAct方法通过因果图形式关联上下文、交互和运动，显著减少误报。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在视频理解任务上取得了显著进展，但它们在动作否定（denial）方面的能力几乎未被探索。现有模型倾向于肯定性地预测动作是否发生，而缺乏验证动作是否真正发生的因果推理能力。
AI.method: 1) 构建UCF101-AD数据集，包含成对的Action-Presence（动作存在）和Action-Denial（动作否定）视频 clip；2) 保留相同的上下文和运动线索（人物、物体、地点），仅移除定义性动作；3) 提出CausalAct方法，使用自然语言提示通过因果图表达场景结构，关联上下文、交互和运动。
AI.result: 评估20个最先进的MLLMs发现：在正向动作类别上准确率超过85%的模型，在动作否定任务上准确率降至50%以下，模型表现出强烈的肯定动作倾向而非验证动作是否真正发生。CausalAct方法的引入显著减少了误报。
AI.conclusion: 当前视频理解模型存在关键盲点：无法进行因果推理判断动作是否真正发生。动作否定是一种可学习的推理技能，因果线索的引入可以显著提升模型在这方面的能力。UCF101-AD为诊断和改进多模态模型的因果推理提供了新视角。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on action denial capabilities in Multimodal Large Language Models for video understanding, which is in the domain of video analysis/action recognition rather than Computer Graphics or 3D motion synthesis. While it uses Vision-Language Models (one of the methods listed), the application domain is completely different - it's about causal reasoning to determine if actions occurred in videos, not about extracting 3D visual features from video for motion generation, quality supervision for graphics, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The paper addresses video understanding rather than any 3D graphics or motion synthesis tasks specified in the research profile.

title: CLOUDADV: Decision-Aligned Instance Sizing with Zero-Shot Foundation Models under Drift
summary: Cloud virtual machines are often overprovisioned, creating avoidable cost and operational inefficiency. We present CLOUDADV, an interactive engineer-facing advisory system for cloud instance sizing under workload drift. The system combines zero-shot time-series forecasting with bounded recommendation generation across day-, week-, and month-scale planning horizons. For each query, CLOUDADV constructs a structured decision context from historical utilization, forecast summaries, current VM metadata, candidate instance options, pricing, and explicit sizing heuristics. A higher-capacity LLM is used offline to generate reference recommendations, while a smaller production model is evaluated on the same prompts to assess deployment-time alignment under latency and cost constraints. Evaluation prioritizes downstream recommendation quality using simulated Azure cost savings and ex-post exceedance, with rolling-origin forecast accuracy reported as a secondary diagnostic against classical and supervised baselines. In a case study of seven production VMs, the reference recommendations reduce simulated monthly cost from about \$1,503 to \$708, yielding \$795/month in savings (52.9%) under conservative heuristic constraints, while the highest observed exceedance rate among downgraded cases is 1.5%. Although Chronos-2 does not minimize every forecasting metric, it often induces recommendation patterns similar to those of a supervised per-VM baseline. These results suggest that zero-shot foundation models can support decision-aligned provisioning in non-stationary cloud environments while reducing the operational burden of repeated per-tenant retraining, revalidation, and redeployment.

AI.tldr: CLOUDADV是一个面向工程师的云虚拟机实例规模调整交互式顾问系统，结合零样本时间序列预测与有界推荐生成，在日、周、月三种规划周期下提供实例规模建议。该系统使用高容量LLM离线生成参考推荐，同时评估小型生产模型在部署时的对齐情况。
AI.motivation: 云虚拟机经常过度配置，导致可避免的成本和运营效率低下问题，需要一个能够适应工作负载变化的智能规模调整系统。
AI.method: 系统结合零样本时间序列预测模型（Chronos-2）与有界推荐生成，使用历史利用率、预测摘要、当前VM元数据、候选实例选项、定价和显式规模启发式方法构建结构化决策上下文。
AI.result: 在7个生产VM的案例研究中，参考推荐将模拟月度成本从约1503美元降至708美元，每月节省795美元（52.9%），降级案例中最高超限率为1.5%。Chronos-2虽然不是所有预测指标最优，但能产生与监督基线类似的推荐模式。
AI.conclusion: 零样本基础模型可以支持非平稳云环境中的决策对齐配置，同时减少每个租户重复训练、重新验证和重新部署的运营负担。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cloud computing virtual machine instance sizing and cost optimization, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile specifically targets 3D motion synthesis, video generation, visual feature extraction, and bridging 2D video with 3D motion representation. This paper addresses cloud resource optimization using LLM for time series prediction - completely different application domain.

title: Distilling Temporal Coherence into 2D Networks for Transrectal Ultrasound Prostate Video Segmentation
comment: Accepted for publication at the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2026)
summary: Real-time video segmentation of the prostate in Transrectal Ultrasound (TRUS) is essential for image-guided interventions. While conventional 2D methods suffer from inter-frame inconsistencies by disregarding temporal context, 3D architectures incur prohibitive latency. To resolve this dilemma, we present a Temporally Consistent Learning Framework that distills temporal coherence into a 2D network during training, preserving single-frame inference efficiency. Our design is driven by a key clinical observation: the prostate exhibits geometric stability, whereas the surrounding acoustic environment fluctuates due to physiological motion and transducer pressure. Because conventional temporal constraints propagate erroneous gradients from these unstable regions, we introduce a Confidence-Weighted Temporal Consistency objective derived from optical flow warping residuals, selectively attenuating contributions from unreliable regions. Complementing this pixel-wise constraint, a Dual-scale Prototype Alignment Module enforces semantic coherence through contrastive optimization of local boundary and global semantic features. Furthermore, to eliminate the need for dense per-frame video annotations, we employ geometric equivariance-based pseudo-labeling with knowledge distillation from a pretrained teacher. Extensive experiments on SUN-SEG and our newly introduced TRUS-V benchmark (2,679 frames) demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy and temporal consistency at real-time speed. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/DYDevelop/DTC-TRUS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时间一致性学习框架，将时间相干性提取到2D网络中，在保持单帧推理效率的同时实现实时前列腺超声视频分割。通过利用前列腺的几何稳定性特征，设计了置信度加权时间一致性目标和双尺度原型对齐模块，并采用几何等变伪标签进行知识蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 传统2D方法因忽略时间上下文而存在帧间不一致问题，3D架构则产生过高延迟。前列腺在超声视频中具有几何稳定性，而周围声学环境因生理运动和探头压力而波动，这为设计高效的时间一致性方法提供了临床依据。
AI.method: 提出置信度加权时间一致性目标（基于光流扭曲残差）、双尺度原型对齐模块（对比优化局部边界和全局语义特征），以及基于几何等变的伪标签知识蒸馏策略。
AI.result: 在SUN-SEG和新增的TRUS-V基准数据集（2,679帧）上实现了最先进的准确性和时间一致性，且保持实时推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将时间相干性提取到轻量级2D网络中，在临床应用中具有重要价值，为超声引导介入治疗提供了有效的实时分割解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical ultrasound video segmentation (Transrectal Ultrasound Prostate Video Segmentation), which is in the domain of medical imaging/computer vision - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While both deal with video, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on diagnosing prostate cancer through video segmentation, not on generating 3D motion or visual guidance features from video. The methods (2D networks with temporal consistency, optical flow) serve medical diagnosis goals, not the 3D motion generation goals in the research profile.

title: One Reflection Is Not Enough: Self-Correcting Autonomous Research via Multi-Hypothesis Failure Attribution
summary: Autonomous research agents can now draft hypotheses, write code, run experiments, and produce papers, but they remain brittle when experiments fail. Under the prevailing paradigm, failure recovery is usually delegated to a single free-form reflection: a rich trajectory of metrics, logs, and design choices is compressed into one verbal critique, which often leads either to localized trial-and-error or to hard pivots that discard useful context. We propose SAGE, a Self-correcting, Autonomous, Grounded Experimenter, to tackle this failure-recovery bottleneck. Its core mechanism, Multi-Hypothesis Failure Attribution (MHFA), treats recovery as a structured causal diagnosis. By analyzing dynamic trajectory features, MHFA systematically generates multiple evidence-grounded explanations for a failure, independently evaluates their severity, and deterministically routes the verified root cause to the correct intervention level (hypothesis, experimental design, or implementation). To guarantee scientific honesty, SAGE further employs a grounded reporting mechanism that explicitly constrains drafted results to actual measured values, redacting hallucinated numbers. On a 12-topic, 5-domain benchmark, SAGE increases metrics-bearing outputs from 42% to 92% over a reflection baseline, improves artifact quality from 5.00 to 6.75/10, and blindly outscores AI-Scientist-v2 (52.0 vs. 48.2), with gains concentrated in code development and execution. While fully autonomous scientific writing and generating conference-ready papers remain notoriously difficult open problems for the entire field, SAGE successfully produces significantly more reliable and higher-quality scientific artifacts. Ultimately, by coupling structured recovery with explicit grounding constraints, SAGE significantly outperforms monolithic reflection paradigms, establishing a highly trustworthy foundation for future autonomous research.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一个自我纠正的自主实验者，通过多假设失败归因(MHFA)机制处理实验失败恢复问题。该方法将恢复视为结构化因果诊断，系统生成多个基于证据的失败解释，评估严重性，并将验证的根因定向到正确干预层。同时使用约束报告机制确保结果基于实际测量值。
AI.motivation: 当前自主研究代理在实验失败时的恢复能力脆弱。现行范式将丰富的指标、日志和设计选择轨迹压缩为单一反思，导致局部试错或丢弃有用信息的硬转向。SAGE旨在解决这一失败恢复瓶颈。
AI.method: 核心机制是多假设失败归因(MHFA)：1)分析动态轨迹特征；2)系统生成多个基于证据的失败解释；3)独立评估严重性；4)将验证的根因定向到正确干预层(假设、实验设计或实现)。此外使用约束报告机制将结果限制在实际测量值，删除幻觉数字。
AI.result: 在12个主题、5个领域的基准测试中：1)带指标输出从42%提升至92%；2)制品质量从5.00提升至6.75/10；3)盲测超越AI-Scientist-v2(52.0 vs 48.2)；4)收益集中在代码开发和执行环节。
AI.conclusion: 通过将结构化恢复与显式约束结合，SAGE显著优于单一反思范式，为未来自主研究建立了更可靠的基础。尽管完全自主的科学写作和生成会议就绪论文仍是开放问题，SAGE能产生更可靠和更高质量的科学制品。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous research agents and failure recovery mechanisms (SAGE system), which is in the AI/ML research automation domain - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has nothing to do with 3D visual guidance features, video-to-3D motion synthesis, Vision-Language Models for quality supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. Despite mentioning "multi-hypothesis failure attribution," this is about experiment debugging, not graphics or motion generation. The application domain is entirely different.

title: ExPLoRe: Expert Patch-Level Loss Routing for Multi-Objective Masked Image Modeling
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Main paper 15 pages, 3 figures; supplementary material included as appendix
summary: Multi-objective masked image modeling (MIM) combines complementary learning signals (token distillation, CLS alignment, and pixel reconstruction) but existing methods weight these objectives with global scalars, ignoring spatial heterogeneity across patches. We present ExPLoRe (Expert Patch-Level Loss Routing), which repurposes Soft Mixture of Experts (MoE) dispatch weights as learned, per-patch loss coefficients. The key mechanism is loss-coupling: allowing loss gradients to flow through dispatch weights to the router enables content-dependent specialization, where different patches receive different emphases across objectives. A detach ablation confirms loss-coupling as the core mechanism, degrading performance by 1.6% when gradients are blocked. On ImageNet-1K with ViT-Base, ExPLoRe improves over non-MoE baselines on two objective combinations (Token+CLS: +0.5% k-NN, +4.4% linear probe; Token+Pixel: +2.2% k-NN), achieving 80.6% linear probe and 85.3% finetuning accuracy, competitive with published methods. For downstream transfer, we develop adaptation recipes (Freeze Routing, Expert Dropout, and Freeze Attention) that improve MoE finetuning by +1.5% over the vanilla MoE, and close a 2.5--2.9 mIoU segmentation gap so that MoE models match or exceed non-MoE baselines on ADE20K.

AI.tldr: ExPLoRe提出了一种基于软专家混合(MoE)的patch级别损失路由方法,用于多目标掩码图像建模(MIM),通过损失耦合机制实现不同patch在不同目标上的内容依赖专业化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用全局标量权重来平衡多目标MIM中的不同学习信号( token蒸馏、CLS对齐、像素重建),忽略了patch之间的空间异质性,即不同区域可能需要不同的目标侧重。
AI.method: 将软MoE的dispatch权重重新利用为可学习的每patch损失系数,允许损失梯度流经dispatch权重到达路由器,实现内容依赖的专业化。提出三种适配 recipes: Freeze Routing、Expert Dropout和Freeze Attention。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上使用ViT-Base,相比非MoE基线在两种目标组合上均获得提升(Token+CLS: +0.5% k-NN, +4.4% linear probe; Token+Pixel: +2.2% k-NN),达到80.6% linear probe和85.3% finetuning准确率。在ADE20K上分割任务提升了+1.5%,弥补了2.5-2.9 mIoU的差距。
AI.conclusion: 损失耦合是核心机制(阻断梯度后性能下降1.6%),通过patch级别的损失路由可以有效捕捉空间异质性,MoE模型经适配后可匹配或超越非MoE基线。

relevance_reason: This paper is about masked image modeling for 2D image classification and segmentation (ImageNet, ADE20K), which is pure Computer Vision research. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video input, bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation. These are completely different application domains - the paper deals with 2D image representation learning while the profile requires 3D motion generation. Although the paper uses visual feature extraction, it's for 2D image understanding, not extracting 3D guidance features from video for motion synthesis. The methods (MoE-based MIM) are unrelated to Vision-Language Models, Video Generation Models, or 3D Motion Generation Models mentioned in the profile.

title: Surprise as a Signal for Plasticity and Metacognition
summary: We study a single idea across two settings: that a prediction-error signal, computed by a small predictor over the latent space of a frozen encoder, can serve both as a gate on plasticity and as a substrate for metacognition. In the first system, a non-parametric episodic memory writes a new concept only when this surprise is high, and a periodic offline replay phase consolidates recent traces into a slow linear readout. On a continual stream of 1000 ImageNet classes with a frozen DINOv2 or I-JEPA backbone, the consolidation phase recovers 17.7 points of retention on the oldest classes for DINOv2 and 51.3 points for I-JEPA (single-seed runs), and an ablation shows that replaying only a recent window is worse than no replay at all. In few-shot evaluation the same memory reaches 91.6% on 5-way 1-shot mini-ImageNet, above a task-specific baseline, while a harder 500-way regime exposes the true difficulty. In the second system, the same surprise signal, computed in a shared text-image space, modulates the behaviour of a vision-language model: it answers assertively when a concept is known, hedges when it is partially familiar, and refuses to identify the object and asks for an explanation when it is novel, learning the concept from a single user utterance. The external detector separates known from novel concepts at an AUROC of 0.966 (95% CI +/-0.024), far above the model's own verbalised confidence (0.618), while its token-level confidence sits below chance under greedy decoding; after a sleep phase that empties the fast store, the system recalls 99.2% of fifty taught facts from the consolidated store while a base model recovers none. We report both systems as proof-of-concept, with explicit limitations, and position the second against recent episodic-memory and personalised-VLM work.

AI.tldr: 研究提出一个基于预测误差信号的核心思想，该信号可作为可塑性门控和元认知的基底。系统一使用非参数情景记忆，仅在高惊讶度时写入新概念，通过离线回放巩固到慢速线性读出。在1000类ImageNet上，DINOv2和I-JEPA backbone分别恢复17.7和51.3点的旧类保留率。系统二在共享text-image空间中用同样信号调节VLM行为，根据熟悉程度给出断言/犹豫/拒绝回答的不同响应。外部检测器AUROC达0.966，远超模型自身置信度(0.618)。
AI.motivation: 核心动机：探索预测误差信号的双重功能——既作为 plasticity gate（可塑性门控），又作为 metacognition（元认知）的 substrate（基底）。作者希望构建能像人类一样知道"自己知道什么"的AI系统，在持续学习和知识整合中区分已知/部分熟悉/全新概念。
AI.method: 方法一（视觉任务）：使用冻结的DINOv2/I-JEPA编码器计算latent space上的预测误差作为surprise信号 → 非参数情景记忆只在高surprise时写入新概念 → 周期性离线replay将近期痕迹巩固到慢速线性读出。方法二（视觉-语言）：在共享text-image空间计算surprise信号 → 调节VLM行为：已知→断言回答；部分熟悉→犹豫回答；全新→拒绝并请求解释，从单次用户输入学习新概念。
AI.result: 视觉系统：DINOv2 backbone旧类保留恢复17.7点，I-JEPA恢复51.3点；ablation显示仅回放近期窗口比不回放更差；5-way 1-shot mini-ImageNet达91.6%。视觉-语言系统：外部检测器区分已知/新概念的AUROC=0.966 (95%CI±0.024)，远高于模型自身口头置信度0.618；greedy解码下token置信度低于 chance；睡眠清空fast store后，仍能回忆99.2%的50个已巩固事实，base model无法回忆。
AI.conclusion: 验证了预测误差信号可同时作为可塑性门控和元认知基底的两个proof-of-concept系统。系统能区分已知/部分熟悉/全新概念并自适应响应，在持续学习和知识巩固中展现类似人类"知道自己知道什么"的能力。局限性包括500-way regime暴露困难、token-level confidence低于chance等。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI metacognition, continuous learning, and concept recognition in Vision-Language Models - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While it uses Vision-Language Models, the application domain is entirely different: it's about building AI systems that can distinguish known/novel concepts and regulate responses accordingly, not about extracting 3D visual guidance features from video or generating 3D motion. The research profile focuses on bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation, while this paper focuses on cognitive science aspects of AI learning. No overlap in application domain whatsoever.

title: AC3S: Adaptive Conditioning for 3D-Aware Synthetic Data Generation
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page: https://ac3s.cvmlgroup.web.illinois.edu/
summary: Synthetic data generation has emerged as a powerful tool for improving data scalability in computer vision. Recent diffusion-based pipelines have demonstrated strong photorealism. However, how to enforce precise 3D structure and pose consistency in generated images remains challenging. Existing methods leverage visual prompts such as edge maps to guide diffusion models, but often suffer from over-conditioning artifacts that degrade image realism and limit dataset quality. In this paper, we present a diffusion-based image generation framework that enforces 3D structural alignment while preserving photorealism through adaptive conditioning. Our framework, Adaptive Conditioning for 3D-Aware Synthetic Data Generation (AC3S), introduces a self-supervised visual prompt modulator that dynamically adjusts the strength of ControlNet conditioning, preventing over-conditioning and enabling the diffusion model to retain its generative expressiveness. To further enhance diversity and semantic consistency, we develop a multi-agent vision language model framework that composes detailed and 3D-aware prompts aligned with the underlying geometric structure. Together, these components enable the scalable generation of high-quality synthetic datasets with accurate 2D and 3D annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves image quality and downstream utility.

AI.tldr: AC3S是一种基于扩散的3D感知合成数据生成框架，通过自适应调节机制解决生成图像中精确3D结构和姿态一致性的挑战，同时保持照片级真实感。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用边缘图等视觉提示引导扩散模型，但常因过度条件化导致图像质量下降，限制了数据集的可用性。如何在保持生成表现力的同时实现精确的3D结构对齐是核心问题。
AI.method: 提出两大核心组件：1) 自监督视觉提示调制器，动态调整ControlNet条件化强度，防止过度条件化；2) 多智能体视觉语言模型框架，生成与底层几何结构对齐的详细3D感知提示。
AI.result: 实现可扩展的高质量合成数据集生成，具备准确的2D和3D注释，显著提升图像质量和下游任务效用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持照片级真实感的同时有效解决了3D结构对齐问题，为计算机视觉数据扩展提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D-aware synthetic IMAGE generation for training data, while the research profile is about 3D MOTION synthesis from video input. Although both use similar methods (diffusion, VLM, ControlNet), the application domains are fundamentally different. The paper addresses image quality and 3D structure alignment in generated images, not 3D motion generation from video. This is a case of "similar methods but wrong application domain" - image generation vs motion synthesis are distinct areas in computer graphics.

title: Design and Implementation of Agentic Orchestrations and Orchestration of Agents
summary: Agentic Business Process Management has gained momentum recently. The prospect is that the autonomy of AI agents, i.e., predominantly LLM-based agents, can be balanced with a certain level of robustness, tractability, and traceability through a combination with process technology. In this paper, we provide a classification framework for agentic orchestration options along properties such as task specificity, traceability and tractability, autonomy and reactivity, and correctness assurance and present qualitative decision criteria for realizations of different scenarios. We also provide metrics for the quantitative assessment of realization properties and show them through different agentic implementations of a predictive light sensing scenario. Altogether, this work aims at providing properties, criteria, and metrics for the design and implementation of agentic orchestrations and orchestration of agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个分类框架，用于评估和设计基于LLM的AI代理在业务流程管理中的编排选项，提供了定性决策标准和定量评估指标，并通过预测光照传感场景演示了不同代理实现的评估方法。
AI.motivation: AI代理（尤其是基于LLM的代理）的自主性与业务流程的稳健性、可追踪性和可处理性之间需要平衡，结合流程技术来确保代理在业务流程中的有效应用。
AI.method: 提出分类框架，包含任务特异性、可追踪性/可处理性、自主性/响应性、正确性保证等属性；提供定性决策标准；定义定量评估指标；通过预测光照传感场景的多个代理实现进行演示。
AI.result: 建立了代理编排选项的分类框架，提供了属性、决策标准和度量指标，为代理业务流程管理的设计与实现提供系统化指导。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为代理业务流程管理领域提供了系统的属性、决策标准和度量工具，支持在业务流程中有效整合AI代理的编排设计与实现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based AI agent orchestration in business process management, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video, Vision-Language Models for visual tasks, and video generation models - while this paper addresses agent autonomy and process management in business workflows. There is no application domain match (Computer Graphics vs Business Process Management), no 3D motion generation, no visual feature extraction, and no video generation - only a superficial mention of "agents" in a different context.

title: AA: A Multi-view Multimodal Dataset for Screen-based Gaze Estimation
summary: We present AA, a multi-view multimodal dataset for screen-based gaze estimation. The dataset captures synchronized facial observations from eight fixed screen-mounted cameras and two additional side-view cameras, paired with precise screen-space gaze targets collected under controlled fixation conditions. Each sample contains multi-view face observations together with structured facial region crops, enabling multimodal learning from both global and local visual cues. Unlike existing single-view gaze datasets, AA provides multi-view coverage from both screen-mounted and side-mounted perspectives, enabling more robust modeling under viewpoint variation and occlusion. The dataset includes subject-independent evaluation splits and a standardized data processing pipeline to support reproducible research in gaze estimation.

AI.tldr: AA是一个用于屏幕注视估计的多视角多模态数据集，包含8个屏幕固定摄像头和2个侧视摄像头捕获的同步面部观测数据，配有精确的屏幕空间注视目标。
AI.motivation: 现有单视角注视估计数据集无法有效处理视角变化和遮挡问题，缺乏多视角覆盖以支持更鲁棒的模型训练。
AI.method: 使用8个屏幕固定摄像头和2个侧视摄像头同步捕获面部观测，配合受控固定条件下的精确屏幕空间注视目标，包含多视角面部观测和结构化面部区域crop。
AI.result: 提供多视角覆盖（屏幕安装和侧视视角），支持在视角变化和遮挡条件下进行更鲁棒的建模，包含主体无关评估分割和标准化数据处理流程。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集支持可重现的注视估计研究，为多视角多模态 gaze estimation提供了标准化基准。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper is about screen-based gaze estimation (estimating where someone is looking on a screen), which is a computer vision task. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. These are fundamentally different application domains. While both deal with visual data, gaze estimation has no connection to 3D motion generation or synthesis - it's about eye tracking, not motion synthesis.

title: A time-series classification framework for individual-level absenteeism prediction under severe class imbalance
summary: Staff absenteeism imposes substantial operational costs in high-demand work environments such as healthcare, emergency services, meat processing, construction, and courier and delivery services, where proactive workforce planning depends on reliable individual-level absence prediction. Existing regression and classification approaches share a structural limitation; they map features observed at time t to labels at the same time t, reproducing already-realised outcomes rather than predicting future events, and discard the sequential behavioural structure inherent in individual attendance histories. We propose a Time Series Classification (TSC) framework that separates historical attendance sequences from future absence labels, enabling genuinely proactive prediction. Due to the lack of public longitudinal attendance data, we construct a reproducible simulated dataset calibrated to the UCI dataset. We analyse Binary Focal Loss (BFL) and Geometric Mean (G-Mean) loss under severe class imbalance using only the imbalance ratio $ρ$. For BFL, the initial gradient ratio is $ρα/(1-α)$, implying the balanced weight $α= 1/(1+ρ) \approx 0.023$. Experiments show that performance is governed mainly by $α$, with BFL achieving specificity 0.813 and balanced accuracy 0.888, comparable to G-Mean. Unlike BFL, G-Mean adapts automatically without parameter calibration. Among three deep learning architectures evaluated, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), and the hybrid LSTM-Fully Convolutional Network (LSTM-FCN), the LSTM-FCN delivers strong precision and specificity. Stable performance is obtained with batch sizes >= 64 and window sizes between 40-80 days, yielding balanced accuracy of approximately 80% on held-out test data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时间序列分类(TSC)框架，用于预测员工缺勤情况。与传统方法不同，该框架将历史考勤序列与未来缺勤标签分离，实现真正的主动预测。针对严重类别不平衡问题，分析了二元焦损失(BFL)和几何平均(G-Mean)损失，并评估了LSTM、CNN和LSTM-FCN三种深度学习架构。
AI.motivation: 现有回归和分类方法存在结构性局限：它们将时间t观察到的特征映射到同一时间t的标签，重现已发生的结果而非预测未来事件，且丢弃了个人考勤历史中的顺序行为结构。在医疗、急救、肉类加工、快递等高需求工作环境中，员工缺勤造成重大运营成本，迫切需要可靠的个体层面缺勤预测。
AI.method: 1.构建了基于UCI数据集校准的可复现模拟数据集；2.分析了BFL和G-Mean在严重类别不平衡下的表现，仅使用不平衡比率ρ；3.对于BFL，初始梯度比率为ρα/(1-α)，得出平衡权重α=1/(1+ρ)≈0.023；4.评估了三种深度学习架构：LSTM、CNN和LSTM-FCN；5.实验参数：批量大小≥64，窗口大小40-80天。
AI.result: BFL实现特异性0.813，平衡准确率0.888，与G-Mean相当。G-Mean无需参数校准即可自动适应。三种架构中，LSTM-FCN提供较强的精确率和特异性。稳定性能下平衡准确率约为80%。
AI.conclusion: BFL和G-Mean在严重类别不平衡下表现相当，性能主要由α决定；LSTM-FCN在缺勤预测任务中表现最优；批量大小≥64和窗口大小40-80天可获得稳定性能；G-Mean的优势在于无需手动校准参数。

relevance_reason: This paper is about employee absenteeism prediction using time-series classification (LSTM, CNN), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is workforce management/HR, not 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or any computer graphics task. While it uses sequence models (LSTM, CNN), these methods are applied to predicting attendance patterns, not 3D motion generation. The pain points and methods are entirely different from the research profile.

title: CooperScene: Multi-Modal Cooperative Autonomy Benchmark with C-V2X Communication Characterization
summary: Cellular vehicle-to-everything (C-V2X) enables cooperative perception, prediction, and planning beyond the field of view of individual agents. However, existing datasets often overlook the complexities of real-world deployment, such as limited communication bandwidth and its dynamics, heterogeneous sensing modalities, and scalability beyond a single cooperative partner. In this paper, we introduce CooperScene, a high-fidelity cooperative autonomy dataset with real-world C-V2X communication characterization. The dataset is organized into diverse scenes, including intersections, highway ramps, and parking lots. These scenes involve three connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) and one infrastructure roadside unit (RSU), all equipped with multi-modal sensors and commercial off-the-shelf C-V2X communication radios. All scenes are annotated with globally consistent 3D labels at 10 Hz, totaling 344K objects across 59K frames, underpinned by tight sensor- and agent-synchronization, centimeter-level localization and spatial alignment, precise cross-modality calibration, and 3GPP-standard-compliant C-V2X communication. CooperScene establishes a rigorous benchmark for evaluating multi-agent scaling and actual performance in real-world deployable settings. Project website for data and benchmark: https://cisl.ucr.edu/CooperScene

AI.tldr: CooperScene是一个高保真协作自动驾驶数据集，包含真实世界的C-V2X通信特征。该数据集涵盖交叉口、高速公路匝道和停车场等场景，包含3辆联网自动驾驶车辆(CAV)和1个基础设施路侧单元(RSU)，配备多模态传感器和商用C-V2X通信无线电。数据集包含344K个3D标注对象横跨59K帧，频率为10Hz。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集往往忽视现实世界部署的复杂性，如有限的通信带宽及其动态变化、异构传感模式以及超越单个合作伙伴的可扩展性。需要一个高保真数据集来评估多智能体扩展和实际部署性能。
AI.method: 数据集包含3辆CAV和1个RSU，全部配备多模态传感器和商用C-V2X通信无线电。实现了紧密的传感器和智能体同步、厘米级定位和空间对齐、精确的跨模态校准，以及符合3GPP标准的C-V2X通信。
AI.result: 构建了包含344K个3D标注对象横跨59K帧的数据集，标注频率为10Hz，涵盖交叉口、高速公路匝道和停车场等多样化场景。
AI.conclusion: CooperScene为评估多智能体扩展和真实世界可部署设置中的实际性能建立了严格基准，为协作感知、预测和规划研究提供了重要数据支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cooperative autonomous driving datasets with C-V2X communication, not Computer Graphics or 3D motion synthesis. The application domain is completely different - it's focused on autonomous vehicles and transportation, not on generating 3D motion from video. The methods (C-V2X communication, sensor synchronization) have no overlap with the research profile's methods (VLM, video generation models, 3D motion generation). This is essentially a paper about self-driving car datasets and vehicle-to-infrastructure communication, which is unrelated to the computer graphics task of extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors.

title: Modality-Driven Search with Holistic Trace Judging for ARC-AGI-2
comment: 37 pages, 4 figures; source code available at https://github.com/beetree/ARC-AGI
summary:
Large language models can produce fluent, internally coherent reasoning traces for abstract reasoning tasks while still being confidently wrong - making selection among candidates, not just generation, the central challenge. I present a solver for ARC-AGI-2, a few-shot visual reasoning benchmark, built around two principles: (i) treating reasoning modalities as search operators, generating diverse candidates independently across text, image, and code channels, and (ii) context-preserving holistic judging, in which a judge model jointly compares all candidate reasoning traces within a single long-context prompt. Unlike self-consistency or majority voting, this approach reliably recovers correct minority hypotheses on tasks where the modal answer is wrong.
  On the ARC Prize semi-private evaluation set, the solver achieves 72.9 percent at USD 38.99 per task - the highest score on the verified leaderboard at the time of writing, exceeding the best standalone frontier models, GPT-5.2 Pro at 54.2 percent and Gemini 3 Pro at 54.0 percent, by +18.7 percentage points. On the public evaluation set, it achieves 76.1 percent at USD 19.69 per task. I release the full source code and document extensive negative results, including the finding that prescriptive prompting templates and iterative refinement systematically reduce hypothesis diversity and degrade performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于ARC-AGI-2（少样本视觉推理基准）的求解器，通过将推理模态视为搜索算子，并在单一长上下文提示中对所有候选推理轨迹进行联合评判，实现了72.9%的准确率（USD 38.99/任务），显著超越GPT-5.2 Pro和Gemini 3 Pro。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在抽象推理任务中虽然能产生流畅且内部一致的推理痕迹，但仍可能自信地犯错，因此从候选答案中选择正确解成为核心挑战。现有方法如自一致性或多数投票无法可靠地恢复正确的少数假设。
AI.method: 提出两种原则：(1)将推理模态视为搜索算子，在文本、图像和代码通道中独立生成多样化候选；(2)上下文保留的整体评判，在单一长上下文提示中联合比较所有候选推理轨迹。不同于自一致性或多数投票，该方法能在模态答案错误时可靠地恢复正确的少数假设。
AI.result: 在ARC Prize半私有评估集上达到72.9%（USD 38.99/任务），超越GPT-5.2 Pro（54.2%）和Gemini 3 Pro（54.0%）18.7个百分点。在公共评估集上达到76.1%（USD 19.69/任务）。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现规范性提示模板和迭代细化会系统性地降低假设多样性并导致性能下降。该求解器在验证排行榜上取得最高分，发布了完整源代码并记录了大量负面结果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about abstract visual reasoning (ARC-AGI benchmark) - solving visual puzzles using LLMs with multi-modal reasoning. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, visual feature extraction, and video-to-3D motion generation. While both mention Vision-Language Models, the application domain is entirely different - abstract reasoning puzzles vs. 3D computer graphics motion synthesis. The pain points, methods, and goals are completely mismatched.

title: ForgeDrive: Bidirectional Cross-Conditioning for Unified Visual-Action Generation in Autonomous Driving
summary: World-model-based autonomous driving endows the model with the ability to understand scene evolution. Yet this promise is undermined by the prevailing imagine-then-act paradigm, which allows errors from the more challenging visual generation stage to cascade into action planning. We introduce ForgeDrive, a unified autoregressive diffusion framework with visual-action cross-conditioning that closes this gap through act-then-imagine paradigm. ForgeDrive factorizes the future as a sequence of per-timestep frame-action pairs, intertwining each action with its corresponding visual observation. During training, we decouple the diffusion timesteps of the two modalities and introduce a UniDiffuser-style noise scheduler to get the ability to infer either modality from its counterpart and deepen understanding of relationships between images and actions. At inference, we propose a novel act-then-imagine inference paradigm, and find that at each step, action generation is a capability internalized during training, requiring no clean future frame as a prerequisite at inference time; instead, the generated action can improve the accuracy of future frame generation, which in turn enhances the quality of the next action. Additionally, we augment each step with future ego-status prediction, further sharpening planning ability. Extensive experiments on NAVSIM demonstrate that ForgeDrive not only unifies driving simulation, planning, and visual odometry into a single model, but also outperforms existing strong planners without any post-training strategy.

AI.tldr: ForgeDrive是一个统一的自回归扩散框架，采用"先行动后想象"范式，将未来分解为每时间步的帧-动作对，实现视觉-动作交叉条件化，在NAVSIM上无需后训练策略即超越现有强规划器。
AI.motivation: 现有基于世界模型的自动驾驶采用"先想象后行动"范式，视觉生成阶段的误差会级联到动作规划中，阻碍了模型理解场景演化的能力。
AI.method: 1)将未来分解为每时间步的帧-动作对，实现视觉与动作的交织；2)训练时解耦两模态的扩散时间步，采用UniDiffuser风格的噪声调度器；3)推理时提出"先行动后想象"范式，每步生成的动作可提升下一帧生成质量，反之亦然；4)每步增强未来自我状态预测。
AI.result: ForgeDrive将驾驶模拟、规划 和视觉里程计统一于单一模型，在NAVSIM上无需任何后训练策略即超越现有强规划器。
AI.conclusion: 通过"先行动后想象"范式和视觉-动作交叉条件化，ForgeDrive成功闭合了视觉生成与动作规划之间的误差级联问题，为自动驾驶世界模型提供了一种更有效的统一框架。

relevance_reason: The paper is about autonomous driving (vehicle motion planning and visual generation), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics and 3D character motion synthesis. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different - this is robotics/autonomous vehicles, not computer graphics or human motion generation. The pain points mentioned (3D motion synthesis from video, bridging 2D video to 3D motion for graphics) are not addressed by this paper about driving scenarios.

title: ACE: Pluggable Adaptive Context Elasticizer across Agents
summary: The increasing complexity of agentic tasks has led to rapidly growing trajectory lengths, which poses significant challenges for large language model (LLM) based agents with fixed context windows. Existing context management techniques, such as truncation and summarization, suffer from inherent inflexibility and irreversibility: once information is discarded or compressed, it cannot be recovered even when it becomes critically relevant in later decision steps. To address these limitations, we propose the Adaptive Context Elasticizer (ACE), a plug-and-play module that elastically orchestrates historical step information into the agent's context at each decision step. ACE maintains a lossless message maintenance layer that stores both raw messages and compressed abstractions for each historical step, while a context orchestration layer adaptively assigns each step an elastic type as raw, abstract, or drop, at every decision step based on the current task state. This reversible design ensures that the main LLM always receives a compact yet information-rich context. We adapt ACE to four diverse agent frameworks, including ReAct, DeepAgent, WebThinker, and MiroFlow, without training or architectural modifications. Experiments show that ACE consistently outperforms truncation and summarization baselines, and brings consistent performance gains across all four agent frameworks.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应上下文弹性器(ACE)模块,解决大型语言模型智能体在处理长轨迹任务时受限于固定上下文窗口的问题,可动态调整历史步骤信息在上下文中的呈现方式。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体任务复杂度增加,轨迹长度快速增长,现有上下文管理技术(如截断和摘要)存在固有的不灵活性和不可逆性:一旦信息被丢弃或压缩,即使后续决策步骤变得关键相关也无法恢复。
AI.method: ACE采用即插即用模块设计,包含无损消息维护层(存储原始消息和压缩抽象)和上下文编排层(基于当前任务状态为每个历史步骤动态分配弹性类型:原始、抽象或丢弃)。该设计具有可逆性,确保主LLM始终收到紧凑但信息丰富的上下文。ACE可适配四种智能体框架(ReAct、DeepAgent、WebThinker、MiroFlow),无需训练或架构修改。
AI.result: 实验表明,ACE始终优于截断和摘要基线方法,并在所有四种智能体框架上带来一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ACE通过可逆的自适应上下文管理机制,有效解决了LLM智能体在长轨迹任务中的上下文窗口限制问题,且具有良好的通用性和实用性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agent context management for long trajectory tasks, not Computer Graphics or 3D motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, Vision-Language Models for 3D tasks, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. This paper addresses none of these - it's about text-based LLM agent frameworks (ReAct, DeepAgent, WebThinker, MiroFlow) and context window handling, which is in the NLP/AI systems domain, completely separate from computer graphics and motion generation.

title: UHD-MFF: Shattering Barriers in Multi-Focus Ultra-High-Definition Image Fusion via Learnable Lookup Tables
summary: With the advancement of imaging technology, ultra-high-definition images have become increasingly essential in modern visual applications. However, existing multi-focus image fusion remains largely confined to low-resolution images and faces three major barriers in UHD scenarios, namely data availability, model adaptability, and deployment feasibility, which severely hinder its practical application. To shatter these barriers, first, we propose the UHD-MFF dataset, the first large-scale ultra-high-resolution multi-focus fusion dataset. Second, we propose a scale-specialized lookup-table framework tailored for ultra-high-resolution images, termed as UMF-LUT. It consists of Coarse-Region Lookup Table (C-LUT) and Detail-Edge Lookup Table (D-LUT). Specifically, C-LUT performs joint queries of multiple gradient cues and semantic cues at low-resolution scales to enable region-level decision-making. Also, D-LUT operates at high-resolution scales, leveraging efficient Laplacian cues to provide complementary edge-level decision information. Such a design makes the model particularly well-suited for ultra-high-resolution multi-focus image fusion. Finally, it offers strong deployability with minimal computational overhead, enabling real-time 4K multi-focus fusion and showing promising potential for smartphone. Extensive experiments demonstrate that it outperforms SOTA methods in both visual fidelity and quantitative metrics. It effectively advances the development of multi-focus image fusion toward ultra-high-resolution imaging scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/zyb5/UHD-MFF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UHD-MFF数据集和UMF-LUT框架，解决超高清多焦点图像融合中的数据可用性、模型适应性和部署可行性三大障碍，实现实时4K图像融合。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率多焦点图像融合方法面临三大障碍：数据可用性（缺乏大规模超高清数据集）、模型适应性（现有方法无法有效处理4K及以上分辨率）和部署可行性（计算开销大难以实时应用）
AI.method: 提出UHD-MFF数据集（首个大规模超高清多焦点融合数据集）和UMF-LUT框架（包含C-LUT粗粒度查找表和D-LUT细节边缘查找表）。C-LUT在低分辨率尺度进行多梯度线索和语义线索的联合查询实现区域级决策；D-LUT在高分辨率尺度利用拉普拉斯线索提供边缘级决策信息
AI.result: 在视觉质量和定量指标上优于SOTA方法，具有低计算开销，可实现实时4K多焦点融合，在智能手机上也有良好应用前景
AI.conclusion: 有效推动多焦点图像融合向超高清成像场景发展，代码已开源

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about multi-focus ultra-high-definition image fusion (combining images with different focus depths), while the research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video, video generation models, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. Even though both are in computer vision, the specific domain (image fusion vs. motion generation) is entirely different. The methods are also unrelated - this uses LUT-based image fusion while the profile needs VLM, video generation models, and 3D motion generation.

title: Which Tokens Matter? Adaptive Token Selection for RLVR with the Relative Surprisal Index
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a powerful tool for propelling Large Language Models (LLMs) beyond imitation-based training towards more robust reasoning capabilities. Among existing approaches, RL with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a pivotal paradigm for advancing LLM reasoning. Despite its empirical success, recent studies have offered different insights. One line of inquiry advocates prioritizing high-entropy token positions during training, while another perspective cautions against allowing low-probability tokens to dominate gradient updates. Notably, although high-entropy tokens are usually correlated with low probability, both paradigms empirically yield substantial performance gains. In this work, we argue that evaluating sampled-token probability or entropy in isolation is insufficient to capture the policy optimization dynamics. To resolve this tension, we introduce the Relative Surprisal Index (RSI), a principled, information-theoretic metric that naturally couples the token's entropy with the probability of the selected token. We show that, under mild conditions, RSI is related to the local ratio between the first-order variations of the logit-gradient norm and predictive entropy under a selected-logit perturbation. Building on RSI, we propose RSI Selection (RSI-S), an entropy-adaptive token filtering method that retains tokens within a stable RSI interval. RSI-S successfully reconciles previous contradictory paradigms and filters out both redundant low-surprisal tokens and unstable high-surprisal tail tokens. Empirical evaluations show that RSI-S achieves higher avg@32 accuracy across different model scales (Qwen2.5-1.5B, 3B, and 7B) on AIME and AMC benchmarks: RSI-S improves avg@32 accuracy by 2--3 percentage points over GRPO. Overall, RSI offers a promising perspective for RLVR improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RSI（相对惊讶指数）来解决RLVR中关于高熵和低概率token的矛盾观点，通过信息论方法耦合token熵与选择概率，并基于RSI提出RSI-S过滤方法，在AIME和AMC基准上相比GRPO提升2-3个百分点。
AI.motivation: RLVR已成为推进LLM推理的重要范式，但现有研究对高熵token和低概率token的训练权重存在矛盾观点：一派主张优先训练高熵位置，另一派反对低概率token主导梯度更新。这种矛盾源于单独评估采样token概率或熵的局限性。
AI.method: 提出相对惊讶指数(RSI)作为信息论度量，将token熵与所选token概率自然耦合；在温和条件下，RSI与logit梯度范数一阶变化和预测熵的局部比率相关；基于RSI提出RSI-S（RSI选择）方法，保留稳定RSI区间的token。
AI.result: RSI-S成功调和了先前矛盾的范式，过滤掉冗余低惊讶token和不稳定高惊讶尾token；在Qwen2.5-1.5B、3B和7B模型上，RSI-S在AIME和AMC基准上实现更高的avg@32准确率，比GRPO提升2-3个百分点。
AI.conclusion: RSI为RLVR改进提供了有前景的视角，通过信息论方法统一了此前关于高熵和低概率token的矛盾观点，RSI-S作为熵自适应token过滤方法能有效提升LLM推理能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) and token selection for improving LLM reasoning on math benchmarks (AIME, AMC). This is entirely in the NLP/ML domain, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile specifically requires 3D motion synthesis, video generation, visual feature extraction, and multi-modal learning for bridging 2D video to 3D motion. There is zero application domain match - this paper addresses LLM optimization, not computer graphics or 3D motion generation.

title: HyperVLP: Enhancing Hierarchical Surgical Video-Language Pre-training in Hyperbolic Space
summary: Surgical vision-language foundation models typically adopt educational materials, such as surgical lecture videos, to transfer surgical knowledge encoded in language into visual representations. These knowledge are multi-dimensional and hierarchical: fine-grained action cues appear in narration, mid-level key steps are summarized in subsection headings, and global procedural context, such as patient history and surgical strategy, is described in abstract texts. Prior work largely collapses these heterogeneous signals into a single flat embedding space, implicitly assuming independence across hierarchy levels. However, this is suboptimal because it ignores cross-level semantic containment, e.g., actions belong to steps, steps compose phases, weakens long-range dependency modeling. To this end, we propose a hyperbolic surgical video-language pre-training framework that explicitly preserves the hierarchical structure by mitigating structural false negatives induced by procedural context and enforcing semantic consistency between parent phases and their constituent child steps. Extensive experiments on multiple surgical benchmarks show consistent gains in zero- and few-shot phase recognition across procedures and institutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双曲（双曲空间）手术视频-语言预训练框架，用于解决现有方法将手术教育材料中的多层次知识（动作、步骤、阶段）简单压缩到单一平面嵌入空间的问题。该框架通过缓解程序上下文引起的结构假负样本并强制父阶段与子步骤之间的语义一致性来显式保留层次结构。实验表明在多个手术基准上实现了显著的零样本和少样本阶段识别性能提升。
AI.motivation: 手术教育材料包含多维度层次化知识：细粒度动作线索出现在旁白中、中层关键步骤总结在小节标题中、全局程序上下文（如患者病史和手术策略）描述在摘要文本中。然而，现有工作将这些异构信号折叠到单一平面嵌入空间中，隐式假设各层次独立，这忽略了跨层次语义包含关系（如动作属于步骤、步骤组成阶段），削弱了长程依赖建模能力。
AI.method: 提出双曲手术视频-语言预训练框架。核心思路：1) 利用双曲空间更好地建模层次化结构；2) 缓解由程序上下文引起的结构假负样本问题；3) 强制执行父阶段与其子步骤之间的语义一致性。模型显式保留层次结构而非简单平面化。
AI.result: 在多个手术基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，跨手术类型和机构实现了零样本和少样本阶段识别的一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了显式建模手术知识的层次结构对于视频-语言预训练的重要性。双曲空间能够有效捕捉层次化语义关系，为手术视觉-语言基础模型的预训练提供了一种新的范式，在迁移学习和少样本场景下具有显著优势。

relevance_reason: This paper is about surgical video-language pre-training for medical phase recognition, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While both involve video and language models, the application domains are entirely different: the paper addresses medical/surgical education, not 3D motion generation from video. The pain points, methods' purposes, and end goals have no overlap - this is a medical AI paper, not a computer graphics or 3D motion synthesis paper.

title: Scientific Explanations in Health Sciences: Causality, Trust, and Epistemic Adequacy
summary: Medical Artificial Intelligence (AI) is widely expected to transform clinical practice, yet the decision-making processes of many Machine Learning (ML) models remain opaque. Explainability has been advanced as a partial remedy to clarify why AI generates predictions, particularly in high-stakes contexts. Despite ongoing efforts, debates on what constitutes an adequate medical explanation remain unsettled. Yet, explanation has long been a central topic of inquiry in the philosophy of science and medicine. The insights developed in these fields, however, have been largely overlooked in contemporary explainable AI (XAI) research, leaving its foundational assumptions insufficiently examined. To address this gap, this paper develops a critical review at the intersection of philosophy of science and XAI. It examines prevailing accounts of what counts as an explanation in the health sciences and assesses their adequacy for informing XAI in medicine, arguing that they provide necessary conditions for a philosophically grounded approach to explainability in this domain. Building on this foundational philosophical literature, the discussion identifies three central axes of analysis: the role of causality in medical reasoning, the epistemic and relational dimensions of medical trust, and the criteria of explanatory adequacy as shaped by the pragmatic needs of diverse stakeholders. By integrating philosophical analysis with current developments in medical AI, the paper outlines principles for designing XAI systems that offer explanations that are not only epistemically robust but also aligned with the epistemic and practical requirements of clinical decision-making, shaping ongoing debates in medical XAI toward underexplored conceptual foundations.

AI.tldr: 本文批判性地审视了哲学科学与可解释人工智能(XAI)交叉领域的医学解释问题，指出当前XAI研究忽视了哲学传统中对解释的本质探讨，并基于哲学文献提出了医学可解释性设计的三个核心分析轴。
AI.motivation: 医学AI虽被广泛预期将改变临床实践，但其决策过程不透明。尽管可解释性被视为补救措施，但关于何为充分医学解释的争论仍未解决，而哲学科学和医学中对解释的长期研究在当代XAI中未被重视。
AI.method: 采用批判性综述方法，审视健康科学中关于何为解释的流行观点，评估其对医学XAI的适用性，并整合哲学分析与当前医学AI发展。
AI.result: 识别出三个核心分析轴：1)因果关系在医学推理中的作用；2)医学信任的认知和关系维度；3)由不同利益相关者实际需求塑造的解释充分性标准。
AI.conclusion: 为设计XAI系统提供原则，使其提供不仅在认知上稳健而且符合临床决策认知和实践要求的解释，为医学XAI的持续争论奠定概念基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The application domain is healthcare/medical informatics, which has no connection to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics, 3D motion synthesis from video, or video generation models. The methods discussed (philosophical analysis, critical review) are entirely different from the required Vision-Language Models, video generation models, and 3D motion generation models. This paper does not address any of the pain points related to extracting 3D visual features from 2D video or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation.

title: Rethinking the Role of Feature Engineering and Learning Strategies in Few-Shot Hidden Emotion Recognition
summary: In this paper, we present the solution developed by our team, XInsight Lab, which achieved first place in Track 3 of the 4th EI-MIGA-IJCAI Challenge with a test accuracy of 0.76923. To address the challenge of weak and sparse implicit emotion evidence in long videos, this paper extends the winning solution from the previous competition and proposes a compact multi-modal temporal modeling framework. The framework integrates and evaluates the effects of multi-source features, including 2D/3D skeletons, facial expression Blendshapes, DINOv2/v3 vision foundation models, X-CLIP video features, and Gemini semantic priors. Architecturally, we propose a cross-attention mechanism that utilizes static pose features, denoted as Base, as the Query and dynamic micro-motion differential features, denoted as Offset, as the Key and Value. By capturing local relative velocities, this mechanism eliminates static biases related to individual body shape and identity. Concurrently, an adaptive pooling method based on Multiple Instance Learning is employed to extract instantaneous emotions while suppressing background noise in long sequences. Finally, the paper reveals the representation collapse phenomenon of general vision foundation models in micro-dynamic tasks, and analyzes the underlying mechanisms where networks fall into public-leaderboard-driven pseudo-generalization due to shortcut learning and rote memorization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了XInsight Lab团队在4th EI-MIGA-IJCAI Challenge Track 3中夺冠的解决方案，通过紧凑的多模态时序建模框架，结合2D/3D骨骼、面部Blendshapes、DINOv2/v3、X-CLIP和Gemini等多源特征，实现0.76923的测试准确率，并揭示了通用视觉基础模型在微动态任务中的表征崩溃现象。
AI.motivation: 解决长视频中隐含情感证据微弱且稀疏的难题，提升微动态情感识别性能
AI.method: 提出紧凑多模态时序建模框架：(1)跨注意力机制-静态姿态(Base)作为Query，动态微运动差分特征(Offset)作为Key/Value；(2)基于多实例学习的自适应池化方法提取瞬时情绪并抑制背景噪声
AI.result: 测试准确率达0.76923，夺得Track 3冠军
AI.conclusion: 验证了多源特征融合的有效性，揭示了通用视觉基础模型在微动态任务中的表征崩溃现象和 shortcut learning、rot memorization 导致的伪泛化问题

The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from video input, but this paper addresses a completely different application domain: affective computing. Even though both deal with video, the goal is entirely different - one synthesizes 3D motion, the other recognizes emotions. This is an example of using similar methods in different application domains.

title: Think in English, Answer in Korean: Efficient Adaptation of Multilingual Tool-Using Agents
summary: We present LuckyStar 111B, a 111B-parameter hybrid reasoning model developed through a collaboration between Cohere and LG CNS for Korean-English enterprise agents under practical memory and serving constraints. The model trains from Cohere's fully post-trained Command A model rather than a new pretraining run, and uses preamble conditioning to switch between concise non-reasoning behavior and longer tool-oriented reasoning. We study four choices for scaling tool-using agents efficiently: multilingual supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards for multi-step tool-use tasks, language-consistency rewards for Korean user-facing responses, and 4-bit quantization for single-GPU serving. The adapted model improves mathematical reasoning, function calling, and agentic natural-language-to-SQL (NL2SQL) performance while preserving general Korean and English instruction-following quality. These results provide a practical recipe and failure-mode analysis for adapting post-trained multilingual models to verifiable agentic workflows under memory-constrained deployment.

AI.tldr: LuckyStar 111B是由Cohere和LG CNS合作开发的111B参数混合推理模型，专门针对韩英企业代理场景，在有限内存和服务约束下进行优化。该模型基于Command A进行后训练，使用 preamble conditioning 在简洁非推理行为和工具导向推理之间切换。
AI.motivation: 在实用内存和服务限制下，为韩英企业代理开发高效的混合推理模型，并解决多语言模型在代理工作流中的适配问题。
AI.method: 1) 基于完全后训练的Command A模型进行训练；2) 使用preamble conditioning实现推理模式切换；3) 研究四种扩展工具使用代理的方案：多语言监督微调、基于可验证奖励的强化学习、韩语语言一致性奖励、以及4-bit量化单GPU服务。
AI.result: 模型在数学推理、函数调用和NL2SQL任务上取得显著提升，同时保持了通用的韩英指令跟随能力。
AI.conclusion: 为在内存约束部署环境下将后训练多语言模型适配至可验证代理工作流提供了实用方案和失败模式分析。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multilingual LLM agents for Korean-English enterprise tasks (tool use, reasoning, NL2SQL), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, Vision-Language Models for quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. This paper addresses NLP/LLM tasks with no visual or graphics components whatsoever. It uses general LLMs, not Vision-Language Models or 3D motion generation models.

title: Decodable Is Not Grounded: A Vision-Ablation Arbiter for VLM Spatial Reasoning
summary: The standard way to read latent knowledge out of a model, a linear probe confirmed by a steering recovery, can systematically overstate what a vision-language model (VLM) actually grounds in the image. We show this on spatial reasoning, where the error is invisible to both probing and steering yet exposed by a one-line causal control: replacing the image with a gray blank. Probes decode the within-axis answer at 73--97% across axes, and a training-free projection lifts a near-chance axis from 59% to 79%, exactly the signature of unlocking latent knowledge. The blank-image arbiter refutes it, revealing three grounding regimes that probing conflates: an axis can be grounded (vision-dependent, correct), a prior (vision-independent, with its decode and its apparent recovery a directional default rather than perception), or, surprisingly, inverted: decodable, causally controllable, but deployed with the wrong sign, so the model scores below chance and the error requires looking. The taxonomy holds across the studied VLMs: in fourteen models spanning six language-model families and 2B--27B, horizontal is grounded, vertical is a prior, and depth is inverted, with the inversion emerging at scale within families. The decode-versus-deploy inversion replicates on seven of eight models across five families, and the minimal edit that re-deploys it varies with geometry: a training-free rotation matches a trained edit on the cleanest model, while distributed inversions need a trained low-rank edit, tracing a per-model correction-complexity spectrum. The cheap, self-calibrating arbiter cleanly separates grounded perception, inverted perception, and prior substitution; we argue it should be a default control for latent-knowledge and steering claims in VLMs.

AI.tldr: 线性探针和 steering recovery 方法可能系统性地高估视觉语言模型（VLM）在图像中实际 grounded 的信息。通过用灰色空白图像替换原图这一简单控制，可以揭示三种 grounding 机制：grounded（视觉依赖、正确）、prior（视觉独立、使用默认方向而非感知）、inverted（可解码但部署符号错误，低于随机准确率）。在 14 个模型（6 个家族，2B-27B）中，水平方向是 grounded，垂直方向是 prior，深度是 inverted。7/8 模型出现 inversion。不同模型需要不同复杂度的校正方法。空白图像控制应成为 VLM 潜伏知识研究的标准对照。
AI.motivation: 解决线性探针和 steering recovery 方法可能系统性地高估 VLM 在图像中实际 grounded 信息的问题，特别是在空间推理任务中
AI.method: 使用因果控制方法：用灰色空白图像替换原图，测试模型预测是否依赖视觉输入；分析 14 个跨 6 个语言模型家族的 VLM
AI.result: 识别出三种 grounding 机制：grounded（视觉依赖正确）、prior（视觉独立使用默认方向）、inverted（解码但部署符号错误，低于随机）；水平 grounded，垂直 prior，深度 inverted；14 个模型中 inversion 在 7/8 个模型中复现；不同模型需要不同复杂度的校正方法
AI.conclusion: 空白图像控制方法能清晰区分 grounded 感知、inverted 感知和 prior 替换，应作为 VLM 潜伏知识和 steering 声明的标准对照方法

title: FARS: A Fully Automated Research System Deployed at Scale
summary: Recent automated research systems show that language-model agents can generate hypotheses, run experiments, and write complete manuscripts, but most evidence still comes from selected examples, human-framed topics, or a few pre-defined research tasks. We present FARS (Fully Automated Research System), a fully automated AI-for-AI research system designed to operate across research topics at scale. FARS autonomously generates and advances projects through ideation, planning, experimentation, and writing, using stage-specific agents coordinated through a shared workspace that records proposals, code, logs, results, and manuscripts. In its first public deployment, FARS produced 166 complete research papers spanning 67 fine-grained AI/ML topics while preserving intermediate artifacts as an auditable corpus rather than a curated set of successes. We evaluate this corpus with 282 structured reviews from volunteer reviewers covering 140 papers, including overall ratings, sub-scores, integrity checks, and LLM-use disclosure. The reviews indicate that FARS can produce review-worthy and occasionally strong AI/ML research artifacts in a large-scale public deployment, while also exposing recurring failure modes in narrow experimental scope, methodological limitations, and integrity issues.

AI.tldr: FARS是一个完全自动化的AI研究系统，能够自主生成和推进研究项目，涵盖构思、规划、实验和写作阶段。在首次公开部署中生成了166篇研究论文，覆盖67个AI/ML细分主题，并保留了完整的中间产物作为可审计语料库。
AI.motivation: 解决现有自动化研究系统的局限性：证据主要来自精选案例、人工设定主题或少量预定义任务，需要一个能够在广泛研究主题上规模化运行的完全自动化系统。
AI.method: 使用阶段特定代理（stage-specific agents）协调工作，通过共享工作空间记录提案、代码、日志、结果和手稿，实现研究项目的自主生成和推进。
AI.result: 生成了166篇完整研究论文，覆盖67个细粒度AI/ML主题；收集了282份结构化评审（覆盖140篇论文），包括总体评分、子评分、诚信检查和LLM使用披露。
AI.conclusion: FARS能够在大规模公共部署中产生值得评审的、有时甚至是优秀的AI/ML研究工件，同时也暴露了狭窄实验范围、方法论限制和诚信问题等反复出现的失败模式。

The application domains are entirely different - this paper addresses AI research automation, not visual computing or 3D motion generation. It does not address any of the specified pain points (3D visual guidance, quality supervision for graphics, video-to-3D motion synthesis) and uses different methods (stage-specific agents for research automation vs VLM/motion generation models for graphics).

title: WarpHammer: Densifying Scene Warps with 3D Object Priors for Extreme View Synthesis
summary: Projection-conditioned novel view synthesis (NVS) warps an explicit 3D reconstruction of the input view into the target camera and conditions a generator on the warped rendering. This works well for small viewpoint changes but degrades sharply under large orbital motion: the warp becomes sparse around the orbited object, where hidden surfaces dominate the new view and mirror-like artifacts emerge, causing the generator to lose both pixel content and the implicit camera cue carried by the warp. We introduce WarpHammer, a training-free framework that resolves this failure mode by augmenting the warped scene with an explicit 3D reconstruction of the object obtained from a native 3D generative prior (e.g., SAM3D). The reconstructed object adds missing foreground surfaces and occludes background points that should no longer be visible, restoring both appearance and camera cues without fine-tuning the base model. The same explicit object representation further unlocks a capability current NVS pipelines do not support: incorporating auxiliary views of the object from sources outside the target scene, for example, a casual snapshot of a car paired with a manufacturer studio shot of the same model. We process the reference and auxiliary images jointly with a pretrained multi-view geometry foundation model, which predicts a unified point cloud that we fuse into the 3D object reconstruction. This yields substantially more faithful geometry than single-image reconstruction, without requiring user-provided camera poses for the auxiliary views. On five benchmarks, WarpHammer produces stable novel views at viewpoint deviations where strong baselines collapse, and is the first scene-level NVS method that can naturally fuse auxiliary, pose-unknown object views from an external source.

title: Arena-T2I Hard: Benchmarking and Improving Faithfulness with Dependency-Aware Checklist
summary: Faithfulness -- how precisely a generated image aligns with its prompt -- is increasingly central to the real-world utility of text-to-image (T2I) models. Existing faithfulness benchmarks, however, rely on simple atomic instructions, on which top-tier systems already achieve near-perfect scores. As T2I models enter creative workflows, users issue multi-faceted requests combining intricate spatial relationships, stylistic constraints, and complex text rendering. In this setting, a single binary VLM-judge score no longer captures which specific constraints the model fails to satisfy. We introduce Arena-T2I Hard, a 310-prompt stress benchmark drawn from real arena T2I logs, with approximately 30 decomposed yes/no constraints per prompt spanning six categories, including text rendering. The strongest closed-source system we evaluate reaches 0.855 with a 33~pp performance gap across 11 systems, demonstrating substantial discriminative power. Moreover, high public-arena rankings fail to predict faithfulness, confirming that holistic Bradley-Terry (BT) preference scores prioritize aesthetics over fine-grained prompt adherence. We propose a dependency-aware checklist reward that decomposes each prompt into a DAG of yes/no questions and zeroes descendants of failed parents, turning faithfulness into a per-constraint training signal. Combined with a BT aesthetic reward via group-decoupled normalization (GDPO), which standardizes each reward within its rollout group so neither collapses, the recipe attains a strictly better faithfulness-aesthetics trade-off on SD3.5-Medium and FLUX.1-dev under MMRB2 pairwise comparisons than every single-reward, naive weighted-sum, or 4-reward BT-ensemble baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Arena-T2I Hard基准测试，用于评估文本到图像(T2I)模型的"忠诚度"（即生成图像与提示词的匹配程度）。该基准包含310个提示词，每个提示词约30个分解的是/否约束，涵盖六个类别（包括文本渲染）。同时提出了依赖感知的清单奖励（dependency-aware checklist reward），结合BT美学奖励，在SD3.5-Medium和FLUX.1-dev上实现了更好的忠诚度-美学权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的忠诚度基准依赖于简单的原子指令，顶级系统已接近满分。在创意工作流中，用户请求复杂（空间关系、风格约束、复杂文本渲染），单一二值VLM评分无法捕捉模型具体失败哪些约束。公开竞技场排名也无法预测忠诚度，因为BT偏好分数优先考虑美学而非细粒度提示 adherence。
AI.method: 1) 构建Arena-T2I Hard基准：310个提示词来自真实竞技场日志，每个约30个分解的是/否约束，涵盖六类；2) 提出依赖感知的清单奖励：将每个提示词分解为DAG结构的是/否问题，失败父节点的子节点也计零；3) 结合BT美学奖励（通过GDPO组内归一化），在训练时同时优化两个目标。
AI.result: 1) 最强闭源系统得分0.855，11个系统间差距33个百分点，显示高区分度；2) 公开竞技场排名无法预测忠诚度；3) 在SD3.5-Medium和FLUX.1-dev上，该方法在MMRB2成对比较中实现了比所有单奖励、加权求和或4奖励BT集成基线更好的忠诚度-美学权衡。
AI.conclusion: 依赖感知的清单奖励可有效将忠诚度转化为每约束训练信号，配合GDPO标准化的BT美学奖励，能够突破忠诚度-美学的权衡困境，为T2I模型的细粒度评估与训练提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about text-to-image generation (2D image synthesis from text), while the research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video input. These are completely different application domains - generating static 2D images vs generating 3D motion sequences. Although both use Vision-Language Models, the VLMs in this paper are used for evaluating image-text alignment (faithfulness benchmarking), not for extracting 3D visual guidance features or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The pain points addressed are orthogonal: this paper improves text-to-image faithfulness, while the profile needs 3D motion generation from video.

title: Learning from Failure: Inference-Time Self-Improvement for Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents, which leverage multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to operate computers and complete tasks, have attracted significant attention for their utility and versatility. A major challenge in developing these agents is collecting large-scale, high-quality trajectories. The standard approach generates synthetic data through a self-improving loop: an agent is placed in a verifiable environment and iteratively fine-tuned on its successful trajectories. Despite its effectiveness, this paradigm exploits only successful trajectories and discards the failed ones, even though failures carry rich information about a model's weaknesses. In this work, we explore a complementary failure-driven self-improvement loop, a data-centric paradigm that turns failed trajectories into agent improvements. Specifically, we employ an LLM to diagnose failure modes, propose inference-time solutions, and generate code patches -- lightly verified by humans -- that upgrade the agent. We validate this approach with the state-of-the-art OpenCUA-72B model on the OSWorld benchmark, improving the success rate from 42.3% to 48.9%, a gain of 6.6 percentage points, without any additional training cost and with only modest inference overhead. Our results demonstrate that failure-driven self-improvement is a viable complement to success-based pipelines, enabling more efficient agent improvement.

AI.tldr: 提出失败驱动的自我改进范式，利用LLM诊断失败模式并生成代码补丁，在OSWorld上将OpenCUA-72B成功率从42.3%提升至48.9%。
AI.motivation: 当前标准方法仅利用成功轨迹，丢弃失败轨迹，但失败中蕴含丰富的模型弱点信息，需要一种以数据为中心的范式来利用失败轨迹改进智能体。
AI.method: 使用LLM诊断失败模式，提出推理时解决方案，并生成代码补丁，通过人工轻度验证后升级智能体。在OSWorld基准测试上验证了OpenCUA-72B模型。
AI.result: 在OSWorld基准测试上，成功率从42.3%提升至48.9%，提升6.6个百分点，无需额外训练成本，仅增加适度推理开销。
AI.conclusion: 失败驱动的自我改进可以作为成功驱动管道的可行补充，实现更高效的智能体改进，且无需额外训练成本，仅需适度的推理开销。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based computer-use agents and self-improvement for operating system tasks (OSWorld benchmark), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis, video generation, visual feature extraction, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. This paper addresses none of these pain points - it's in the domain of AI agents and LLM reasoning, not computer graphics or 3D motion generation.

title: A Self-Evolving Agentic System for Automated Generation and Execution of Biological Protocols
summary: Autonomous wet-lab experimentation requires more than plausible protocol text: biological intent, quantitative procedures, device constraints and experimental feedback must remain aligned from protocol and SOP design to code and physical execution. We developed ProtoPilot, a self-evolving multi-agent system, together with an expert-grounded benchmark and evaluation framework for testing this conversion as an experimental automation problem. The framework spans 294 synthetic-biology and molecular-biology tasks derived from 98 gold-standard protocols, wet-lab expert rubrics, device-level validity gates and real experimental tests. ProtoPilot incorporates layer-wise verifiability, multi-agent orchestration and a runtime-updated skill library to generate protocols, expand SOPs, synthesize SDK-compliant code and revise workflows from wet-lab feedback. It achieved a Top@3 expert-preference rate of 90.2%, an overall protocol-to-code gate pass rate of 89.5% and an Opentrons pass rate of 88.24%, compared with 32.35% for OpenTrons-AI. Wet-lab validation produced interpretable readouts, Sanger-confirmed products and feedback-corrected PCA-assembled DNA targets, establishing a verifiable route to autonomous experimentation. Together, these results show that the evaluation framework captures execution-relevant requirements for autonomous wet-lab automation, and that ProtoPilot can meet them by converting protocol and code generation into validated execution and feedback-guided revision.

AI.tldr: ProtoPilot是一个自进化的多智能体系统，用于解决自主湿实验室自动化中的协议到代码转换问题，包含294个合成生物学和分子生物学任务的基准测试框架，实现了90.2%的专家偏好率和89.5%的协议到代码门禁通过率
AI.motivation: 自主湿实验室实验不仅需要合理的协议文本，还需要生物意图、定量程序、设备约束和实验反馈在从协议和SOP设计到代码和物理执行的整个过程中保持一致
AI.method: 开发了ProtoPilot系统，包含分层可验证性、多智能体编排和运行时更新的技能库；构建了包含294个任务的基准测试框架，涵盖合成生物学和分子生物学任务，基于98个黄金标准协议、专家评分规则、设备级有效性检验和真实实验测试
AI.result: Top@3专家偏好率达到90.2%，协议到代码门禁通过率为89.5%，Opentrons通过率为88.24%（对比OpenTrons-AI的32.35%）；湿实验室验证产生了可解释的读数、经Sanger确认的产物和反馈纠正的PCA组装DNA目标
AI.conclusion: ProtoPilot通过分层可验证性、多智能体编排和运行时更新的技能库，实现了协议到代码的转换及实验反馈引导的修订，为自主湿实验室自动化提供了可验证的路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about biological protocol automation and wet lab systems (synthetic biology, DNA assembly), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D visual guidance features from 2D video and generating 3D motion, while this paper deals with protocol-to-code conversion for laboratory automation. Although both may use AI/ML techniques, the application domains are entirely different - this is computational biology/lab automation, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: CLIMB: Centroid-Based Hierarchical Memory for Online Continual Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Online Continual Self-Supervised Learning (OCSSL) aims to learn representations from a continuous stream of unlabeled data, without knowledge of task boundaries and under memory constraints. Existing methods rely either on replay buffers that exploit latent space structure, or on regularization alone. We present CLIMB (Continual Learning with Intelligent Memory Bank), which combines both simultaneously. Our method introduces a hierarchical centroid-based memory, bounded in total number of stored images, combined with knowledge distillation on replayed examples to limit representation drift. The memory groups similar images into centroids, providing hard-to-discriminate examples for contrastive learning while covering the diversity of observed distributions. Experiments on Split CIFAR-100 and Split ImageNet-100, on standard benchmarks from the state-of-the-art as well as a new protocol with irregular task distributions show that CLIMB outperforms state-of-the-art OCSSL methods.

AI.tldr: CLIMB是一种在线持续自监督学习方法，结合层次质心内存库和知识蒸馏，在不知道任务边界且有内存限制的情况下从连续无标签数据流中学习表示。
AI.motivation: 现有OCSSL方法要么依赖重放缓冲区利用潜在空间结构，要么仅依靠正则化，缺乏同时结合两种优势的方法。
AI.method: 提出CLIMB方法：1) 引入层次质心式内存，存储图像总数有界；2) 将相似图像分组到质心，为对比学习提供难以区分的样本，同时覆盖观察分布的多样性；3) 结合知识蒸馏对重放样本进行训练以限制表示漂移。
AI.result: 在Split CIFAR-100、Split ImageNet-100以及新的不规则任务分布协议上实验，表明CLIMB优于当前最先进的OCSSL方法。
AI.conclusion: CLIMB成功结合了基于重放的方法和基于正则化的方法的优势，在持续自监督学习任务上取得了最先进的性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about continual self-supervised learning (CSSL) for general representation learning from data streams. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While both involve visual data, this paper focuses on learning representations from continuous unlabeled data streams with memory constraints - not on extracting 3D visual guidance features from 2D video, quality supervision through VLMs, 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The methods (hierarchical centroid memory, knowledge蒸馏) are ML techniques for continual learning, not relevant to the specific computer graphics pain points mentioned. This is essentially a machine learning paper for general representation learning, not a computer graphics/video generation/motion synthesis paper.

title: Evo-PI: Aligning Medical Reasoning via Evolving Principle-Guided Supervision
summary: Despite recent progress, the reasoning capabilities of large multimodal language models (MLLMs) remain fundamentally constrained by static supervision, where fixed prompts, rules, or reward models provide non-adaptive guidance throughout training. Such static signals are often sufficient to enforce output formats, but fail to shape the underlying reasoning process, leading to brittle generalization and performance saturation in complex decision-making tasks. We propose Evo-PI, a principle-centric learning framework that treats reasoning principles as explicit, language-based supervision signals that can be generated, evaluated, and iteratively evolved. Instead of relying on fixed rewards, Evo-PI enables a co-evolutionary loop in which principles guide model reasoning, while model behaviors in turn refine the principles that supervise them. This dynamic alignment mechanism allows supervision to progressively adapt to the model's reasoning deficiencies. We instantiate Evo-PI in medical visual question answering as a high-stakes testbed requiring structured visual-textual reasoning. Across eight benchmarks and multiple model backbones, Evo-PI consistently improves reasoning accuracy, achieving gains of up to 24.6%. Our results suggest that evolving principle-guided supervision offers a scalable and general paradigm for training expert-aligned reasoning in MLLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/zhengxianda/Evo_PI.

AI.tldr: Evo-PI是一个原则中心的学习框架，通过共进化监督机制改进大型多模态语言模型(MLLMs)的推理能力，在医学视觉问答任务中实现最高24.6%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs依赖静态监督(固定提示、规则或奖励模型)，无法塑造底层推理过程，导致复杂决策任务中泛化能力脆弱和性能饱和。
AI.method: Evo-PI将推理原则视为显式的语言监督信号，可生成、评估和迭代进化。实现共进化循环：原则指导模型推理，模型行为反过来优化监督原则，形成动态对齐机制使监督能够适应模型的推理缺陷。在医学视觉问答任务中验证。
AI.result: 在8个基准测试和多个模型骨干上，Evo-PI持续提升推理准确率，最高增益达24.6%。
AI.conclusion: 进化原则引导的监督为训练MLLMs中专家对齐的推理提供了一种可扩展且通用的范式。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical visual question answering (VQA) using Vision-Language Models in the medical domain. While it uses VLMs, the application domain is entirely different from the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video. The paper addresses medical reasoning tasks, not 3D visual feature extraction, motion generation, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The field (Medical AI) and application domain are completely mismatched with the Computer Graphics/3D motion synthesis focus.

title: Editing Everything Everywhere All at Once
summary: Editing multiple elements of an image in a single forward pass is a practical alternative to multi-turn image manipulation, offering improved efficiency and potentially better harmonization. However, when several instructions target different regions, semantic interference often leads to attribute leakage and poor edit disentanglement, especially as the number of edits increases. In this work, we propose MICE (Multi-Instance Concurrent Editing), a training-free strategy for scalable multi-instance image editing with Multimodal Diffusion Transformers. MICE modifies the additive bias of joint attention to regulate interactions between instance-specific edit instructions, latent, and context tokens identified via user-provided segmentation masks. Specifically, MICE allows intra-instance attention, penalizes interactions between neighboring region tokens, and suppresses unrelated cross-instance attention. As a result, our method enforces attribute binding while preserving global visual consistency. We evaluate MICE on LoMOE-Bench and introduce MICE-Bench, a more challenging benchmark with an average of 8.5 concurrent edits per image. The experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms strong baselines and recent competitors in terms of visual quality preservation and faithfulness to the editing instructions.

AI.tldr: 提出MICE训练无关策略，通过调节联合注意力偏置实现多实例并发编辑，有效解决语义干扰和属性泄漏问题，在新基准MICE-Bench上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 单次前向传递中编辑图像多个元素相比多轮操作更高效且有助于更好地融合。然而当多条指令 targeting 不同区域时，语义干扰导致属性泄漏和编辑解耦差，且随编辑数量增加问题加剧。
AI.method: 提出MICE策略，通过修改 Multimodal Diffusion Transformers 的联合注意力加性偏置来调节实例特定编辑指令、潜变量和上下文标记之间的交互。具体包括：1)通过用户提供的分割掩码识别不同实例；2)允许实例内注意力；3)惩罚相邻区域标记之间的交互；4)抑制不相关的跨实例注意力。从而实现属性绑定并保持全局视觉一致性。
AI.result: 在LoMOE-Bench和新建的MICE-Bench（平均每图8.5个并发编辑）上进行评估，实验表明该方法在视觉质量保持和指令忠实度方面均优于强基线和最新竞争对手。
AI.conclusion: MICE通过修改联合注意力的加性偏置，有效解决了多实例并发编辑中的语义干扰问题。实验表明该方法在视觉质量保持和指令忠实度方面均优于现有最强基线，为大规模多实例图像编辑提供了一种有效的训练无关方案。
