title: Harnessing Textual Refusal Directions for Multimodal Safety
summary: To improve safety in Large Language Models (LLMs) we can either perform post-training alignment or exploit refusal directions in the activation space. Both strategies are less feasible in Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) as they require unsafe multimodal data, harder to collect than their unimodal counterpart. In this work, we relax this constraint and investigate whether textual refusal directions, extracted directly from the LLM backbone, generalize across modalities (i.e., image, video). Preliminary findings confirm this ability, though effectiveness is conditioned by layer selection, steering strength, and cross-modal alignment, with the latter causing safe multimodal inputs to be spuriously steered toward refusal. Building on this, we introduce Modality-Agnostic Refusal Steering (MARS), a light-weight training-free approach that injects multimodal safety without the need for multimodal safety data. MARS corrects modality misalignment via activation re-centering, adaptively scales steering strength within a geometrically defined trust region, and selects the optimal intervention layer, operating at the first generated token. Evaluated on five SOTA MLLMs across safety, utility, and video jailbreak benchmarks, MARS achieves consistent safety gains while preserving utility. These results reveal that safety-relevant structure is shared across modalities and that textual refusal directions are a powerful and underexplored foundation for multimodal alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MARS方法，利用LLMbackbone中的文本拒绝方向来实现跨模态（图像、视频）安全对齐，无需多模态安全数据即可提升多模态大语言模型的安全性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的安全对齐面临困境：要么需要后训练对齐，要么需要利用激活空间中的拒绝方向，但这两种方法在MLLMs中都不可行，因为需要难以收集的多模态不安全数据。本文旨在探索文本拒绝方向是否能跨模态泛化。
AI.method: 提出Modality-Agnostic Refusal Steering (MARS)方法：1)通过激活重中心化修正模态错位；2)在几何定义的信任区域内自适应缩放转向强度；3)选择最佳干预层，在第一个生成token时进行操作。
AI.result: 在5个SOTA MLLMs上评估，MARS在安全、实用性和视频越狱基准上取得一致的安全增益，同时保持实用性。发现安全相关结构在模态间共享，文本拒绝方向是多模态对齐的强大基础。
AI.conclusion: 文本拒绝方向可跨模态泛化，安全相关结构在模态间共享。MARS是一种无需多模态安全数据的轻量级、无训练的多模态安全注入方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI safety and alignment for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), focusing on preventing harmful outputs through textual refusal directions. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, visual feature extraction, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. While both mention "Vision-Language Models," the paper uses VLMs for safety/alignment purposes, not for graphics tasks like 3D motion generation. The application domain (AI Safety vs Computer Graphics/3D Motion Generation) is entirely different - this is a different field altogether.

title: RCL-Mamba: A Dual-domain State Space Model for Measurement-oriented Image Restoration in Rotational Sparse-View Scanning Computed Laminography
summary: Rotational Scanning Computed Laminography (RCL) is widely utilized for the Non-Destructive Testing(NDT) of large planar components. However, to facilitate rapid inspection, continuous sparse-view scanning is often employed, where the angular integration effect during exposure induces rotational blur in the projection domain. Furthermore, the data incompleteness inherent in sparse sampling manifests as sparse artifacts in the reconstructed image domain. To address these cross-domain degradations, this paper proposes RCL-Mamba, a measurement-oriented dual-domain State Space Model (SSM)-based image restoration network. The framework adopts a cascaded joint processing strategy: it first corrects the rotational blur in the projection domain and subsequently suppresses the sparse artifacts in the image domain. Additionally, we design a Mamba-CNN dual-branch module to adaptively balance large-scale blur correction with local detail recovery. Evaluations on both simulated datasets and real-world Printed Circuit Board (PCB) scans demonstrate that RCL-Mamba outperforms existing baselines in blur removal, artifact suppression, and structural preservation. Line-profile-based structural measurement further verifies that the proposed method better preserves via/pad boundaries and slender trace profiles. Crucially, by reducing the required scanning views from 512 to 64, our method enhances inspection efficiency by approximately 8-fold without compromising reconstruction quality, offering a robust measurement-oriented restoration solution for high-throughput RCL inspection with improved structural measurement fidelity.

AI.tldr: RCL-Mamba是一种面向测量的双域状态空间模型图像恢复网络，用于解决旋转扫描计算层析成像(RCL)中连续稀疏视角扫描导致的旋转模糊和稀疏采样导致的稀疏伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 为实现大规模平面元件的快速检测，RCL采用连续稀疏视角扫描，但这会在投影域产生旋转模糊，并在图像域产生稀疏伪影，需要跨域修复。
AI.method: 采用级联联合处理策略：先在投影域校正旋转模糊，再在图像域抑制稀疏伪影；设计Mamba-CNN双分支模块自适应平衡大规模模糊校正与局部细节恢复。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和真实PCB扫描中均优于现有基线方法，有效去除模糊、抑制伪影、保护结构。基于线轮廓的结构测量验证了该方法更好地保留了通孔/焊盘边界和细小走线轮廓。
AI.conclusion: 将扫描视角从512个减少到64个，检测效率提升约8倍而不影响重建质量，为高吞吐量RCL检测提供了稳健的面向测量的恢复解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computed laminography for industrial PCB inspection, focusing on image restoration for CT scanning. The research profile is about Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video using Vision-Language Models. These are completely different application domains - one is about medical/industrial imaging for defect detection, while the other is about generating 3D motion from video for graphics applications. The methods (Mamba for image restoration vs VLM for motion synthesis) and goals (measurement vs motion generation) are entirely unrelated.

title: Language-Assisted Super-Resolution from Real-World Low-Resolution Patches
summary: Single image super-resolution aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) inputs. Training SR models typically requires paired HR-LR data, which is difficult to obtain in reality. As a result, most methods synthesize LR images by artificially degrading HR images with handcrafted kernels or camera ISP adjustments. However, these synthetic degradations fail to capture the complexity of real LR images, leading to poor generalization in practice. To address this, we observe that even within a single high-quality image, regions at different depths exhibit varying resolutions, where distant regions act as LR patches and closer ones as HR patches. This allows the extraction of real, degradation-induced LR patches from real images. Since these LR patches lack paired HR counterparts, we propose LA-SR (Language Assistant for SR), a novel framework for unpaired SR. The key idea of LA-SR is to redefine unpaired SR in the language space, using vision-language models to bridge the LR-HR gap. LA-SR projects images into a semantically rich space representing both content and quality, and applies two language-guided losses: linguistic content loss to preserve semantic fidelity, and linguistic quality loss to enhance perceptual realism. With this alignment, LA-SR effectively super-resolves real LR inputs, producing realistic outputs that overcome the limitations of synthetic-data-trained methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LA-SR框架，利用同一图像中不同深度区域的分辨率差异提取真实LR patches，并创新性地在语言空间中利用视觉-语言模型进行无配对超分辨率训练，解决传统方法依赖合成数据导致的泛化差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SR方法需要成对的HR-LR训练数据，但实际中难以获取。现有的合成LR方法（人工核或相机ISP调整）无法捕捉真实LR图像的复杂性，导致在真实场景中泛化性能差。
AI.method: 1)利用单张图像中不同深度区域分辨率不同的特点，提取真实LR patches；2)将图像投影到包含内容和质量的语义丰富空间；3)设计两种语言引导损失：语言内容损失（保持语义保真度）和语言质量损失（增强感知真实感）；4)在语言空间中桥接LR-HR差距实现无配对SR。
AI.result: LA-SR能够有效超分辨率真实LR输入，生成逼真的输出，克服了合成数据训练方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 通过在语言空间重新定义无配对SR问题，LA-SR为真实场景下的超分辨率任务提供了新思路，视觉-语言模型的引入有效解决了无配对训练数据的问题。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 2D image super-resolution (LA-SR framework), which is a different application domain entirely from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. While both involve Vision-Language Models, the paper addresses 2D image quality enhancement rather than extracting 3D visual guidance features, achieving high-quality 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. This is a computer vision (image restoration) task, not a computer graphics/motion generation task.

title: Self-Study Reconsidered: The Hidden Fragility of Learning from Self-Generated QA
summary: Language models are increasingly taught from synthetic question--answer (QA) supervision: a model generates questions about a document, answers them from the same text, and the resulting pairs are used to fine-tune, distill, or compress knowledge into another model. We show that this generation step is not neutral preprocessing. It is an implicit policy that both selects which evidence becomes training signal and decides how that evidence is answered, and it is fragile at both stages. When choosing what to ask, generators do not scan a document uniformly. Coverage saturates early and concentrates on salient spans, diverse prompts converge on the same regions, and what looks question-worthy is driven by local presentation. As a result, salient artifacts such as poorly cleaned markup can hijack question generation across model families and scales. When answering, the model that produces the supervision tends to obey instruction-like passages embedded in the text. This compliance depends on the intent and surface form of the passage rather than its strictness, and is worst under task conflict, where larger models comply more often. These failure modes arise from choices made during QA generation, so they can be reduced without changing the training loop. Tying each question to a fixed target reduces biased selection, and filtering instruction-like spans before answering lowers mean injection compliance from $88\%$ to $13\%$ in our evaluation while retaining nearly all clean text.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了合成问答数据生成过程中的系统性偏见：问题生成倾向于选择文档中显著的区域，而答案生成容易服从文本中的指令性段落。这些缺陷源于QA生成阶段的选择策略，而非下游训练过程。
AI.motivation: 语言模型越来越多地从合成问答对中进行学习，但作者发现生成过程并非中立的预处理步骤，而是隐式地决定了哪些证据成为训练信号以及如何回答这些证据。
AI.method: 通过系统性地分析问题生成的覆盖模式和答案生成对指令性文本的服从程度，评估了不同模型家族和规模下的失败模式，并提出了两种改进策略：将每个问题绑定到固定目标，以及在 answering 前过滤指令性片段。
AI.result: 问题生成存在覆盖饱和现象，集中在显著片段；指令性段落的服从率高达88%；较大的模型在任务冲突下反而更服从。改进策略可将注射服从率降至13%，同时保留几乎所有清洁文本。
AI.conclusion: 这些失败模式源于QA生成阶段的选择策略，无需改变训练循环即可缓解。通过固定目标绑定和指令性片段过滤，可显著降低偏见选择和指令服从率。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Natural Language Processing (synthetic QA generation for language model training), completely unrelated to the research profile in Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with text-based QA bias analysis while the profile requires Vision-Language Models, video processing, and 3D motion generation. No methodological overlap exists between text-based QA generation and visual feature extraction/motion synthesis.

title: Domain Adaptive Object Detection via Dual-Stream Bilevel-Cycle Optimization
summary: Cycle self-training (CST) breaks the shared classifier assumption of the standard self-training framework, which is effective for unsupervised domain adaptation and exploits unlabeled target data by training with target pseudo-labels. CST introduces a target classifier and employs an inner-outer loop updating strategy, addressing the issue of unreliable pseudo-labels and enabling pseudo-labels to generalize across domains. Despite its success in image classification, extending CST to object detection faces three main challenges. First, the upper bound of CST in object detection is constrained by three types of unreliable pseudo-labels, such as classification error alone, localization error alone, and their combination. Second, since object detection involves detecting multiple target objects, directly applying CST leads to training insta bility. Third, a wider numerical range of regression coordinates leads to exploding losses. To this end, we apply CST to both classification and regression and propose the Dual-Stream Bilevel-Cycle Optimization framework. Specifically, we construct CST upon Mean Teacher to prevent training instability and use extra normalization to map the regression bounding box into a standardized space, effectively addressing exploding losses. Also, we provide a theoretical derivation of the regression bound. Extensive experiments across four cross domain standard scenarios demonstrate that our framework achieves considerable results.

AI.tldr: 本文将Cycle self-training (CST)从图像分类扩展到目标检测领域，提出了Dual-Stream Bilevel-Cycle Optimization框架。该框架基于Mean Teacher构建CST以防止训练不稳定，并使用额外归一化将回归边界框映射到标准化空间，解决了损失爆炸问题。
AI.motivation: 标准自训练框架的共享分类器假设限制了无监督域适应的效果。CST虽在图像分类中成功，但扩展到目标检测面临三个主要挑战：1) 三种不可靠伪标签（仅分类错误、仅定位错误及组合）限制上限；2) 目标检测涉及多目标导致训练不稳定；3) 回归坐标数值范围更广导致损失爆炸。
AI.method: 提出Dual-Stream Bilevel-Cycle Optimization框架：1) 在Mean Teacher上构建CST以防止训练不稳定；2) 使用额外归一化将回归边界框映射到标准化空间解决损失爆炸问题；3) 对分类和回归同时应用CST；4) 提供了回归边界的理论推导。
AI.result: 在四个跨域标准场景下进行了广泛实验，证明了该框架达到了相当好的效果。
AI.conclusion: 成功将CST扩展到目标检测任务，通过Dual-Stream Bilevel-Cycle Optimization框架有效解决了训练不稳定和损失爆炸的问题，在跨域目标检测任务中取得了显著效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about domain adaptive object detection using Cycle Self-Training in computer vision, which is completely different from the research profile focused on Computer Graphics, 3D motion synthesis from video, and Vision-Language Models for visual guidance. The application domain (object detection vs 3D motion generation) and methods (domain adaptation, Mean Teacher for detection vs video-to-3D motion generation) have no overlap with the research profile's pain points and methods.

title: PolicyGuard: From Organizational Policies to Neuro-SymbolicCompliance Review Engines
summary: Policy-grounded document review requires determining whether a target document complies with organization-specific policies, guidelines, or playbooks. While large language models can assist with policy interpretation and document analysis, end-to-end prompting leaves the applied policy logic implicit, making compliance decisions difficult to inspect, update, and test. We present PolicyGuard, a neuro-symbolic framework for policy-grounded document compliance review. PolicyGuard converts organizational policy guidance into an executable review engine consisting of typed relational logic rules and atom-level extraction questions. During review, LLMs answer these local questions using retrieved document evidence, and a symbolic evaluator applies the formal rules to detect non-compliance. We instantiate and evaluate PolicyGuard on company-specific NDA compliance review, where contract clauses must be checked against organization-specific negotiation policies. By separating policy formalization, local document interpretation, and symbolic compliance evaluation, PolicyGuard makes document review more explicit, maintainable, and systematically testable.

AI.tldr: PolicyGuard是一个神经符号框架，用于政策驱动的文档合规审查。它将组织政策转换为可执行的审查引擎，包括类型化关系逻辑规则和原子级提取问题。LLM回答这些问题并使用符号评估器检测不合规情况。该框架在NDA合规审查场景中进行评估。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在政策解释和文档分析方面可以提供帮助，但端到端提示使所应用的政策逻辑变得隐含，导致合规决策难以检查、更新和测试。需要一种更明确、可维护和可测试的文档审查方法。
AI.method: PolicyGuard将组织政策指导转换为可执行的审查引擎，包含：(1)类型化关系逻辑规则；(2)原子级提取问题。审查过程中，LLM使用检索到的文档证据回答这些局部问题，符号评估器应用形式规则检测不合规情况。
AI.result: 通过将政策形式化、局部文档解释和符号合规评估分离，PolicyGuard使文档审查更加明确、可维护和可系统测试。该方法在企业特定NDA合规审查中得到实例化和评估。
AI.conclusion: PolicyGuard通过神经符号方法解决了政策驱动文档审查的可解释性问题，实现了合规决策的可检查性、可维护性和可测试性，为组织特定的政策合规审查提供了有效框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about neuro-symbolic frameworks for document compliance review (legal/NLP domain), which has NO connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion synthesis, or video generation. While it mentions LLMs, the application domain is completely different - it's about policy-driven document analysis for NDA compliance, not about extracting 3D visual features from video or motion generation. The research profile focuses on vision-language models for 3D motion synthesis from video, which is entirely unrelated to this document processing paper.

title: MAPE: Defending Against Transferable Adversarial Attacks Using Multi-Source Adversarial Perturbations Elimination
summary: Neural networks are vulnerable to meticulously crafted adversarial examples, leading to high-confidence misclassifications in image classification tasks. Due to their consistency with regular input patterns and the absence of reliance on the target model and its output information, transferable adversarial attacks exhibit a notably high stealthiness and detection difficulty, making them a significant focus of defense. In this work, we propose a deep learning defense known as multi-source adversarial perturbations elimination (MAPE) to counter diverse transferable attacks. MAPE comprises the single-source adversarial perturbation elimination (SAPE) mechanism and the pre-trained models probabilistic scheduling algorithm (PPSA). SAPE utilizes a thoughtfully designed channel-attention U-Net as the defense model and employs adversarial examples generated by a pre-trained model (e.g., ResNet) for its training, thereby enabling the elimination of known adversarial perturbations. PPSA introduces model difference quantification and negative momentum to strategically schedule multiple pre-trained models, thereby maximizing the differences among adversarial examples during the defense model's training and enhancing its robustness in eliminating adversarial perturbations. MAPE effectively eliminates adversarial perturbations in various adversarial examples, providing a robust defense against attacks from different substitute models. In a black-box attack scenario utilizing ResNet-34 as the target model, our approach achieves average defense rates of over 95.1\% on CIFAR-10 and over 71.5\% on Mini-ImageNet, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAPE防御方法，通过结合SAPE通道注意力U-Net和PPSA预训练模型调度算法，有效消除可迁移对抗扰动，在CIFAR-10和Mini-ImageNet上分别达到95.1%和71.5%的防御率。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络容易受到对抗样本攻击，可迁移对抗攻击因不依赖目标模型信息而具有高隐蔽性和检测难度，需要有效的防御手段来应对多样化的可迁移攻击。
AI.method: MAPE包含两个核心组件：1) SAPE使用通道注意力U-Net作为防御模型，利用预训练模型生成的对抗样本进行训练以消除已知对抗扰动；2) PPSA引入模型差异量化和负动量来调度多个预训练模型，最大化对抗样本间的差异以增强防御模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在以ResNet-34为目标模型的黑盒攻击场景中，MAPE在CIFAR-10上达到平均95.1%的防御率，在Mini-ImageNet上达到71.5%的防御率，表现出最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: MAPE能有效消除各种对抗样本中的对抗扰动，为来自不同替代模型的攻击提供鲁棒防御，是对抗可迁移攻击的有效深度学习防御方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial defense for image classification (CIFAR-10, Mini-ImageNet), which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, video generation models, and Vision-Language Models for visual guidance. This paper addresses security/robustness in neural networks for image classification - a totally different application domain. No relevance to 3D visual features, motion generation, video-to-3D bridging, or any computer graphics applications.

title: AxDafny: Agentic Verified Code Generation in Dafny
summary: We study agentic code generation in Dafny, where a model must generate both executable code and the proof artifacts for verification. We present AxDafny, a verifier-guided repair framework that iteratively generates implementations, invariants, assertions, and termination arguments. We also introduce LiveCodeBench-Pro-Dafny (LCB-Pro-Dafny), a benchmark of 250 competition-style programming problems translated into Dafny with formal specifications and a verifier-based evaluation harness. On LCB-Pro-Dafny, AxDafny substantially improves verification success over baseline GPT-5.5 performance. On DafnyBench, AxDafny achieves 92.7\% verification success, outperforming the strongest previously reported proof-hint baseline by 6.5 percentage points. Lastly, we show that verification success and runtime test performance measure different aspects of generated code.

AI.tldr: 研究Dafny中的智能体代码生成，模型需要同时生成可执行代码和验证证明。提出AxDafny框架和LCB-Pro-Dafny基准集，在验证成功率和性能上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: Dafny是一种具有形式化验证能力的编程语言，但生成同时包含实现代码和验证证明的智能体代码是一个挑战。需要一个能够迭代生成实现、不变量、断言和终止参数的框架。
AI.method: 提出AxDafny，一个验证器引导的修复框架，通过迭代方式生成实现、不变量、断言和终止参数。同时构建LCB-Pro-Dafny基准集，包含250个竞赛风格的编程问题，并配备形式化规范和基于验证器的评估工具。
AI.result: 在LCB-Pro-Dafny上，AxDafny相比基线GPT-5.5显著提升验证成功率。在DafnyBench上达到92.7%验证成功率，比此前最强的证明提示基线高出6.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 验证成功率和运行时测试性能衡量生成代码的不同方面，形式化验证是评估代码正确性的重要补充手段。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about formal verification and code generation in the Dafny programming language (software engineering field), not Computer Graphics. It has no connection to 3D motion synthesis, video generation, visual feature extraction, or any graphics-related tasks. While it mentions "Vision-Language Models" in passing, it uses LLMs for code verification, not for visual understanding or graphics applications. The application domain is entirely different - formal methods vs. computer graphics/3D motion generation.

title: MS-Resampler: Multi-Scope Visual Resampling for Efficient Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) typically employ resampling-based projectors to transform dense visual features into a compact token sequence for language modeling. Most existing resamplers adopt a single, fixed aggregation scope via global cross-attention, which can blur fine-grained local evidence and limit the ability to capture both local details and global context within a fixed token budget. In this work, we propose MS-Resampler, a multi-scope visual resampling framework for MLLMs. MS-Resampler instantiates multiple scope-specific resamplers by injecting explicit spatial scope priors into the resampling attention, enabling each branch to aggregate visual information at a particular granularity from local to global. The outputs of these scope-specific resamplers are then adaptively fused to produce the final visual representations for language modeling. Extensive experiments on ten public multimodal benchmarks show that MS-Resampler consistently improves visual understanding and multimodal reasoning over conventional single-scope resamplers, while introducing only minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: MS-Resampler是一种多尺度视觉重采样框架，用于多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)。该方法通过注入明确的空间尺度先验来实例化多个尺度特定的重采样器，使每个分支能在不同粒度（从局部到全局）聚合视觉信息，并自适应融合输出。
AI.motivation: 现有的重采样器采用单一的固定聚合范围（全局交叉注意力），这会模糊细粒度的局部证据，并在有限的token预算下限制了对局部细节和全局上下文的捕获能力。
AI.method: MS-Resampler通过在重采样注意力中注入明确的空间尺度先验来实例化多个尺度特定的重采样器，使每个分支能在特定粒度上聚合视觉信息（从局部到全局），然后自适应融合这些尺度特定重采样器的输出以产生最终视觉表示。
AI.result: 在10个公开多模态基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，MS-Resampler在引入最小计算开销的同时，一致性地改善了视觉理解和多模态推理性能，优于传统的单尺度重采样器。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度方法有效同时捕获局部细节和全局上下文，在最小开销下提供了改进的视觉理解能力。

relevance_reason: While this paper uses Vision-Language Models (one of the listed methods), the application domain is completely different. This paper is about multimodal LLMs for general visual understanding and VQA tasks, NOT about 3D motion synthesis or Computer Graphics. The research profile specifically targets extracting 3D visual guidance features from video for motion synthesis, but this paper focuses on improving visual token aggregation for language model understanding. This is a textbook case of "same method (VLM), different application domain" - using VLMs for general vision-language tasks vs. using them for 3D motion generation in computer graphics. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to 2D-to-3D motion representation or video-based motion synthesis.

title: One Video, One World: Turning Monocular Video into Physical 4D Scenes
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project Page: https://OneVideoOneWorld.github.io/
summary: We introduce \textbf{OVOW}, the first training-free system that reconstructs \emph{instance-level, simulation-ready} 4D mesh scenes from a single monocular video. Recent 4D reconstruction achieves impressive rendering quality, but its outputs (\eg, implicit fields, Gaussian primitives, or point clouds) lack the watertight topology, instance separation, and standardized physical interfaces required by physics simulators and embodied AI. OVOW closes this gap with a four-stage pipeline: a vision-language model discovers, labels, and motion-classifies all instances; category-aware reconstruction yields per-instance meshes for rigid objects and topology-consistent mesh sequences for deformable ones; an iterative render-match-optimize procedure recovers metric scale and 6-DoF pose trajectories; and physics-grounded assembly enforces ground contact and inter-object support. Crucially, we model all motion, rigid and non-rigid, through direct vertex deformation without category-specific priors or skeleton rigging, producing watertight mesh scenes ready for downstream physics simulation and editing. We further establish the first benchmark for \emph{structured Video-to-4D} evaluation, with metrics for geometric correctness, instance separation, and physical plausibility beyond visual fidelity; the same pipeline doubles as a scalable engine for \emph{synthesizing} paired video-to-4D simulation data for future 4D world models and embodied AI. Across two synthetic benchmarks (static and 4D), OVOW attains the best overall layout and geometry accuracy and the lowest photometric and semantic error among all baselines, and on monocular video runs one to two orders of magnitude faster than the baselines, while downstream physics simulation confirms its physical stability.

AI.tldr: OVOW是首个无需训练的、从单目视频重建实例级仿真就绪4D网格场景的系统。该系统解决了现有4D重建方法输出（隐式场、高斯原语、点云）缺乏水密拓扑、实例分离和标准化物理接口的问题，可直接用于物理仿真和具身AI。
AI.motivation: 现有4D重建方法虽然渲染质量出色，但其输出缺乏水密拓扑、实例分离和标准化物理接口，无法满足物理仿真器和具身AI的需求。需要一种能够生成仿真就绪4D网格场景的方法。
AI.method: 四阶段流水线：(1)视觉语言模型发现、标记和运动分类所有实例；(2)类别感知重建，刚性物体生成实例网格，可变形物体生成拓扑一致的网格序列；(3)迭代渲染-匹配-优化恢复度量尺度和6-DoF姿态轨迹；(4)物理接地组装确保地面接触和物体间支撑。所有运动通过直接顶点变形建模，无需类别特定先验或骨骼绑定。
AI.result: 在两个合成基准（静态和4D）上取得最佳整体布局和几何精度， photometric和语义误差最低；单目视频运行速度比基线方法快1-2个数量级；下游物理仿真验证了其物理稳定性。
AI.conclusion: OVOW首次实现了从单目视频无需训练重建仿真就绪4D网格场景，建立了首个结构化视频到4D评估基准，可作为合成配对视频到4D仿真数据的可扩展引擎，为未来4D世界模型和具身AI提供数据支持。

relevance_reason: The paper is in Computer Graphics domain and addresses some pain points: it uses VLM for quality supervision, extracts 3D visual features from 2D video, and bridges 2D video to 3D representation. However, it's a RECONSTRUCTION method rather than a GENERATION method - it reconstructs 4D mesh scenes from video rather than synthesizing new 3D motion. The paper focuses on scene-level physical simulation rather than motion synthesis for characters/robots. It's moderately relevant but differs in core objective (reconstruction vs generation) and output type (scene meshes vs motion data).

title: Visual Semantic Entropy: Do Vision Language Models Recognize Visual Ambiguity?
summary: Vision-language models can produce confident answers on visually ambiguous inputs, resulting in biased predictions. Common entropy-based methods, such as Semantic Entropy (SE), rely on output diversity. Yet our analysis shows that overconfident visual embeddings suppress output diversity under stochastic decoding, causing SE to underestimate uncertainty in such cases. Recent methods instead probe output diversity through input perturbations, including textual paraphrasing or joint text-image perturbations, and show improved performance. We study these approaches and reveals that the resulting variability is often dominated by textual changes rather than visual evidence, causing uncertainty estimates to reflect prompt sensitivity rather than visual ambiguity. We therefore propose Visual Semantic Entropy (VSE), which perturbs only the image to probe nearby visual variations while keeping the text query fixed. VSE measures uncertainty by clustering generated answers into semantic prototypes and computing the mass-weighted dispersion among them. Extensive evaluation across five modern vision-language models and five diverse VQA benchmarks demonstrates that VSE effectively captures visual ambiguity, establishing a new state-of-the-art for VLM uncertainty estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Visual Semantic Entropy (VSE)方法，用于估计视觉语言模型在视觉模糊输入下的不确定性。该方法通过对图像进行扰动而保持文本查询不变，探测视觉变化产生的答案多样性，并通过将生成答案聚类为语义原型来计算质量加权分散度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于熵的不确定性估计方法（如语义熵SE）依赖输出多样性，但过度自信的视觉嵌入在随机解码时会抑制输出多样性，导致SE低估不确定性。而基于输入扰动的方法虽然能探测输出多样性，但其产生的变异性主要来自文本变化而非视觉证据，反映的是提示敏感性而非视觉模糊性。
AI.method: VSE方法仅对图像进行扰动以探测邻近的视觉变化，同时保持文本查询固定。它将生成的答案聚类为语义原型，并计算它们之间的质量加权分散度来衡量不确定性。
AI.result: 在5个现代视觉语言模型和5个不同的VQA基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，VSE能够有效捕获视觉模糊性，建立了VLM不确定性估计的新技术状态。
AI.conclusion: VSE通过仅扰动图像而非文本，成功解决了现有方法的问题，能够准确反映视觉 ambiguity 而非提示敏感性，为视觉语言模型的不确定性估计提供了更可靠的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-Language Model uncertainty estimation for Visual Question Answering (VQA), not about 3D motion synthesis or computer graphics. While it uses VLMs, the application domain is completely different - it's focused on detecting visual ambiguity in VQA tasks, not on extracting 3D visual guidance from video, quality supervision for 3D motion generation, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The methods (input perturbation for uncertainty estimation) are not applicable to the pain points of achieving high-quality 3D motion synthesis from video.

title: Temporal Preservation over Processing: Diagnosing and Designing Spatiotemporal Single-Stage Video Detectors
summary: Single-stage video object detectors are increasingly deployed in time-critical applications, yet it remains unclear whether these models genuinely reason over temporal context or merely exploit a single informative frame-a gap hidden by standard metrics, which reward correct predictions regardless of how they are reached. We address this from two complementary directions: first, we propose TemporalLens, a model-agnostic diagnostic framework probing temporal dependence through controlled perturbations, structured occlusions, temporal shuffling, redundancy injection, and resolution degradation, revealing whether a detector actually uses information across time. Applied to stacked-frame 2D detectors and our YOLO-3D architecture, it exposes behavioural differences invisible to mAP: stacked 2D models collapse when the target frame is removed, while spatiotemporal models recover predictions from earlier frames, a signature of real temporal reliance. Second, we detail YOLO-3D, a modular real-time spatiotemporal detector built on YOLOv8, and show that simply preserving temporal depth through the backbone is the dominant performance driver (+3.7 pp mAP@50 at 32 frames averaged across scales). Together, the diagnostics and architecture turn "does this detector reason over time?" into a measurable, actionable question.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TemporalLens诊断框架和YOLO-3D架构，用于评估和改进单阶段视频目标检测器的时间推理能力。标准指标无法区分是否真正利用了时间上下文，论文通过5种扰动策略揭示模型真实的时间依赖行为。
AI.motivation: 标准mAP指标无法区分检测器是真正利用时间上下文还是仅依赖单帧信息，时间关键应用中这一盲点可能导致模型在实际部署时性能崩溃。
AI.method: 提出TemporalLens诊断框架，包含5种可控扰动：受控遮挡、时间打乱、冗余注入、分辨率降级以及目标帧移除。针对架构方面，设计了基于YOLOv8的模块化实时时空检测器YOLO-3D。
AI.result: TemporalLens暴露了堆叠2D模型与时空模型的本质差异：移除目标帧后堆叠2D模型崩溃，而时空模型可从更早帧恢复预测。YOLO-3D通过保持时间深度在主干网络中获得+3.7 pp的mAP@50提升（32帧平均）。
AI.conclusion: TemporalLens将"检测器是否真正利用时间"转化为可测量、可操作的问题，同时证明保持时间深度是提升性能的主要驱动力。

relevance_reason: The paper is about video object detection (YOLO-3D for detecting objects in video frames), which is a computer vision task. This is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video. The research profile seeks methods for bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation and generating 3D motion, while this paper focuses on detecting objects in 2D video frames - these are fundamentally different application domains with no direct relevance.

title: No Prompt, No Leaks: A Robust Generative Steganography Framework via Prompt-Free Diffusion
summary: Generative image steganography synthesizes stego images directly from secret information to achieve inherent security advantages. Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) have recently emerged as a fundamental image steganography framework that modulates secret latent representations with text prompts. Limited by the inflexibility of text prompts, these methods still struggle to generate high-quality stego images and accurately recover secret images. In this work, we propose a prompt-free diffusion image steganography framework that integrates style semantic priors to control more robust and reliable stego image generation. Specifically, a Cascaded Affine Coupling Module (CACM) establishes a bijective, deterministic mapping between a secret image and its latent representation. Then, style semantics are integrated into the diffusion process to control latent representation and ensure visual imperceptibility in the generated stego images. To mitigate trajectory deviations stemming from the unconditioned reverse process, a predictor-corrector mechanism is introduced to iteratively refine the generation trajectory via feedback from the current and predicted next states. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed method achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods in terms of security, secret image reconstruction accuracy and controllability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无提示词的扩散图像隐写框架，通过整合风格语义先验来控制隐写图像的生成，并引入预测-校正机制迭代优化生成轨迹，在安全性、秘密图像重建精度和可控性方面达到了先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有基于潜在扩散模型(LDM)的图像隐写方法受限于文本提示的灵活性，难以生成高质量的隐写图像并准确恢复秘密图像。
AI.method: 提出级联仿射耦合模块(CACM)在秘密图像及其潜在表示之间建立双射确定性映射；将风格语义整合到扩散过程中控制潜在表示；引入预测-校正机制通过当前状态和预测下一状态的反馈迭代优化生成轨迹。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在安全性、秘密图像重建准确性和可控性方面与现有最先进方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 无提示词的扩散图像隐写框架结合风格语义先验和预测-校正机制能够有效提升隐写图像质量和秘密图像恢复精度，为生成式图像隐写提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image steganography (hiding secret images within cover images using diffusion models), which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video, visual feature extraction for motion generation, and Vision-Language Models for quality supervision. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - steganography vs 3D motion generation. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, motion synthesis, bridging 2D video to 3D motion).

title: Temporal Training Strategies for Left Atrium and Left Atrial Appendage Segmentation in Dynamic Contrast 4DCT
summary: Dynamic contrast-enhanced cardiac CT enables time-resolved analysis of contrast filling and washout in the left atrium (LA) and left atrial appendage (LAA), with potential applications for assessing blood stasis in atrial fibrillation (AF). Accurate segmentation across all frames is required for such analysis but is challenging due to large temporal contrast variations and the use of a single annotation per registered sequence. This creates a trade-off between training for robustness and limiting label noise. In this study, we investigate how temporal training-set design affects nnUNet-based segmentation of the LA and LAA in dynamic 4DCT. We compare training using a minimal two-frame dataset reflecting standard clinical practice, a physiologically selected subset of frames, and the full 27-frame sequence. We further evaluate the impact of foreground-based normalization. Training with all frames yielded the best performance in early low-contrast phases. However, the physiologically selected subset achieved comparable performance from the filling phase onward. Applying normalization parameters derived from the full dataset improved performance of reduced datasets in low-contrast frames, but did not fully close the gap. These findings highlight the importance of temporal diversity in training data for robust segmentation in dynamic CT, while indicating that carefully selected frame subsets may provide an effective trade-off between performance and efficiency for downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 研究动态对比增强心脏CT中左心房和左心耳的分割问题，探讨不同时间帧训练策略对nnUNet分割性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 在动态心脏CT中，准确分割左心房和左心耳具有挑战性，因为对比度随时间变化大，且每个注册序列仅使用单一标注，导致训练鲁棒性与标签噪声之间存在权衡。
AI.method: 比较三种训练策略：1) 最少两帧数据集（标准临床实践）；2) 生理学选择的帧子集；3) 完整27帧序列。并评估前景为基础的归一化方法的影响。
AI.result: 使用所有帧训练在早期低对比度阶段表现最佳，但从填充阶段开始，生理学选择的子集达到相当性能。归一化参数可改善减少数据集在低对比度帧的性能，但未能完全弥补差距。
AI.conclusion: 时间多样性对动态CT中鲁棒分割至关重要，但精心选择的帧子集可为下游应用提供性能与效率的有效权衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (cardiac CT segmentation for left atrium/appendage) using nnUNet. While it involves temporal/frame-based processing, the application domain is completely different from the research profile. The profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, Vision-Language Models, and video generation. This paper addresses medical diagnosis rather than graphics/motion generation. The methods (nnUNet for medical segmentation) have no overlap with the required methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation). This is a case of different application domain entirely - medical imaging vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis.

title: Towards a foundational model for recognising diastematic Gregorian notation
summary: Optical recognition of Gregorian notation has recently been attempted with end-to-end methods, with four datasets introduced. However, each of these datasets is in a different encoding. We design a common encoding based on the S-GABC proposal, convert all four datasets to this common encoding, and train a shared end-to-end foundational model for diastematic Gregorian notation that establishes a new state of the art across all four datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文针对格里高利圣咏光学识别的四个数据集编码不一致的问题，设计了一种基于S-GABC提案的通用编码方案，将四个数据集统一转换，并训练了一个共享的端到端基础模型，在所有四个数据集上实现了新的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 格里高利圣咏的光学识别近年来开始采用端到端方法，但已发布的四个数据集各自使用不同的编码方案，导致难以统一训练和比较。缺乏一个通用的编码标准限制了端到端方法在该领域的发展和性能提升。
AI.method: 1. 设计了一种基于S-GABC提案的通用编码方案；2. 将四个现有的格里高利圣咏数据集统一转换为该通用编码；3. 基于转换后的数据训练了一个共享的端到端基础模型。
AI.result: 该共享端到端基础模型在所有四个数据集上均建立了新的最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 统一的编码方案和共享的端到端模型能够有效提升格里高利圣咏光学识别的准确率，为该领域提供了新的基线和方法论参考。

relevance_reason: This paper is about optical recognition of Gregorian chant manuscripts (Optical Music Recognition/OMR), which falls under music informatics or document analysis, not Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video, Vision-Language Models for 3D understanding, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. There is no application domain match - this is an entirely different field focused on recognizing musical notation from 2D images of historical documents, with no relevance to 3D motion generation or computer graphics.

title: AeroVerse-SatAgent: UAV-Satellite Collaborative Spatial Reasoning Inspired by the Dual Visual Pathway Theory of Cognitive Neuroscience
summary: With the rapid advancement of aerospace embodied intelligence, enabling Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to autonomously understand and reason about complex environments has become increasingly important. However, existing UAV-based spatial reasoning approaches face critical limitations: single-view perception renders them vulnerable to occlusions and perspective distortions, while most VLMs lack explicit geometric modeling, relying on semantic cues and yielding inconsistent reasoning under viewpoint and scale variations. To address these challenges, we propose SatAgent, a UAV-Satellite collaborative spatial reasoning model inspired by the dual-pathway mechanism of the human visual system. By jointly leveraging satellite and UAV perspectives, SatAgent enables robust, accurate reasoning in complex urban environments. We first introduce a Geometric-Aware 3D Reconstruction Encoder that elevates 2D UAV features into explicit 3D spatial representations. Next, we design a multi-view topology-semantic alignment module integrating cross-view features within a unified BEV coordinate system. We further introduce a multi-view consistency loss encouraging viewpoint-invariant representations. Finally, we construct SatAgent-SR130K, the first large-scale UAV-Satellite collaborative multi-view spatial reasoning dataset. Experiments show SatAgent outperforms state-of-the-art general-purpose foundation models and specialized spatial reasoning models by 25.91\% and 11.69\%, respectively, across diverse tasks, achieving particularly high accuracy in complex geometric relationship reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SatAgent，一个受人类视觉系统双路径机制启发的无人机-卫星协作空间推理模型，通过联合利用卫星和无人机视角实现复杂城市环境中的鲁棒准确推理。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机空间推理方法存在关键局限性：单视角感知使其容易受到遮挡和视角扭曲的影响；大多数视觉语言模型缺乏明确的几何建模，仅依赖语义线索，在视角和尺度变化下产生不一致的推理结果。
AI.method: 提出三大核心创新：1）几何感知3D重建编码器，将2D无人机特征提升为显式3D空间表示；2）多视角拓扑-语义对齐模块，在统一BEV坐标系统中整合跨视角特征；3）多视角一致性损失，鼓励视角不变表示。构建了首个大规模无人机-卫星协作多视角空间推理数据集SatAgent-SR130K。
AI.result: 实验表明，SatAgent在多样化任务中表现优于最先进的通用基础模型25.91%，优于专门的空间推理模型11.69%，在复杂几何关系推理中实现特别高的准确性。
AI.conclusion: SatAgent通过无人机-卫星协作和几何感知建模，有效解决了传统单视角空间推理的局限性，为无人机在复杂城市环境中的自主感知与推理提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about UAV-Satellite collaborative spatial reasoning for urban environment understanding - a remote sensing/computer vision task. The research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video for computer graphics (human motion generation). These are completely different application domains. While both deal with 3D representations, the paper focuses on geometric spatial reasoning using drone and satellite imagery, NOT motion generation or synthesis. The methods (3D reconstruction encoders, BEV features) are used for scene-level reasoning, not for character/animal motion synthesis from video.

title: Think While You Map: Asynchronous Vision-Language Agents for Incremental 3D Scene Graphs
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D scene graph methods typically operate in two stages: first reconstruct, then enrich with vision-language models, leaving the graph unqueryable during exploration. We argue that this sequential coupling is unnecessary and propose an asynchronous architecture in which lightweight online mapping runs concurrently with heavyweight semantic refinement. A probabilistic voxel-based backbone maintains stable object identities incrementally, while background VLM agents progressively enrich the graph. This framework resolves duplicate object tracks through semantic loop closure, attaches fine-grained visual attributes and derives spatial relations between objects. A multi-target frame scheduler amortizes VLM cost by selecting a small set of informative frames that jointly cover multiple targets. The resulting scene graph is queryable during exploration and grows in semantic richness over time. Our method matches or outperforms existing open-vocabulary 3D scene graph methods on semantic segmentation (ScanNet, Replica) and surpasses the prior state-of-the-art across three visual grounding benchmarks (Sr3D+, Nr3D, ScanRefer) by 15.3 to 18.8 A@0.25. Project page: https://denizbickici.github.io/thinkgraphs/

AI.tldr: 提出ThinkGraph框架，采用异步架构将轻量级在线映射与重量级VLM语义细化解耦，实现探索过程中的可查询3D场景图构建，在视觉接地任务上实现15.3-18.8个百分点的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统开放词汇3D场景图方法采用两阶段流程（先重建再用视觉语言模型丰富），导致图谱在探索过程中不可查询。论文认为这种顺序耦合并非必要，因此提出异步架构来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出异步架构，轻量级在线映射与重量级语义细化并发运行。核心包括：1）基于概率体素的骨干网络，递增维护稳定的目标身份；2）后台VLM代理逐步丰富图谱；3）通过语义闭环解决重复目标跟踪；4）附加细粒度视觉属性并推导目标间空间关系；5）多目标帧调度器选择一小部分信息帧联合覆盖多个目标以分摊VLM成本。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和Replica语义分割任务上与现有方法相当或更优；在Sr3D+、Nr3D、ScanRefer三个视觉接地基准上超越先前最先进方法15.3至18.8 A@0.25。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在语义分割任务上与现有开放词汇3D场景图方法相当，并在Sr3D+、Nr3D和ScanRefer三个视觉接地基准上超越先前最先进方法15.3至18.8个百分点（A@0.25）。该框架实现了探索过程中的可查询性，并随着时间推移语义丰富度不断提升。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D scene graph construction using VLM, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. While it uses VLM (which matches one method), the application domain is scene understanding/mapping rather than motion generation. The pain points it addresses (semantic enrichment of 3D scenes) are unrelated to the core research goal of bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. This is a computer vision/robotics paper, not a computer graphics motion synthesis paper.

title: DrivingDepth: Sparse-Prompted Pixel-wise Scale Correction for Driving Depth Estimation
summary: Dense depth estimation for autonomous driving faces a geometry-scale conflict: depth foundation models deliver pixel-aligned dense visual geometry without reliable metric scale, while projected LiDAR provides metric anchors that are sparse, noisy, and misaligned with image structures. Existing sparse-prompted methods incorporate LiDAR by regenerating depth from scratch, overriding the foundation model's coherent geometry and producing structural artifacts on visually continuous surfaces. Our key insight is that foundation models already capture geometrically coherent relative depth; no additional surface structure learning is required-only a per-pixel scale factor mapping relative geometry to metric coordinates. Based on this, we propose DrivingDepth, which treats sparse LiDAR as geometric prompts that locally calibrate a frozen foundation prior through residual pixel-wise scale correction, preserving dense visual geometry by construction. On nuScenes with 4-frame surround-view input, DrivingDepth achieves an AbsRel of 11.19 and an EdgeCR of 5.741, outperforming MapAnything (11.99/1.914) by simultaneously delivering SOTA metric accuracy and geometric consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DrivingDepth方法，通过将稀疏LiDAR作为几何提示，对冻结的深度基础模型进行残差像素级尺度校正，解决自动驾驶中密集深度估计的几何尺度冲突问题，在nuScenes数据集上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的密集深度估计面临几何尺度冲突：深度基础模型提供像素对齐的密集视觉几何但缺乏可靠的度量尺度，而投影LiDAR提供度量锚点但稀疏、噪声大且与图像结构不对齐。现有稀疏提示方法从头重建深度，破坏了基础模型的几何一致性，在视觉连续表面上产生结构伪影。
AI.method: 提出DrivingDepth方法，核心洞见是基础模型已捕获几何一致的相对深度，无需额外学习表面结构，只需学习将相对几何映射到度量坐标的每像素尺度因子。该方法将稀疏LiDAR视为几何提示，通过残差像素级尺度校正对冻结的基础模型进行局部校准，从根本上保留密集视觉几何。
AI.result: 在nuScenes上使用4帧环视输入进行测试，DrivingDepth实现AbsRel为11.19，EdgeCR为5.741，同时在度量精度和几何一致性方面优于MapAnything（11.99/1.914）。
AI.conclusion: 通过将稀疏LiDAR作为几何提示进行残差像素级尺度校正，DrivingDepth成功解决了密集深度估计中的几何尺度冲突问题，同时实现了SOTA度量精度和几何一致性，为自动驾驶感知提供了更可靠的深度估计方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses autonomous driving depth estimation, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis. While both deal with "depth" conceptually, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on scene depth for self-driving vehicles, whereas the research profile concerns 3D character/object motion generation from video. The methods also don't match - the profile needs video-to-motion generation models (like Wanxiang, Seedance), not LiDAR-based depth correction for autonomous driving.

title: HVPNet: A Bio-Inspired Network for General Salient and Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: In recent years, most research on multimodal salient object detection (SOD) and camouflaged object detection (COD) typically aims to improve performance through complex cross-modal feature fusion and decoding structures. However, this approach leads to an excessively large model parameter scale and often fails to deliver satisfactory detection performance due to structural redundancy. In contrast, the human visual process is able to efficiently perform salient and camouflaged object identification without such complex structures. This contrast raises an important question: Can we draw conceptual inspiration from the human visual process to achieve a simpler modeling strategy, and still realize accurate and efficient object detection? To answer this question, we propose HVPNet, a simple yet general bio-inspired computational architecture. Drawing on the multi-layered information integration of the retina as a conceptual metaphor, we designed a Retinal Integration Module (RIM), which effectively integrates multimodal features through a level-specific multi-stage integration strategy. To fully exploit these features, we further design a cortical decoder (CD) that breaks down the decoding process into low- and high-level visual stages, abstracting the hierarchical processing in the human visual cortex. Benefiting from these designs, HVPNet can readily extend to seven tasks across four modalities. Without bells and whistles, it establishes an excellent accuracy-efficiency trade-off across 22 datasets spanning these seven tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/jiaweiXu1029/HVPNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HVPNet，一个受人类视觉系统启发的简单高效的生物启发式计算架构，用于多模态显著目标检测和伪装目标检测。该网络通过视网膜集成模块(RIM)和皮层解码器(CD)实现多模态特征的有效整合，在22个数据集上跨7个任务取得了优异的准确率-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态显著目标检测和伪装目标检测研究通常通过复杂的跨模态特征融合和解码结构来提升性能，但这导致模型参数量过大、结构冗余，且检测性能往往不佳。相比之下，人类视觉系统能够高效完成这些识别任务而无需复杂结构。因此，作者提出一个问题：能否从人类视觉过程中汲取概念启发，实现更简单 yet 准确的物体检测？
AI.method: 提出HVPNet架构，包含两个核心模块：1)视网膜集成模块(RIM)：以视网膜的多层信息整合为概念隐喻，采用层级特定的多阶段整合策略有效整合多模态特征；2)皮层解码器(CD)：将解码过程分解为低层和高层视觉阶段，模拟人类视觉皮层的层次化处理。
AI.result: HVPNet能够轻松扩展到跨4个模态的7个任务，在无需额外技巧的情况下，在涵盖这7个任务的22个数据集上建立了出色的准确率-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 受人类视觉过程启发的HVPNet证明了简单且具有生物学意义的建模策略可以同时实现准确和高效的物体检测，为多模态检测任务提供了一种简单 yet 有效的通用框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about salient object detection and camouflaged object detection (2D computer vision task), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with 2D image segmentation, not 3D motion generation. While both involve multi-modal learning, the methods and goals are completely different. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, 3D motion synthesis, or 2D-to-3D bridging).

title: Fully Automated High-Precision Segmentation of Retinal Atrophy and Ellipsoid Zone Thickness in OCT: A Reliable Tool for Real-World GA Monitoring
comment: 31 pages, 6 tables, 7 figures, contain 3 supplemental figures and 2 supplemental tables
summary: Geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to age-related macular degeneration (AMD) requires precise monitoring of relevant structural biomarkers to assess disease stage, progression, and treatment response. This paper presents a fully automated, deep learning-based framework for the high-precision, pixel-wise segmentation of key biomarkers in optical coherence tomography (OCT) imaging: retinal pigment epithelium (RPE) loss, ellipsoid zone (EZ) loss, and EZ thinning. The proposed pipeline uses three specialized semantic segmentation models to delineate RPE loss, EZ boundaries (including interruptions), and Bruch's membrane. To ensure robustness and generalizability, the models were developed on a diverse dataset of 298 SD-OCT volumes representing the full phenotypic spectrum of AMD (GA:222, intermediate AMD: 40, neovascular AMD: 17, healthy: 19) and validated on an independent external dataset (n=43). The comprehensive evaluation was further strengthened using additional datasets to assess repeatability, inter-reader reliability, the impact of B-scan density on measurement accuracy, and subgroup performance stratified by lesion size. Results demonstrated high segmentation accuracy (Dice RPE loss: 0.88, Dice EZ loss: 0.87, Pearson's r > 0.99). Total EZ thickness measurements exhibited a sub-pixel average deviation of 2.15 $μm$, and segmentation reliability was confirmed by a strong reproducibility score (ICC > 0.98). By accurately and consistently quantifying outer photoreceptor degeneration and RPE loss, this fully automated framework provides a highly reliable tool for GA assessment in both clinical trials and routine real-world ophthalmic care.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于深度学习的全自动框架，用于光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像中地理萎缩（GA）关键生物标志物的高精度像素级分割，包括视网膜色素上皮（RPE）损失、椭圆体区（EZ）损失和EZ变薄。
AI.motivation: 地理萎缩（GA）继发于年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD），需要精确监测相关结构生物标志物以评估疾病分期、进展和治疗反应。
AI.method: 使用三个专门的语义分割模型来描绘RPE损失、EZ边界（包括中断）和Bruch's膜。模型在298个SD-OCT数据集上开发，并在独立外部数据集（n=43）上验证。
AI.result: Dice RPE损失：0.88，Dice EZ损失：0.87，Pearson相关系数>0.99。EZ厚度测量平均偏差为2.15 μm，可重复性评分ICC>0.98。
AI.conclusion: 该全自动框架可准确一致地量化外部光感受器变性和RPE损失，为临床试验和常规眼科护理中的GA评估提供了高度可靠的工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (OCT scans for retinal disease diagnosis) which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion synthesis from video, or video generation. While it uses deep learning for semantic segmentation, the application domain (ophthalmology/medical imaging) has no connection to the research profile's focus on bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation, Vision-Language Models for quality supervision, or video generation models. The methods and application domain are entirely different from what's needed.

title: SimpleSearch-VL: A Simple Recipe for Multimodal Agentic Deep Search
summary: We present SimpleSearch-VL, an efficient, reliable, and practical framework for multimodal agentic search. Its core idea is to improve the agent's own search-and-verification process rather than scaling data, tools, or auxiliary model components. For efficiency, Factorized Adaptive Rollout (FAR) improves sampling efficiency by forming more informative training groups while using redundant samples to mitigate long-tail latency and expose hard samples. For reliability, SimpleSearch-VL performs evidence-verified reasoning, explicitly using chain-of-thought verification to assess the relevance of retrieved visual and textual cues to the original context. For practicality, SimpleSearch-VL keeps a lightweight tool interface and performs webpage self-summary within the agent, requiring no additional external dependencies. With only 5K supervised tool-interleaved trajectories and 2K RL data, SimpleSearch-VL improves Qwen3-VL agentic baselines by 15.8 and 16.0 average points for the 8B and 30B-A3B variants, respectively. The SimpleSearch-VL-30B-A3B model further achieves performance competitive with agentic Gemini-3-Pro.

AI.tldr: SimpleSearch-VL是一个高效、可靠实用的多模态智能体搜索框架，通过改进智能体自身的搜索验证流程而非扩展数据、工具或辅助模型组件来实现性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态智能体搜索面临效率低、可靠性不足和实用性有限的问题，传统方法依赖扩展数据、工具或辅助模型，亟需一种更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三大核心创新：1）Factorized Adaptive Rollout（FAR）通过形成更有信息的训练组并利用冗余样本来缓解长尾延迟和暴露困难样本，提高采样效率；2）证据验证推理，通过思维链验证显式评估检索到的视觉和文本线索与原始上下文的相关性；3）轻量级工具接口，智能体内进行网页自摘要，无需外部依赖。
AI.result: 仅使用5K监督工具交织轨迹和2K强化学习数据，SimpleSearch-VL使Qwen3-VL智能体基线分别提升15.8和16.0平均分（8B和30B-A3B变体）。SimpleSearch-VL-30B-A3B性能与agentic Gemini-3-Pro相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进智能体自身的搜索验证流程，在有限训练数据下即可实现显著性能提升，为多模态智能体搜索提供了一种高效可靠且实用的新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal search/retrieval agents for information retrieval, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While it uses Vision-Language Models, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about improving search verification and retrieval rather than extracting 3D visual guidance features from video or synthesizing 3D motion. The pain points and goals are entirely misaligned with the research profile.

title: PRISM: Latent Composition Consistency for Single-Image Reflection Removal
summary: Single-image reflection removal (SIRR) seeks to recover the transmission layer from a mixture corrupted by reflections -- a severely ill-posed problem. Existing methods operate in pixel space, where the nonlinear sRGB formation model entangles the two layers and limits generalization. We observe that pretrained VAE latent spaces exhibit substantially lower coherence between image layers compared to pixel space, providing a more favorable working space for decomposition. Building on this finding, we propose \textbf{PRISM} (Pretrained-latent Reflection Image Separation Model), which reinterprets SIRR as a latent linear separation problem. Under an approximate additive formulation in latent space, PRISM learns a flow matching velocity field on a pretrained FLUX backbone that recovers both transmission and reflection in a single forward pass. To enforce robust disentanglement, we introduce a Latent Composition Consistency (LCC) strategy that constructs synthetic mixtures by swapping reflection latents across samples and enforces consistent decomposition via a cycle loss. We further propose a Layer Contrastive Separation (LCS) loss that promotes semantic separation between layers through patch-level contrastive learning, without requiring explicit reflection targets. Experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that PRISM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods by significant margins, with strong generalization to in-the-wild images.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一种基于预训练VAE潜在空间的单图像反射去除方法，将反射去除重新定义为潜在空间中的线性分离问题，使用FLUX骨干网络学习流匹配速度场来同时恢复透射层和反射层。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在像素空间操作，受限于非线性的sRGB形成模型，导致两层之间相互纠缠且泛化能力差。研究者观察到预训练VAE潜在空间中图像层之间的相干性显著低于像素空间，这为分解提供了更理想的工作空间。
AI.method: 提出PRISM方法，包括：1）将SIRR重新表述为潜在空间中的线性分离问题；2）在近似加性公式下，学习FLUX骨干网络上的流匹配速度场；3）引入潜在组合一致性(LCC)策略，通过跨样本交换反射潜在变量并使用循环损失强制一致的分解；4）提出层对比分离(LCS)损失，通过 patch 级对比学习促进层之间的语义分离。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，PRISM始终以显著优势超越最先进的方法，并对野外图像具有强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用预训练VAE潜在空间的良好特性，结合流匹配和对比学习策略，PRISM成功实现了高质量的反射去除，为图像分层任务提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about single-image reflection removal (2D image processing), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video input, extracting 3D visual guidance features, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The application domains are entirely different - reflection removal is a 2D image enhancement task with no connection to 3D motion generation or video-to-3D synthesis.

title: Mitigating Positional Leakage in 3D Masked Autoencoders for Robust Representation Learning
summary: Masked autoencoding has emerged as a prominent paradigm for self-supervised learning on 3D point clouds, achieving competitive performance across downstream tasks. Unlike its 2D counterpart, 3D masked autoencoding directly reconstructs spatial coordinates, making it inherently susceptible to positional leakage. In this work, we identify that the decoder in existing 3D MAE frameworks tends to over-rely on positional information, which weakens semantic representation learning and leads to suboptimal feature quality. To address this issue, we propose MPL-MAE, a masked point learning framework that mitigates positional over-reliance while enhancing the utilization of encoder features. Specifically, we introduce a recalibrated positional embedding module that suppresses metric-dominant coordinate signals while preserving geometric topology, together with a gated positional interface module that dynamically regulates positional injection during reconstruction. These designs promote a more balanced interaction between spatial priors and semantic features, yielding robust and informative representations. Extensive experiments across downstream tasks demonstrate that MPL-MAE consistently achieves competitive performance, validating its effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/yanx57/MPL-MAE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MPL-MAE框架，解决3D点云掩码自编码器中位置信息过度依赖的问题，通过重新校准的位置嵌入模块和门控位置接口模块来平衡空间先验与语义特征的学习。
AI.motivation: 3D掩码自编码器直接重构空间坐标，容易产生位置泄露；现有框架的解码器过度依赖位置信息，削弱了语义表示学习，导致特征质量不佳。
AI.method: 提出两个核心模块：1) 重新校准的位置嵌入模块(Recalibrated Positional Embedding)，抑制度量主导的坐标信号同时保留几何拓扑；2) 门控位置接口模块(Gated Positional Interface)，动态调节重建过程中的位置信息注入。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务的广泛实验中，MPL-MAE持续获得竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法促进了空间先验与语义特征之间更平衡的交互，产生鲁棒且信息丰富的表示，验证了其有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D point cloud representation learning using masked autoencoders, which is a different application domain from the research profile. While both deal with 3D data, the research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video input (bridging 2D video to 3D human motion), whereas this paper focuses on point cloud processing for scene understanding. The methods also differ significantly - the profile uses Vision-Language Models and Video Generation Models for motion synthesis, while this paper uses Masked Autoencoders for point cloud representation learning. This is similar methods (3D deep learning) but wrong application domain (point cloud vs motion synthesis).

title: MV-GEL: Language-Driven Multi-View Geometric Entity Localization on Meshes
summary: Identifying and grounding precise geometric entities, such as edges, planar regions, and curved surfaces within 3D objects, is foundational to computer-aided design (CAD), robotic manipulation, and scientific simulation. Although modern Vision Language Models (VLMs) have advanced referring segmentation (RIS) in the image domain, extending such language-driven localization to structured 3D geometry is substantially harder. The 3D object appearance is highly sensitive to viewpoints; a single perspective may render a target entity clearly observable, while another may suffer from severe occlusion or foreshortening. In this work, we attempt to solve these challenges with MV-GEL (Multi-View Geometric Entity Localization), a framework for localizing fine-grained geometric entities on polygon meshes from natural language queries. Our key insight is that reliable CAD entity (i.e., faces, edges or solids) localization depends on selecting views that make the queried entity maximally interpretable. We introduce GELviews, a prompt-conditioned ranking module that prioritizes viewpoints based on language prompted observability of geometric CAD entities. Selected views are processed by a VLM-based reasoning segmentation backbone, and predicted masks are lifted to the corresponding meshes via geometry-aware ray casting. Our framework is completely CAD agnostic and relies only on 3D meshes. Experiments show up to a 1.7X improvement in face-level IoU and over 4.5X gains in edge-level F1 compared to vanilla baselines, substantially outperforming CLIP-based and random view sampling, particularly for thin and view-sensitive structures.The dataset, code and trained checkpoints are available at https://github.com/kbali1297/MV-GEL.

AI.tldr: MV-GEL是一个从自然语言查询中定位3D网格上细粒度几何实体（如面、边、曲面）的框架，通过多视角选择和VLM推理分割实现几何实体的语言驱动定位。
AI.motivation: 3D物体外观对视角高度敏感，单一视角可能使目标实体清晰可见，也可能因遮挡或透视变形而难以识别。现有视觉语言模型在图像领域的指代分割(RIS)已取得进展，但将其扩展到结构化3D几何面临更大挑战。
AI.method: 提出GELviews模块，根据语言提示的几何CAD实体可观测性对视角进行排序筛选。选定视角由基于VLM的推理分割骨干处理，预测掩膜通过几何感知的射线投射提升到对应网格。框架完全无需CAD先验，仅依赖3D网格。
AI.result: 在面级别IoU上提升至1.7倍，边级别F1上提升超过4.5倍。相比CLIP基线和随机视角采样显著领先，尤其对细薄和视角敏感结构效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过选择最大化实体可解释性的视角，结合VLM推理分割和几何感知射线投射，实现了CAD几何实体的准确语言驱动定位，为CAD、机器人操作和科学模拟等应用奠定基础。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D mesh entity localization (understanding geometry from language queries), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video. While both use VLMs, the application domains are completely different: MV-GEL is about analyzing/understanding 3D meshes through multi-view VLM reasoning, not about generating 3D motions from video. The pain points (video-to-motion synthesis, 2D-to-3D motion representation) are not addressed at all.

title: Temperature Field Reconstruction of Tungsten Monoblock Divertor on EAST using Physics-aware Neural Operator Transformer
summary: Accurate modeling of the divertor temperature field is essential for preventing material melting and damage and for extending the service life of fusion devices. However, conventional numerical methods, such as the Finite Element Method (FEM), are computationally expensive and therefore unsuitable for real-time applications. Therefore, a fast and generalizable method is required for real-time reconstruction of the divertor temperature field and subsequent real-time control. To address the above issue, we propose a Physics-aware Neural Operator Transformer (PNOT) to characterize the spatiotemporal evolution of the divertor temperature field. It models boundary heat-flux relations as a structured graph and employs graph attention to explicitly capture spatial physical dependencies. Inspired by physics-aware attention, we further develop a physics-aware neural operator module to aggregate query points with similar physical conditions via slicing and model heat diffusion, while a gradient-constrained Sobolev regularization loss enforces consistency between function values and their derivatives. Experimental results show that these physical constraints improve prediction accuracy while preserving physical consistency. The source code of this paper will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenFusion

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为物理感知神经算子变换器(PNOT)的方法,用于托卡马克装置中偏滤器温度场的实时重建。该方法将边界热通量关系建模为结构化图,利用图注意力机制捕捉空间物理依赖性,并通过切片聚合相似物理条件下的查询点建模热扩散,同时使用Sobolev正则化损失确保函数值及其导数的一致性。实验表明,物理约束提高了预测精度同时保持物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 准确建模偏滤器温度场对于防止材料熔化和损伤以及延长聚变装置使用寿命至关重要。然而,传统有限元方法(FEM)计算成本过高,不适用于实时应用,因此需要一种快速且可泛化的方法来实现偏滤器温度场的实时重建和后续实时控制。
AI.method: 提出物理感知神经算子变换器(PNOT)来表征偏滤器温度场的时空演化。具体包括:1)将边界热通量关系建模为结构化图,利用图注意力显式捕捉空间物理依赖;2)开发物理感知神经算子模块,通过切片聚合相似物理条件下的查询点并建模热扩散;3)引入梯度约束的Sobolev正则化损失,确保函数值及其导数之间的一致性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明,物理约束提高了预测精度,同时保持了物理一致性。该方法能够实现偏滤器温度场的快速准确重建。
AI.conclusion: PNOT方法能够有效实现偏滤器温度场的实时重建,为聚变装置的实时控制提供了可行的解决方案。物理感知约束的引入显著提升了模型的预测精度和物理一致性,为未来聚变装置的温度场建模提供了新的思路。

It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, Vision-Language Models, and video generation. The application domains are completely different (nuclear fusion physics vs computer graphics/visual content generation), and the methods (physics-based neural operators for scientific computing vs VLM/video generation models) serve entirely different purposes. This is a paper about scientific computing for fusion reactors, not computer graphics or motion/video synthesis.

title: DPPE: Rethinking Camera-Based Positional Encoding for Scaling Multi-View Transformers
summary:
The remarkable scalability of Transformers has expanded their application to 3D computer vision, where camera-aware positional encoding is crucial for providing spatial cues in multi-view geometry. Recent advancements have established the practice of using camera parameters -- such as extrinsics or projection matrices -- as relative positional encoding into the query, key, and value vectors of the attention mechanism. However, when scaling up the training recipe of novel view synthesis (NVS) models with the camera-based positional encoding, we observe a significant issue: model performance stagnates in the late stages of training.
  In this paper, we investigate the cause of the performance bottleneck when scaling up and demonstrate that storing rotation and translation given by the positional encoding in the same dimensions of the value vector causes indeterminacy in their independent identification, hindering training scalability. To address this, we propose Decoupled Pose Positional Encoding (DPPE), a novel camera-based positional encoding that explicitly decouples rotation and translation. Extensive evaluations on NVS tasks demonstrate that DPPE enables stable long-term training even in scaled-up training setup. Furthermore, it exhibits superior generalization performance in extrapolation settings, such as handling an increased number of viewpoints and zoom-in scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在缩放新型视图合成(NVS)模型的训练时，使用相机参数作为相对位置编码导致的性能停滞问题，并提出解耦姿态位置编码(DPPE)来解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 当使用相机参数（外参或投影矩阵）作为Transformer中查询、键、值向量的相对位置编码来扩展新型视图合成模型的训练时，观察到模型性能在训练后期停滞不前，这是一个关键的可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 通过分析发现，旋转和平移信息存储在value向量的相同维度中，导致两者无法独立识别，造成训练不确定性。为此提出解耦姿态位置编码(DPPE)，显式地将旋转和平移解耦分开。
AI.result: DPPE使得扩展训练设置下的长期稳定训练成为条件，并在 extrapolation 设置中展现出更优的泛化性能，包括处理更多视角和zoom-in场景。
AI.conclusion: DPPE通过显式解耦旋转和平移，有效解决了相机位置编码在扩展训练中的性能瓶颈问题，为3D计算机视觉中Transformer的可扩展训练提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Novel View Synthesis (NVS), which is a different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. While both are in Computer Graphics, the profile specifically targets extracting 3D motion from 2D video (e.g., human motion generation), whereas this paper focuses on generating new views of static scenes from multi-view inputs. The methods also differ: the profile emphasizes Vision-Language Models and video-to-motion generation, while this paper uses Multi-View Transformers with camera-based positional encoding. The pain points don't align - this paper addresses training scaling issues in NVS, not video-to-3D motion extraction or quality supervision with VLMs.

title: AugSplat: Radiance Field-Informed Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Settings
summary: Generating high-quality novel views at real-time frame rates remains a central challenge in 3D vision, particularly in sparse-view scenarios. Neural radiance fields have demonstrated robust reconstruction from limited observations, but their reliance on volumetric rendering leads to high computational cost and slow inference. In contrast, Gaussian Splatting methods achieve real-time rendering through rasterization, but their optimization is highly sensitive to the quality of the initial geometry. This sensitivity becomes especially problematic in sparse-view settings, where limited observations often lead to incomplete or noisy point-cloud reconstructions. In this work, we present AugSplat, a simple framework for improving Gaussian Splatting in sparse-view regimes using radiance-field-based view augmentation. We first train a radiance field on the sparse input views and use it to synthesize additional images from nearby novel viewpoints, increasing the effective view-space coverage available for supervision. These synthetic views are then used as auxiliary supervision during Gaussian Splatting optimization. We study two variants: Staged AugSplat, which uses synthetic views for an initial optimization phase before switching to real images, and Dual AugSplat, which jointly trains on real and synthetic views with a decaying synthetic loss weight. Experiments on sparse-view mip-NeRF 360 scenes show that AugSplat improves reconstruction quality over standard Gaussian Splatting. Staged AugSplat achieves the strongest average performance, while Dual AugSplat provides a closely performing formulation that keeps real-image supervision active throughout training, and both variants preserve real-time rendering at inference.

AI.tldr: AugSplat通过基于辐射场的视图增强来改进稀疏视图场景中的高斯溅射重建。首先在稀疏输入视图上训练辐射场并合成额外的新颖视图，然后将这些合成视图用作高斯溅射优化的辅助监督。
AI.motivation: 高斯溅射在稀疏视图设置中敏感于初始几何质量，有限观测通常导致不完整或嘈杂的点云重建，而神经辐射场虽能稳健重建但推理速度慢且计算成本高。
AI.method: 提出两种变体：(1) Staged AugSplat：先使用合成视图进行初始优化，然后切换到真实图像；(2) Dual AugSplat：联合训练真实和合成视图，合成损失权重衰减。
AI.result: 在稀疏视图mip-NeRF 360场景中，AugSplat提高了重建质量。Staged AugSplat获得最佳平均性能，Dual AugSplat表现接近，两者都保持了实时渲染能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于辐射场的视图增强是改善稀疏视图条件下高斯溅射的有效策略，Staged AugSplat在性能和速度之间取得最佳平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D scene reconstruction/novel view synthesis using Gaussian splatting, while the research profile focuses on 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video input. These are completely different application domains within Computer Graphics. The research profile deals with extracting motion from video (e.g., human motion generation), whereas this paper deals with static 3D scene reconstruction from sparse views. The methods also differ - this paper uses Gaussian Splatting and Neural Radiance Fields, not the Video Generation Models or VLMs mentioned in the profile.

title: Token-Sparse Medical Multimodal Reasoning via Dual-Stream Reinforcement Learning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) combining reinforcement learning (RL) ignite remarkable progress in multimodal reasoning, yet still struggle with medical images, which typically exhibit extremely sparse visual evidence to inform clinical decision-making. We recognize that pruning visual tokens outside the grounding region greatly enhances medical reasoning. However, a united RL framework for active visual token pruning (VTP) and medical multimodal reasoning remains unestablished. Here, we propose a dual-stream RL framework, ViToS, to fulfill token pruning and question answering. ViToS trains one policy model with two task branches, where one focuses on grounding while the other conducts token-sparse reasoning after VTP. Furthermore, we solve the coupled policy learning problem by introducing the cross-feedback sequential optimization, avoiding gradient conflict and facilitating convergence of the shared policy model. Evaluated on seven medical benchmarks, our method reduces visual tokens to 77% of the original sequence length while achieving a 108.27% relative performance on Lingshu-7B and 104.16% relative performance on HuatuoGPT-Vision-7B. Overall, ViToS delivers superior performance and inference speedup, establishing an efficient paradigm for medical multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: ViToS是一个双流强化学习框架,用于医学多模态推理中的主动视觉token剪枝(Visual Token Pruning)。通过训练一个包含两个任务分支的策略模型,一个分支专注于定位(grounding),另一个执行token稀疏推理,在保持优异性能的同时显著减少视觉token数量。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型(VLMs)结合强化学习在多模态推理方面取得显著进展,但在医学图像理解上仍面临挑战。医学图像通常只包含极少量的用于临床决策的视觉证据。研究者发现,剪枝定位区域之外的视觉token可以显著增强医学推理能力,但目前缺乏一个统一的强化学习框架来同时实现主动视觉token剪枝和医学多模态推理。
AI.method: 提出双流强化学习框架ViToS,包含两个任务分支:1)定位分支(grounding)专注于识别关键视觉区域;2)推理分支在VTP后执行token稀疏推理。为解决耦合策略学习问题,引入跨反馈序列优化(cross-feedback sequential optimization),避免梯度冲突并促进共享策略模型的收敛。模型在七个医学基准数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: ViToS将视觉token减少至原始序列长度的77%,同时在Lingshu-7B上实现108.27%的相对性能,在HuatuoGPT-Vision-7B上实现104.16%的相对性能。整体而言,ViToS提供了卓越的性能和推理加速,为医学多模态推理建立了高效范式。
AI.conclusion: ViToS通过双流强化学习框架成功实现了视觉token的主动剪枝和医学多模态推理的结合。跨反馈序列优化有效解决了两个任务分支之间的梯度冲突问题。该方法在减少77%视觉token的同时仍能提升性能,证明了token剪枝策略在医学影像理解中的有效性,为高效的医学多模态推理提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper focuses on Medical Multimodal Reasoning (medical image understanding for clinical diagnosis), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for 3D Motion Generation from video. Although both use Vision-Language Models, medical image analysis is entirely unrelated to 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction for graphics, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The method (visual token pruning for medical VLM efficiency) does not address any of the stated pain points in the research profile.

title: Preserve the Hard, Regenerate the Rest: Uncertainty-Guided Synthetic Training Data Augmentation with Diffusion Models
summary: Semantic segmentation models struggle with data sparsity and rare or visually diverse regions, e.g., dense regions or small objects in aerial or autonomous mobility data. While synthetic augmentation is an appealing solution, directly generating new labeled data risks misalignment of labels and generated pixels. Existing solutions to this problem often rely on external models, or employ coarse heuristics such as indiscriminately augmenting all foreground objects or entire backgrounds, which wastes capacity on uninformative pixels. To address this, we propose an uncertainty-guided synthetic context augmentation strategy that strictly preserves label validity and efficiently maximizes pixel informativeness per synthetic sample - no external guardrails required. Using a baseline segmenter's predictive entropy, we identify uncertain semantic regions and inpaint only the complementary visual context. When fine-tuning the segmenter on this synthetic data, we compute the loss only over the original pixels, excluding inpainted regions. This focuses learning on the unmodified, uncertain regions while presenting them in novel contexts. We demonstrate substantial mIoU gains on Cityscapes, UAVID, and BDD100K with the largest gains on rare and difficult classes such as buses, trains, or (from the aerial perspective) cars. Our results demonstrate that uncertainty-guided context augmentation is a highly effective lever to improve segmentation performance on complex datasets, with code provided at https://github.com/XITASO/Preserve-the-Hard-Regenerate-the-Rest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性引导的合成上下文增强策略，用于解决语义分割模型在数据稀疏和罕见类别上的性能问题。该方法利用基线分割器的预测熵识别不确定区域，仅对互补视觉上下文进行修复，并在微调时仅对原始像素计算损失。
AI.motivation: 语义分割模型在处理数据稀疏和罕见或视觉多样化区域（如航拍或自动驾驶数据中的密集区域或小目标）时存在困难。现有合成增强方法存在标签与生成像素对齐问题，或依赖外部模型，或采用粗粒度启发式方法导致在无信息像素上浪费资源。
AI.method: 提出不确定性引导的合成上下文增强策略：1）使用基线分割器的预测熵识别不确定语义区域；2）仅对互补视觉上下文进行修复（inpaint），严格保持标签有效性；3）微调时仅对原始像素计算损失，排除修复区域，使学习聚焦于未修改的不确定区域，同时将它们呈现于新颖上下文中。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、UAVID和BDD100K数据集上实现了显著的mIoU提升，最大提升出现在罕见和困难类别上，如公交车、火车或（从航拍视角）汽车。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性引导的上下文增强是提升复杂数据集分割性能的有效手段，代码已开源。

relevance_reason: The paper is about semantic segmentation for autonomous driving using diffusion-based data augmentation. This is purely computer vision (2D image understanding), not computer graphics. While it uses diffusion models, the application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion synthesis, video-to-motion generation, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The paper addresses 2D image segmentation, not 3D motion generation, visual guidance features, or any computer graphics application.

title: Learning Structurally Consistent Representations for Multi-View Radar Semantic Segmentation
summary: Radar sensors provide reliable perception under adverse weather and lighting conditions, but their sparse, noisy, and weakly semantic measurements make dense semantic segmentation challenging. Most existing radar segmentation methods rely on grid-based encodings and pairwise interactions, which struggle to capture the higher-order relational structure formed by multiple radar returns from the same physical object. We introduce a unified higher-order structural alignment framework for multi-view radar segmentation. The proposed method refines radar feature representations using learnable hypergraphs to capture higher-order dependencies among spatially related responses. To ensure consistency across heterogeneous radar projections, we further align view-specific features using Unbalanced Optimal Transport (UOT), enabling correspondence-free alignment under varying measurement densities and partial observations. An adaptive attention mechanism then fuses complementary radar views while emphasising structurally informative responses under sparsity and noise. The resulting architecture learns structurally consistent representations across Range Angle (RA), Range Doppler (RD), and Angle Doppler (AD) views and is trained using supervised segmentation together with cross-view consistency regularisation. Experiments on the CARRADA and RADIal benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong radar-specific baselines, achieving 63.8% mIoU on CARRADA and 83.4% mIoU on RADIal, improving the previous best methods by +1.7 and +2.3 mIoU, respectively. These results highlight the importance of higher-order relational modelling for robust radar perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的高阶结构对齐框架，用于多视图雷达语义分割。该方法利用可学习的超图来捕获雷达响应之间的高阶依赖关系，并使用非平衡最优传输（UOT）实现无对应点的跨视图特征对齐，通过自适应注意力机制融合互补的雷达视图。
AI.motivation: 雷达传感器在恶劣天气和光照条件下提供可靠感知，但其稀疏、噪声大、语义信息弱的测量值使得密集语义分割具有挑战性。现有方法依赖基于网格的编码和成对交互，难以捕获来自同一物理对象的多个雷达返回形成的高阶关系结构。
AI.method: 1. 使用可学习的超图（hypergraphs）来捕获空间相关响应之间的高阶依赖关系，以精炼雷达特征表示；2. 采用非平衡最优传输（UOT）在不同测量密度和部分观测下实现无对应点的跨视图特征对齐；3. 使用自适应注意力机制融合互补的雷达视图（RA、RD、AD），强调稀疏和噪声下的结构信息；4. 结合监督分割训练和跨视图一致性正则化进行训练。
AI.result: 在CARRADA和RADIal基准数据集上验证：在CARRADA上达到63.8% mIoU，在RADIal上达到83.4% mIoU，分别比之前的最佳方法提升了+1.7和+2.3 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 高阶关系建模对稳健雷达感知具有重要意义。该框架通过超图和UOT对齐有效解决了雷达数据的稀疏性和多视图异构性问题，为雷达语义分割提供了更鲁棒的特征表示。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper is about multi-view radar semantic segmentation for autonomous driving, which is a sensor perception problem in autonomous vehicles. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video using Vision-Language Models and video generation models. These are entirely different application domains: radar perception vs computer graphics/3D motion generation. The methods (hypergraphs, optimal transport for radar) have no overlap with the profile's methods (VLM, video generation, 3D motion models).

title: Localized Conformal Prediction for Image Classification with Vision-Language Models
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, code availables, accepted to EUVIP 2025
summary: Conformal predictions have attracted significant attention in the field of uncertainty quantification, mainly because of their strong marginal coverage guarantees. Full conditional guarantee is not an attainable goal, a well known fact in conformal predictions literature. As a result, several approaches have tried to approximate this behavior by adapting the conformal sets of test-time samples according to their similarity to calibration examples. Although the latter has gained traction and shown impressive performances for regression problems, its application to image classification remains under-explored. We conduct an extensive benchmarking on natural image classification tasks with vision-language models (VLMs), using our open source implementation of a recent localized conformal prediction algorithm.
