We show that straightforward usage of the cosine similarity between test-time and calibration visual features, an intuitive choice for VLMs, is not sufficient to improve over the non-local baselines. In response, we propose a simple non-linear transformation of the cosine similarities, which conserves marginal coverage guarantees and achieves statistically significant mean set sizes reduction. Code is available at https://github.com/cfuchs2023/lcp-vlm/.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了局部共形预测在视觉-语言模型(VLM)图像分类中的应用。研究发现，简单的余弦相似度无法改善非局部基线，但提出了一种非线性变换方法，能够在保持边际覆盖率保证的同时显著降低平均集合大小。
AI.motivation: 共形预测具有强大的边际覆盖率保证，但条件覆盖率保证无法完全实现。为近似条件覆盖率行为，研究者通过根据测试样本与校准样本的相似性调整共形集合来进行探索。该方法在回归问题上表现良好，但在图像分类领域仍缺乏探索。
AI.method: 在自然图像分类任务上对VLM进行了广泛基准测试，使用了近期局部共形预测算法的开源实现。测试了测试时与校准视觉特征之间的余弦相似度，并提出了一种简单的非线性变换方法。
AI.result: 直接的余弦相似度使用不足以改善非局部基线性能。非线性变换后的余弦相似度在保持边际覆盖率保证的同时，实现了统计学上显著的平均集合大小 reduction。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的非线性变换方法在VLM局部共形预测中有效，能够在维持覆盖率保证的情况下减小集合大小。代码已开源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about applying conformal prediction to VLM-based image classification (a computer vision task), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video, extracting 3D visual guidance features, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. Although both mention Vision-Language Models, they are used for completely different application domains: image classification vs. 3D motion generation. The methods are unrelated - this paper uses conformal prediction for uncertainty quantification, while the profile needs video generation models and 3D motion generation models. This is a fundamental domain mismatch.

title: Sparsity-Inducing Divergence Losses for Biometric Verification
summary: Performance in face and speaker verification is largely driven by margin-penalty softmax losses such as CosFace and ArcFace. Recently introduced $α$-divergence loss functions offer a compelling alternative, particularly due to their ability to induce sparse solutions (when $α>1$). However, standard geometric margins are designed for the softmax function and do not naturally extend to this generalized probabilistic framework. In this paper we propose Q-Margin, a novel $α$-divergence loss that introduces a principled probabilistic margin. Unlike conventional methods that apply geometric penalties to the logits (unnormalized log-likelihoods), Q-Margin encodes the margin penalty directly into the reference measure (prior probabilities). This formulation naturally encourages discriminative embeddings while preserving the beneficial sparsity properties of the $α$-divergence. We demonstrate that Q-Margin achieves competitive or superior performance on the challenging IJB-B and IJB-C face verification benchmarks and similarly strong results in speaker verification on VoxCeleb. Crucially, against ArcFace and CosFace baselines trained under an identical recipe, Q-Margin consistently improves at low False Acceptance Rates (FARs), a capability critical for practical high-security applications. Finally, the extreme sparsity of the Q-Margin posteriors enables exact and memory-efficient training, offering a scalable solution for datasets with millions of identities.

AI.tldr: Q-Margin是一种新型α-散度损失函数，通过将边际惩罚直接编码到参考测度（先验概率）中而非logits，从而在保持α-散度稀疏性优势的同时实现判别性嵌入。该方法在人脸验证（IJB-B/C）和说话人验证（VoxCeleb）上达到先进水平，尤其在低误识率（FAR）场景下优于ArcFace和CosFace。
AI.motivation: 现有的margin-penalty softmax损失（如CosFace、ArcFace）虽性能出色，但几何边际设计针对softmax函数，无法自然推广到α-散度这一广义概率框架。α-散度损失虽能诱导稀疏解（α>1时），但缺乏与之配套的边际机制。
AI.method: 提出Q-Margin，将边际惩罚直接编码到参考测度（先验概率）中，而非传统方法那样对logits施加几何惩罚。这种公式化自然地鼓励判别性嵌入，同时保留α-散度的稀疏性优势。
AI.result: 在IJB-B和IJB-C人脸验证基准上达到竞争或超越性能；在VoxCeleb说话人验证上同样表现优异。更重要的是，在低误识率（FAR）场景下一致性地超越ArcFace和CosFace基线。此外，Q-Margin后验的极端稀疏性实现了精确且内存高效的训练。
AI.conclusion: Q-Margin成功地将边际概念融入α-散度框架，在高安全应用场景（低FAR）中展现出显著优势，同时提供了可扩展到百万级身份数据集的训练方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about biometric verification (face/speaker recognition) using margin-based loss functions for embeddings, which falls under computer vision/biometrics rather than computer graphics. The application domain is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video and video-to-3D representation. While both fields use neural networks, this paper does not address any of the specified pain points about extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, quality supervision through VLMs, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods (α-divergence losses, margin penalties) are unrelated to video generation models or 3D motion generation methods mentioned in the profile.

title: WorldRoamBench: An Open-World Benchmark for Long-Horizon Stability of Interactive World Models
summary: Despite rapid progress in interactive world models (IWMs), existing benchmarks evaluate action following only at trajectory level and ignore memory and interaction physics. We introduce WorldRoamBench, an open-world benchmark for long-horizon stability across four dimensions, each with tailored innovations: (i) Action: per-frame action metric bypassing cross-model semantic scale disparity and exposing failures hidden by trajectory; (ii) Vision: segment-based drift metric capturing non-monotonic mid-sequence collapse missed by start-vs-end comparisons; (iii) Physics: controllability-gated evaluation over mechanics, optics, and 3D consistency, scoring plausibility under faithful action execution; (iv) Memory: action-decoupled protocol evaluating scene memory via transition-localized 3D point-cloud reconstruction and subject memory via tracking-plus-VLM reasoning. The benchmark comprises 600+ test cases across Nature, Urban, and Indoor scenes in first/third-person views with WASD 10-60s continuous interaction. Evaluating 10+ open/closed-source models reveals none reliably satisfies all dimensions; even the best achieves only moderate scores. Advances on WorldRoamBench are steps toward IWMs that are stable, physically grounded, memory-faithful, and deployable in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: WorldRoamBench是一个开放世界基准测试，用于评估交互式世界模型(IWM)在长程稳定性方面的表现。该基准从四个维度进行评估：动作（逐帧动作指标）、视觉（基于分段的漂移指标）、物理（可控性门控评估）和记忆（动作解耦的场景记忆和主体记忆评估）。测试包含600多个案例，涵盖自然、城市和室内场景。评估10+模型显示目前尚无模型能在所有维度上可靠满足要求，即使最佳模型也只获得中等分数。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅在轨迹层面评估动作跟随，忽视了记忆和交互物理的评估。这一局限性导致交互式世界模型(IWM)的发展缺乏全面的性能衡量标准，无法真正评估模型在真实世界应用中的稳定性和可靠性。
AI.method: WorldRoamBench提出四个创新评估维度：(1)动作：逐帧动作指标，绕过跨模型语义尺度差异，暴露轨迹隐藏的失败；(2)视觉：基于分段的漂移指标，捕捉起点终点比较遗漏的中序列非单调崩溃；(3)物理：可控性门控评估，涵盖光学、力学和3D一致性，在忠实执行动作下评分可信度；(4)记忆：动作解耦协议，通过局部3D点云重建评估场景记忆，通过跟踪加VLM推理评估主体记忆。测试用例600+，场景涵盖自然/城市/室内，第一/第三人称视角，WASD控制10-60秒连续交互。
AI.result: 对10多个开源/闭源模型进行评估，结果显示目前尚无模型能在所有四个维度上可靠满足要求，即使最佳模型也只达到中等分数。这表明交互式世界模型在稳定性、物理接地和记忆保真度方面仍有重大改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 在WorldRoamBench上的进展将推动IWMs向稳定、物理接地、记忆保真和可部署于真实应用的方向发展。该基准填补了现有评估框架的关键空白，为未来IWM研究提供了全面的性能衡量标准。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses interactive world models for game/simulation environments (robotics, autonomous agents), which is a different application domain from the research profile focused on 3D motion synthesis from video (human/character motion generation in Computer Graphics). While both involve Vision-Language Models, the paper evaluates world model stability in open-world environments rather than bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The methods and end goals are fundamentally different - this is closer to robotics/simulation research than computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: Histogram-constrained Image Generation
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as a dominant paradigm in generative modeling, enabling high-fidelity sampling from complex data distributions. Despite impressive capabilities, controlling diffusion models to produce outputs aligned with user intent remains an open challenge, especially when balancing global coherence with local precision. Existing control mechanisms vary in the granularity of their conditioning signals. For example, textual prompts guide generation globally through high-level semantics, while ControlNet-like approaches secure precise local structure via dense conditions. In this work, we introduce Histogram-constrained Image Generation (HIG), a novel control mechanism that falls into the middle ground of control granularity. Our framework enforces user-specified distributional constraints (e.g., color histograms or latent token distributions) during the generation process with exact precision. We model such control as an optimal transport (OT) problem and apply explicit guidance transformations during sampling, thereby driving the diffusion trajectory to align with the desired histogram. We demonstrate the versatility of HIG across diverse applications, including constrained generation via color/latent histograms and high-capacity information embedding through histogram-level encoding. Our findings underscore the promise of distributional control, a flexible and interpretable control scheme that is fully compatible with existing control mechanisms, diversifying the hybrid strategies for controllable image generation. Our project page is available at: https://maps-research.github.io/hig/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Histogram-constrained Image Generation (HIG)，一种在扩散模型生成过程中强制执行用户指定的分布约束（如颜色直方图或潜在token分布）的新控制机制，介于全局语义引导和局部结构控制之间的中等粒度控制方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型控制机制在粒度上存在差异：文本提示提供全局语义引导，ControlNet等方法提供精确的局部结构控制，但缺乏中间粒度的控制方案。如何在保持全局一致性的同时实现局部精确控制仍是一个开放挑战。
AI.method: 将分布约束控制建模为最优传输(OT)问题，并在采样过程中应用显式引导变换，驱动扩散轨迹与期望直方图对齐。该方法可与现有控制机制完全兼容。
AI.result: 展示了HIG在多种应用中的通用性，包括通过颜色/潜在直方图的约束生成，以及通过直方图级别编码的高容量信息嵌入。
AI.conclusion: 分布控制是一种灵活且可解释的控制方案，完全兼容现有控制机制，为可控图像生成提供了多样化的混合策略。项目页面已发布。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 2D image generation using histogram constraints in diffusion models, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. Even though both use diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - this paper generates 2D images while the profile requires 3D motion generation from video. The pain points involve extracting 3D visual guidance, video-to-3D motion bridging, and VLM-based quality supervision, none of which are addressed by this image generation paper. This represents a classic case of similar methods (diffusion) used in entirely different application domains.

title: Look But Don't Touch with Sparse Autoencoders for Unlearning in Diffusion Models
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have recently been proposed as interpretable tools for concept-level manipulation, under the assumption that isolated features can serve as controllable intervention points. In this work, we systematically evaluate this assumption in the context of object erasure and steering in diffusion models. We show that while SAEs reliably detect and localize semantic concepts within diffusion model activations, direct intervention in their latent space frequently induces out-of-distribution activations, resulting in severe visual artifacts. To disentangle detection from intervention, we use SAE activations purely as semantic detectors to identify image regions containing the target object, and replace those patch embeddings with the ones that do not contain it. This detection-based replacement preserves the diffusion model's activation statistics and produces significantly cleaner erasure results than latent steering. Our findings reveal a fundamental gap between concept detection and concept intervention in diffusion models: monosemantic or sparse features are not inherently suitable as control knobs for steering. These results position SAEs as powerful interpretability tools for analyzing generative models, but highlight important limitations when used for direct manipulation, such as unlearning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了稀疏自编码器(SAE)在扩散模型中用于概念擦除和引导的假设，发现SAE虽能可靠检测和定位语义概念，但直接干预其潜在空间会导致分布外激活和严重视觉 artifacts。提出基于检测的替换方法可保留扩散模型激活统计特性，产生更干净的擦除结果。
AI.motivation: 验证SAE能否作为概念级操纵的可控干预点，特别是用于扩散模型中的物体擦除和引导
AI.method: 将SAE激活纯粹作为语义检测器，识别包含目标物体的图像区域，用不含该物体的patch嵌入替换这些区域
AI.result: 检测-based替换方法保留扩散模型激活统计特性，比潜在引导产生明显更干净的擦除结果
AI.conclusion: monosemantic/sparse特征本质上不适合作为引导控制旋钮，SAE是强大的可解释性工具但用于直接操作(如unlearning)存在重要局限

relevance_reason: This paper is about using sparse autoencoders for concept erasure/unlearning in 2D image generation (diffusion models for image manipulation). This is completely different from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video, extracting 3D visual guidance features, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. While both involve diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different - image editing vs. 3D human motion generation. The paper doesn't address any of the stated pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM-based quality supervision for motion, video-to-3D motion bridging).

title: JL1-CC&QA: Extending the JL1-CD Benchmark with Change Captioning and Question Answering
summary: Remote sensing change detection (CD) traditionally focuses on pixel-level binary segmentation, which identifies where changes occur but neither what nor why. To bridge this semantic gap, we introduce JL1-CC&QA, a multi-task benchmark that extends the JL1-CD dataset with two complementary annotation layers: change captioning (CC) and change question answering (QA). Built upon 5,000 bi-temporal image pairs acquired by the Jilin-1 satellite at 0.5-0.75m ground sample distance, the benchmark comprises: (i) JL1-CC, providing 17,021 quality-verified captions that describe diverse land-cover transformations; and (ii) JL1-QA, offering 20,060 question-answer pairs across eight question types, enabling fine-grained, interactive interrogation of surface changes. All annotations are produced via a three-stage pipeline consisting of multi-modal large language model (LLM) generation, vision-grounded LLM judging, and human expert verification. We hope that JL1-CC&QA, as a benchmark unifying binary change masks, change captions, and change-oriented QA over the same image set, will serve as a valuable resource for the community to advance multi-task change understanding in remote sensing. The dataset is available at https://github.com/circleLZY/JL1-CD.

AI.tldr: JL1-CC&QA是一个多任务遥感变化检测基准数据集，在JL1-CD基础上新增变化描述（Captioning）和变化问答（QA）两个注释层，包含5000对双时相图像、17021条变化描述和20060个问答对，旨在弥补传统变化检测只回答"哪里变化"而无法回答"发生了什么变化"和"为什么变化"的语义鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 传统遥感变化检测仅关注像素级二值分割，只能识别变化发生的位置，但无法理解变化的语义内容（即发生了什么变化）和变化原因。为弥补这一语义差距，研究团队提出构建一个统一的多任务变化理解基准数据集。
AI.method: 使用吉林一号卫星（0.5-0.75米分辨率）获取的5000对双时相图像，采用三阶段注释 pipeline：1）多模态大语言模型生成初步注释；2）视觉 grounded LLM 判断；3）人类专家验证，确保注释质量。
AI.result: 构建了包含17021条质量验证的变化描述（JL1-CC）和20060个问答对（JL1-QA，涵盖8种问题类型）的多任务基准数据集，可同时支持二值变化掩膜、变化描述和变化导向的问答任务。
AI.conclusion: JL1-CC&QA作为首个统一二值变化掩膜、变化描述和变化问答的遥感数据集，为社区推进多任务变化理解研究提供了有价值的资源，有望推动遥感变化检测从像素级识别向语义级理解的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing change detection using satellite imagery, completely unrelated to the research profile. While both use Vision-Language Models, the application domains are entirely different: the paper focuses on Earth observation and semantic change detection (what changed in satellite images), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video input, extracting 3D visual guidance features, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The methods, data (satellite images vs human motion video), and goals have no overlap. A score of 5 is given as it's in a completely different field (remote sensing vs computer graphics).

title: What Memory Do GUI Agents Really Need? From Passive Records to Active Task-Driving States
summary: Mobile GUI agents increasingly face long-horizon tasks that require reading, updating, and reusing task-relevant data across pages and applications. Existing memory methods treat memory largely as passive storage, where past observations are accumulated and retrieved when needed. Yet retrieving a value does not reveal its current role in the workflow. The agent must still infer from accumulated records whether the value should be used now, has already been used, or must wait for a later dependency. This implicit reconstruction becomes unreliable in long trajectories with similar fields, repeated values, distractors, and outdated states, causing repeated or missed operations. We propose Active Task Driving Memory (ATMem), which shifts GUI-agent memory from passive storage to an actively maintained execution state. ATMem maintains task-relevant information as a continually updated execution state that links each value to its role and current status, enabling action selection based on the current workflow state. We therefore introduce \textbf{STR-GRPO}, an online reinforcement learning method that learns to use ATMem selectively according to its contribution to task completion. STR-GRPO contrasts memory-on and memory-off rollouts to estimate when memory use improves execution, while memory-cost-aware reward discourages costly memory usage that does not improve execution. To evaluate whether agents can complete all in-scope work while avoiding out-of-scope actions over long-horizon execution, we build a challenging mobile benchmark. From a list of near identical entries, agents must act on every entry that satisfies the instruction and reject entries that violate its constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATMem和STR-GRPO来解决移动GUI代理在长程任务中的记忆问题。ATMem将被动存储转变为主动维护的执行状态，跟踪每个值的角色和状态；STR-GRPO通过在线强化学习学会选择性使用记忆。构建了新的移动端基准测试评估方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆方法将记忆视为被动存储，仅在需要时检索过去的观察结果，但检索值并不能揭示其在工作流中的当前角色。代理仍需从累积记录中推断当前是否应使用该值、已使用过或需等待后续依赖。这种隐式重建在长轨迹中变得不可靠，特别是存在相似字段、重复值、干扰项和过时状态时，会导致重复操作或遗漏操作。
AI.method: 提出两种核心技术：1)主动任务驱动记忆(ATMem)：将记忆从被动存储转变为主动维护的执行状态，跟踪每个值的角色和当前状态，使代理能够根据当前工作流状态选择行动；2)STR-GRPO：在线强化学习方法，通过对比记忆开启和关闭的 rollout来估计记忆使用何时能改善执行效果，同时引入记忆成本感知奖励来惩罚不必要的记忆使用。
AI.result: 代理能够完成范围内所有工作的同时，避免在长程执行中产生范围外动作。该基准测试要求代理从几乎相同的条目中，对每个满足指令的条目执行操作，并拒绝违反约束的条目。
AI.conclusion: 实验构建了一个具有挑战性的移动端基准测试，从几乎相同的条目中智能选择满足指令的条目并拒绝违反约束的条目。ATMem通过将被动存储转变为主动维护的执行状态，显著提升了长程任务中GUI代理的可靠性。STR-GRPO方法有效学习了何时使用记忆能够提升任务执行效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agents for mobile GUI navigation and memory systems, which is in the domain of AI/HCI. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video, video generation models, and visual feature extraction. The application domains are completely different - the paper deals with GUI automation while the profile deals with 3D graphics and motion generation. There is no overlap in methods or goals.

title: Breaking Failure Cascades: Step-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Medical Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Recent multimodal large language models have shown great promise in clinical image reasoning, but existing post-training pipelines remain predominantly outcome-centric, relying on final answer correctness or sequence-level preferences. This suffers from sparse credit assignment, making it difficult to optimize the reasoning process essential for clinical applications. Our analysis reveals that cascading errors from early-stage reasoning failures are a leading cause of incorrect predictions in medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks. Motivated by this, we propose Medical Reasoning-aware Policy Optimization (MRPO), an RL algorithm that incorporates step-wise process rewards. When the final answer is incorrect, MRPO assigns exponentially larger penalties to tokens in earlier invalid reasoning steps, breaking failure cascades without compromising successful paths. Across three multimodal LLM backbones, MRPO consistently outperforms standard GRPO and a recent RL baseline, and on Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct even surpasses substantially larger medical MLLMs such as HuatuoGPT-Vision-34B by 2.79 points. Moreover, MRPO reduces early-stage reasoning failures from 64.0% to 13.0%, showing that targeted mitigation of cascading failures improves both reasoning quality and final answer accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/dmis-lab/MRPO

AI.tldr: MRPO是一种结合逐步过程奖励的强化学习算法，用于优化医学多模态大语言模型的推理过程，通过对早期无效推理步骤分配指数级惩罚来打破失败级联。
AI.motivation: 现有后训练管道主要结果导向（最终答案正确性或序列级偏好），存在稀疏信用分配问题，难以优化临床应用所需的推理过程。早期推理失败导致的级联错误是医学VQA预测错误的主要原因。
AI.method: 提出Medical Reasoning-aware Policy Optimization (MRPO)算法，结合逐步过程奖励。当最终答案不正确时，MRPO对早期无效推理步骤中的token分配指数级更大的惩罚，打破失败级联而不影响成功路径。
AI.result: 在三个多模态LLM backbone上，MRPO始终优于标准GRPO和最近的RL基线。在Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct上超越HuatuoGPT-Vision-34B达2.79分。早期推理失败从64.0%降至13.0%。
AI.conclusion: 有针对性地缓解级联失败可显著提高推理质量和最终答案准确性，MRPO为医学多模态大语言模型的推理过程优化提供了有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Medical VQA (Visual Question Answering) and healthcare AI, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. Although both use Vision-Language Models, the application domain is entirely different - medical reasoning vs. 3D motion generation from video. The paper focuses on breaking failure cascades in clinical reasoning, not on extracting 3D visual features, motion synthesis, or any computer graphics tasks.

title: Robust Autonomous UAV Landing on Maritime Platforms via Multimodal Agentic AI and Active Wave Compensation
summary: Autonomous aerial inspection of marine infrastructure is frequently compromised by stochastic sea states, introducing risks of high-kinetic impacts, post-landing toppling, and sensory occlusion. This paper proposes a decoupled, multi-vehicle landing framework synchronizing an Unmanned Surface Vehicle (USV) equipped with a 3-RPU stabilized platform with a robust Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV). The architecture utilizes two independent Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) agents: a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) agent providing high-frequency wave-motion compensation for the landing deck, and a multimodal RL agent for the UAVs final approach. Evaluated in high-fidelity maritime simulations, the system achieved a 100% landing success rate across 15 trials in wave states varying from calm to rough. Results show a mean stabilization efficacy of 87.8%, maintaining the landing surface within 1 degree of the horizontal plane for 96% of the mission duration in rough conditions, effectively contributing to safer landings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向海洋基础设施的无人机自主降落的解耦式多车协同框架，通过USV搭载3-RPU稳定平台结合两个深度强化学习智能体实现波激运动补偿和无人机最终进近，在高保真仿真中实现了100%降落成功率。
AI.motivation: 海洋环境中随机海况导致自主 aerial 检查任务面临高动能撞击、降落倾覆和感官遮挡等风险，现有方法难以有效应对动态海面带来的挑战。
AI.method: 构建解耦式多车协同框架，包含USV搭载的3-RPU稳定平台和鲁棒无人机；采用两个独立深度强化学习智能体——Soft Actor-Critic(SAC)智能体提供高频波激运动补偿，多模态RL智能体负责无人机最终进近。
AI.result: 在15次试验中实现100%降落成功率，海况从平静到恶劣；恶劣条件下平均稳定效率87.8%，96%的任务时间内降落面保持1度以内水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统能有效补偿海面运动，显著提升海洋环境下无人机降落安全性，为自主海洋基础设施检测提供可行方案。

relevance_reason: This is a robotics/control systems paper about UAV autonomous landing on maritime platforms, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile targets 3D motion synthesis from video and visual content generation, while this paper addresses drone landing control using reinforcement learning. The application domains are entirely different - computer graphics/motion synthesis vs autonomous robotic systems. Despite mentioning "multimodal AI," the methods (SAC, deep RL) are for control rather than visual content generation or 3D motion synthesis from video priors.

title: Real-Time Source-Free Object Detection
summary: Real-world detectors for autonomous driving, surveillance, and robotics must handle domain-shifts under strict latency and memory constraints, yet existing source-free object detection (SFOD) methods rely on heavyweight architectures that prioritize accuracy alone. We show this trade-off is unnecessary: building on YOLOv10, an NMS-free dual-head detector, we achieve state-of-the-art adaptation accuracy while being faster and more compact. We observe that directly applying vanilla mean-teacher self-training to dual-head detectors leads to suboptimal adaptation performance due to two key factors. First, simple pseudo-label generation strategies, such as using a single head or directly combining high-confidence predictions from both heads, yield suboptimal supervision under domain-shift. We propose DHF (Dual-Head Pseudo-Label Fusion) which selectively admits one-to-one (O2O) and one-to-many (O2M) head predictions, preserving precision and recovering missed objects. Second, we observe domain-shift collapses multi-scale feature discriminability. We propose the use of our MARD (Multi-scale Adaptive Representation Diversification) loss which mitigates this by enforcing detection-aware variance and covariance constraints on multi-scale feature maps. Both modules are training-time only, leaving inference unchanged. Across domain-shift benchmarks, our method, RT-SFOD yields 1.4 to 3.5\% mAP gains, 1.3$\times$ higher throughput, with $\sim$2$\times$ fewer parameters than prior state-of-the-art SFOD methods, thus advancing the Pareto frontier of the speed-accuracy-model size trade-off. We report main results with YOLOv10, and demonstrate generalizability with additional YOLO- and DETR-based dual-head detectors. Code is available here: https://github.com/Sairam13001/RT-SFOD/

AI.tldr: RT-SFOD是一种基于YOLOv10的无源域目标检测方法，通过双头伪标签融合(DHF)和多尺度自适应表征分化(MARD)损失，在domain-shift基准测试中实现了1.4%至3.5%的mAP提升，吞吐量提高1.3倍，参数减少约2倍。
AI.motivation: 现有无源域目标检测(SFOD)方法依赖重量级架构，优先考虑精度而忽视延迟和内存约束，导致速度-精度-模型大小的权衡不理想。需要一种在严格延迟和内存约束下处理域迁移的轻量级高效检测器。
AI.method: 1. 基于YOLOv10（无NMS的双头检测器）构建；2. 提出DHF（双头伪标签融合）：选择性融合一头对一(O2O)和一头对多(O2M)预测，保留精度并恢复遗漏物体；3. 提出MARD（多尺度自适应表征分化）损失：通过检测感知的方差和协方差约束增强多尺度特征可分性；4. 两模块仅在训练时使用，推理时无改变。
AI.result: 在域迁移基准测试中，RT-SFOD相比此前最优SFOD方法实现：mAP提升1.4-3.5%，吞吐量提高1.3倍，参数量减少约2倍。方法在YOLOv10及YOLO和DETR系列双头检测器上均具有泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 基于YOLOv10的RT-SFOD方法成功推进了速度-精度-模型大小的帕累托前沿，证明了轻量级架构也能实现最优的域适应精度，同时保持高效率。DHF和MARD两个训练时模块可有效解决双头检测器在域迁移下的性能问题。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about real-time source-free object detection using YOLOv10, which is a fundamental computer vision task (object detection/recognition). This has NO connection to the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation, or computer graphics. The methods (YOLOv10, dual-head detection, pseudo-labeling) are completely different from the required methods (VLM, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation). Object detection is not computer graphics, and this paper does not address any of the pain points related to 3D motion synthesis or visual guidance feature extraction for motion generation.

title: PrISM-IQA: Image Quality Assessment Made Practical for Smartphone Photography
summary: Existing smartphone image quality assessment (IQA) methods commonly reduce perceptual quality to a single score. However, this scalar formulation is poorly aligned with practical image signal processor (ISP) tuning, where engineers must identify specific quality issues, estimate their severities, and determine whether they are acceptable or require intervention. In this work, we introduce a Practical ISP-aware Structured Model for IQA (PrISM-IQA), which reformulates smartphone IQA as a multi-issue ordinal diagnosis problem. Rather than regressing a single quality score, PrISM-IQA predicts an \textit{ordered} severity level -- absent, minor, severe, or critical -- for each ISP-relevant issue, covering both global image-level artifacts and local content-dependent defects. To produce logically consistent predictions, PrISM-IQA combines cumulative ordinal encoding with structured inference that captures within-issue monotonicity as well as cross-issue subsumption and exclusion relations. We evaluate PrISM-IQA on a reconstructed SPAQ benchmark annotated with $53$ ISP-relevant quality issues and on a small-scale expert-annotated real-world dataset. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of PrISM-IQA for practical issue-level diagnosis, reveal transferable perceptual quality representations through linear probing, and further show how its predictions can support actionable and meaningful ISP tuning.

AI.tldr: PrISM-IQA将智能手机图像质量评估(IQA)重新定义为多问题序数诊断问题，不再预测单一质量分数，而是预测每个ISP相关问题的有序严重程度级别(无、轻度、重度或严重)，并结合累积序数编码与结构化推理来产生逻辑一致的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有智能手机IQA方法通常将感知质量简化为单一分数，这种标量公式与实际的ISP调优工作流程不符，因为工程师需要识别特定质量问题、评估其严重程度并确定是否需要干预。
AI.method: 提出PrISM-IQA模型，结合累积序数编码与结构化推理，捕获问题内单调性以及跨问题包含和排除关系，预测53个ISP相关质量问题的有序严重程度级别。
AI.result: 在重建的SPAQ基准测试和专家标注的真实世界数据集上验证，表明PrISM-IQA能有效进行实际问题级诊断，通过线性探测揭示可迁移的感知质量表示，其预测可支持可操作的ISP调优。
AI.conclusion: PrISM-IQA成功将IQA从单一分数预测转变为多问题有序诊断，为ISP调优提供了更实用、更具可操作性的质量评估框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Image Quality Assessment (IQA) for smartphone photography, which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are fundamentally different - one deals with assessing photograph quality for ISP tuning, while the other deals with extracting 3D motion from video. Even though both relate to images/video, the goals are entirely different: computer graphics/motion generation vs. image quality assessment. The methods also don't align - the profile needs VLM, video generation, and 3D motion models, while this paper uses cumulative ordinal encoding for ISP quality problems.

title: Attend, Transform, or Silence: Operator-Level Visual Skipping for Efficient Multimodal LLM Inference
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) increasingly process long visual-token sequences, increasing the overall inference computation. Existing acceleration methods usually remove visual tokens or skip visual-token updates in entire layers, but these coarse strategies may discard fine-grained evidence or suppress useful operators together with redundant ones. In this paper, we study visual-token computation from an answer-observable perspective and find that late visual-token updates can remain large while having little effect on answer-token representations. Motivated by this answer-silent redundancy, we decompose each Transformer layer into attention and FFN operators and show that useful visual computation is often operator-dominant and layer-dependent. We propose an operator-level visual-token skipping framework that preserves the full visual-token sequence while selectively bypassing redundant attention, FFN, or both. Experiments across three MLLM architectures and 10 VQA benchmarks show that our method achieves strong efficiency-accuracy trade-offs, reducing \textbf{33.7\%} TFLOPs on Qwen3-VL while retaining \textbf{99.5\%} of the vanilla model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种运算符级视觉token跳过框架，通过选择性绕过冗余的注意力、FFN或两者来处理长视觉token序列，在Qwen3-VL上减少33.7% TFLOPs的同时保留99.5%性能。
AI.motivation: 现有加速方法通常移除整个视觉token或跳过整层视觉token更新，这些粗粒度策略可能丢弃细粒度证据。作者从答案可观察角度发现，后期视觉token更新可能对答案token表示影响很小，存在答案静默冗余。
AI.method: 将每个Transformer层分解为注意力和FFN运算符，提出运算符级视觉token跳过框架，在保留完整视觉token序列的同时选择性绕过冗余的注意力、FFN或两者。
AI.result: 在三种MLLM架构和10个VQA基准测试中实现强效率-精度权衡，Qwen3-VL上减少33.7% TFLOPs，保留99.5% vanilla模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过运算符级跳过策略，该方法在显著降低计算量的同时保持接近原始模型的性能，为多模态大语言模型的高效推理提供了有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about efficient inference optimization for Multimodal LLMs (reducing TFLOPs through visual token skipping), which is a computer systems/AI optimization topic. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion synthesis from video input, extracting 3D visual guidance features, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. These are completely different application domains. While both mention "Vision-Language Models," the paper's method addresses computational efficiency, not 3D motion synthesis, video generation, or any of the specified pain points. This is a generic VLM optimization paper unrelated to computer graphics or 3D motion generation.

title: LiteMatch: Lightweight Zero-Shot Stereo Matching via Cost Volume Stabilization
summary: Despite rapid progress in learning-based stereo matching, high accuracy is often achieved at the cost of heavy backbones and computationally intensive 3D cost volume processing, resulting in substantial memory and runtime overhead. More critically, these methods frequently struggle to generalize across domains, limiting their practical deployment. We present \textit{LiteMatch}, a lightweight stereo matching framework that achieves strong zero-shot generalization through cost volume stabilization-without expensive 3D convolutions. LiteMatch employs two complementary encoders: a Cross-View Correspondence Encoder (CVCE) to capture global cross-view interactions, and a High-Frequency Encoder (HFE) that enhances fine structural details via FFT-based frequency cues. To stabilize the cost volume, we introduce the \textit{Cost Volume Consistency Loss (CVC-Loss)}, a voxel-wise binary cross-entropy objective applied to softmax-normalized cost distributions. By encouraging sharp and unimodal disparity probabilities, CVC-Loss promotes stable cost distributions and enables rapid convergence. A lightweight refinement module further produces sharp full-resolution disparities with low-iteration updates, avoiding heavy recurrent refinement. With a flexible design ranging from 3.36M to 9.58M parameters, LiteMatch achieves exceptional zero-shot generalization, delivering competitive EPE and D1 performance across Scene Flow, KITTI, Middlebury, ETH3D, and DrivingStereo. Our results establish that lightweight architectures can indeed generalize across domains without sacrificing accuracy. \href{https://mdraqibkhan.github.io/Litematch}{\textcolor{blue}{Code}}

AI.tldr: LiteMatch是一个轻量级立体匹配框架，通过成本体稳定化实现强零样本泛化，无需昂贵的3D卷积。包含两个互补编码器：交叉视图对应编码器(CVCE)和高频编码器(HFE)，以及CVC-Loss损失函数和轻量级细化模块。
AI.motivation: 当前基于学习的立体匹配方法需要繁重的骨干网络和计算密集的3D成本体处理，导致内存和运行时间开销大。更关键的是，这些方法经常难以跨域泛化，限制了其实际部署。
AI.method: 采用两个互补编码器：CVCE捕获全局交叉视图交互，HFE通过FFT频率线索增强精细结构细节；引入CVC-Loss（针对softmax归一化成本分布的体素级二值交叉熵），鼓励尖锐且单峰的视差概率；轻量级细化模块生成清晰的全分辨率视差。
AI.result: 参数范围3.36M至9.58M，在Scene Flow、KITTI、Middlebury、ETH3D和DrivingStereo上实现卓越零样本泛化，获得具有竞争力的EPE和D1性能。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级架构确实可以跨域泛化而不牺牲精度。

relevance_reason: The paper is about stereo matching (depth estimation from stereo images), while the research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video. These are completely different application domains within Computer Graphics. Stereo matching estimates depth from static image pairs, whereas motion synthesis generates animated 3D motion sequences from video input. The paper uses traditional CNN-based stereo matching methods, not the Video Generation Models, VLMs, or 3D Motion Generation Models mentioned in the profile.

title: Technical Report of RoboSpatial Challenge at CVPR 2026: Selective Reasoning Activation and Reference-Frame Disambiguation for Embodied Spatial Reasoning
summary: Vision-language models achieve strong general perception but often struggle with the spatial reasoning required for embodied tasks. We present RoboSpatialBrain, our submission to the RoboSpatial Challenge at the Embodied Reasoning in Action Workshop, CVPR 2026, built on RoboBrain2.5-8B-NV. RoboSpatialBrain combines two training-free, inference-time mechanisms: a forced <think> prefix activation strategy paired with a task-specific post-prompt that elicits deliberate reasoning on context and compatibility tasks, and an explicit reference-frame redirection pipeline that resolves camera-centric and object-centric ambiguity for context tasks. We additionally explore fine-tuning RoboBrain2.5 on compatibility data and present a detailed analysis of its interaction with prompting. RoboSpatialBrain achieved first place in the RoboSpatial Challenge, with an overall success rate of 80.9\% on RoboSpatial-Home. Code is available at https://github.com/YuxiangXie2003/RoboSpatialBrain.

AI.tldr: RoboSpatialBrain是一个基于RoboBrain2.5-8B-NV的视觉语言模型，用于解决具身任务中的空间推理问题。该方法结合两种推理机制：强制思考前缀激活策略配合任务特定后提示，以及显式参考帧重定向管道。系统在RoboSpatial挑战赛中获得第一名，RoboSpatial-Home上成功率达80.9%。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型虽然在通用感知方面表现优异，但在具身任务所需的空间推理方面往往存在困难。现有模型难以处理上下文任务中的相机中心与物体中心的歧义问题，以及兼容性任务的推理需求。
AI.method: 提出两种免训练的推理时机制：1) 强制思考前缀激活策略配合任务特定后提示，引出模型对上下文和兼容性任务的深思熟虑推理；2) 显式参考帧重定向管道，解决相机中心和物体中心的歧义问题。此外还探索了在兼容性数据上微调RoboBrain2.5模型，并分析了其与提示策略的交互效果。
AI.result: RoboSpatialBrain在CVPR 2026具身推理行动研讨会的RoboSpatial挑战赛中获得第一名，在RoboSpatial-Home数据集上达到80.9%的总体成功率。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合推理时机制和微调策略，RoboSpatialBrain有效提升了视觉语言模型在空间推理任务上的性能，为具身智能任务提供了新的解决方案。代码已开源。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The paper is about embodied AI/robotics spatial reasoning (disambiguating camera-centered vs object-centered frames for robot tasks), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video. The paper uses VLM but for ROBOTICS task completion (80.9% success on RoboSpatial-Home), not for visual feature extraction or motion generation in computer graphics context. This is a robotics paper, not a computer graphics/motion generation paper.

title: LUNA: Learning Universal 3D Human Animation Beyond Skinning
summary: Creating photorealistic, animatable 3D human avatars from monocular images still largely depends on Linear Blend Skinning (LBS) and parametric body models, which constrain expressivity and often introduce artifacts due to imperfect fitting. We propose LUNA, an LBS-free universal neural animation model that directly maps multiple 2D controls like images, keypoints, sketches, and unseen characters into 3D Gaussian deformations, bypassing explicit body fitting. At its core, a transformer-based motion regressor disentangles global rigid motion from fine-grained local dynamics to capture both coherent movement and subtle non-rigid effects. To resolve the inherent ambiguity of 2D-to-3D lifting while scaling beyond fitted datasets, we introduce hybrid supervision that distills soft structural priors from an LBS teacher and a loss that supports training on both limited fitted data and large in-the-wild unlabeled videos. Extensive experiments show LUNA achieves competitive visual fidelity compared to LBS-based approaches, while delivering realistic human motion and zero-shot cross-identity generalization across diverse driving modalities. To the best of our knowledge, LUNA is the first end-to-end 3D animatable model that supports implicit 2D driving.

AI.tldr: LUNA是一个无需线性混合蒙皮(LBS)的通用神经动画模型,直接从多种2D控制信号(图像、关键点、草图等)映射到3D高斯变形,实现逼真的人类动作动画。
AI.motivation: 解决现有方法依赖LBS和参数化身体模型所带来的表达力受限和伪影问题,以及2D到3D提升的模糊性和数据标注难题。
AI.method: 核心是一个基于transformer的运动回归器,将全局刚性运动与细粒度局部动态分离;引入混合监督机制,从LBS教师模型提取软结构先验,并支持有限标注数据和大规模野外无标签视频的训练。
AI.result: LUNA实现了与LBS方法相当的视觉保真度,同时提供逼真的人类动作和跨身份零样本泛化能力,是首个支持隐式2D驱动的端到端3D可动画化模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了无需显式身体模型拟合的端到端神经动画可行性,为3D人类动画领域提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: While this paper addresses 3D human animation in Computer Graphics and tackles 2D-to-3D mapping, it doesn't align well with the specific research profile. The profile focuses on extracting guidance from VIDEO priors and using Vision-Language Models for quality supervision, but LUNA uses 2D control signals (images, keypoints, sketches) without video-specific processing or VLM integration. LUNA is about neural animation beyond LBS skinning, not about video-to-3D motion synthesis. The paper is moderately relevant as it's in the same general domain (3D human motion/animation) but doesn't address the specific pain points of video-based motion extraction and VLM-based quality control mentioned in the research profile.

title: FLORA: A deep learning approach to predict forest attributes from heterogeneous LiDAR data
summary: Forest attributes are essential for national-scale resource monitoring. Airborne LiDAR metrics are among the auxiliary variables most strongly correlated with forest attributes used in National Forest Inventory (NFI) estimates. However, producing wall-to-wall predictions remains challenging when LiDAR data are acquired under heterogeneous conditions. As national LiDAR programs expand across Europe, variability in sensors, flight parameters, seasons, and scan angles limits the robustness of existing models, which are often calibrated for local conditions. We present FLORA (Forest LiDAR Octree Regression with Auxiliary Data), a deep learning framework that predicts six forest attributes: dominant height, total volume, deciduous volume, coniferous volume, basal area, and stem density from heterogeneous LiDAR point clouds. FLORA combines an octree-based backbone with ecological and spatiotemporal auxiliary variables through a late-fusion gating mechanism. Models are trained and evaluated on 32,052 National Forest Inventory plots across mainland France using data from the French LiDAR HD program. A single model trained on both leaf-on and leaf-off acquisitions outperforms season-specific models and improves cross-season robustness. Auxiliary variables provide modest overall gains but contribute more strongly to species-specific volume prediction. FLORA achieves an rRMSE of about 12.3% (R2 = 0.88) for dominant height and 39% (R2 = 0.74) for total volume, providing a robust baseline for large-scale forest attribute estimation from heterogeneous national LiDAR programs.

AI.tldr: FLORA是一个深度学习框架，用于从异构激光雷达点云预测森林属性，解决了欧洲国家激光雷达计划中传感器、飞行参数、季节和扫描角变化带来的模型稳健性问题。
AI.motivation: 国家激光雷达计划的扩展导致数据获取条件异构（传感器、飞行参数、季节、扫描角不同），现有模型通常针对当地条件校准，难以生成稳健的全国尺度预测。
AI.method: 结合八叉树骨干网络与生态和时空辅助变量，通过后期融合门控机制；使用法国32,052个国家森林Inventory样地数据进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 单一模型在落叶和常绿 acquisitions上训练优于季节特定模型；辅助变量提供适度整体增益，但对特定物种材积预测贡献更大；优势高度rRMSE约12.3%（R²=0.88），总体积rRMSE约39%（R²=0.74）。
AI.conclusion: FLORA为异构国家激光雷达项目的大规模森林属性估计提供了稳健基线，表明跨季节训练可提高模型泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about forestry/remote sensing applications - predicting forest attributes (tree height, volume) from LiDAR point cloud data for national forest inventories. The application domain (forestry) has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or 3D motion synthesis from video. The research profile focuses on Vision-Language Models, video-to-3D motion generation, and visual feature extraction for human motion, while this paper deals with ecological/spatiotemporal variables for forest attribute prediction. No methodological or domain overlap whatsoever.

title: SAMBA: A Scatter-Guided Masked Bidirectional Mamba Foundation Model for SAR Target Recognition
summary: Synthetic aperture radar automatic target recognition (SAR ATR) is critical for Earth observation and defense, but its practical deployment is constrained by scarce annotated training data. Self-supervised pre-training alleviates this label bottleneck, yet prevailing Transformer architectures incur prohibitive quadratic computational complexity, and conventional universal masking neglects the unique electromagnetic scattering properties intrinsic to SAR imagery. To address these limitations, we propose SAMBA (Scattering-Guided Bidirectional Mamba), an efficient self-supervised pre-training foundation model for SAR target interpretation. Our framework features three core innovations: (i) a linear-complexity Mamba encoder with a mid-sequence class token to mitigate computational bottlenecks; (ii) a three-level hierarchical Scattering-Guided Masked Autoencoder (SG-MAE) masking strategy guided by SAR physical priors, aligning the pretext task with SAR's intrinsic imaging mechanism; (iii) a lightweight SpatialMix feature interaction module to enhance cross-region feature fusion. We also design a two-stage cross-domain pre-training pipeline to optimize the overall pre-training process. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SAMBA consistently delivers superior performance across all pre-training configurations, with substantially fewer parameters than both CNN and Transformer baselines. Compared with the default masking strategy in standard MAE, the proposed SG-MAE strategy further boosts the model's few-shot transfer capability. Benchmarking on seven downstream datasets covering classification and detection tasks shows SAMBA achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on most metrics, fully validating its robust generalizability across diverse SAR interpretation tasks. Source code and pre-trained weights are publicly available at https://github.com/mynswkk/SAMBA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAMBA（Scattering-Guided Bidirectional Mamba），一种用于SAR目标解释的高效自监督预训练基础模型，旨在解决SAR ATR中标注数据稀缺、Transformer计算复杂度高等问题。
AI.motivation: SAR ATR在实际部署中受限于稀缺的标注训练数据；现有Transformer架构存在二次计算复杂度问题；传统通用掩码策略忽视了SAR图像独特的电磁散射特性。
AI.method: 提出三大核心创新：(i) 线性复杂度的Mamba编码器配合中序列类令牌；(ii) 三层层次化散射引导掩码自编码器(SG-MAE)，基于SAR物理先验设计；(iii) 轻量级SpatialMix特征交互模块增强跨区域特征融合。采用两阶段跨域预训练流程。
AI.result: SAMBA在所有预训练配置下均表现优异，参数远少于CNN和Transformer基线模型；SG-MAE策略相比标准MAE掩码策略显著提升了模型的少样本迁移能力；在七个下游数据集的分类和检测任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SAMBA成功验证了其在多样化SAR解释任务中的强大泛化能力，为SAR领域提供了一种高效的自监督预训练基础模型方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) target recognition in remote sensing, which is completely unrelated to the research profile in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video. While both deal with visual processing, the application domains are fundamentally different: the profile requires human motion/video-to-3D generation methods, while this paper addresses SAR image classification and recognition. The methods (Mamba, scatter-guided masking for SAR physics) are specific to remote sensing and do not apply to 3D motion generation. This represents a case of using similar foundational AI techniques but in entirely different application domains.

title: REDI: Corpus Aware Patch Ranking for DINOv3 Token Reduction
summary:
Most token reduction methods for Vision Transformers seek favorable tradeoffs between accuracy and efficiency by pruning, merging, or pooling patch tokens. REDI (Relevance for DINOv3 Token Reduction) studies this question through a controlled supervised reference: how should a fixed token budget be allocated across patches for image classification? REDI quantizes final block DINOv3 patch representations into a visual vocabulary and derives class conditioned corpus scores using supervised TF-IDF over visual words. For each validation image, the ground truth class selects a row of the TF-IDF table, and four transformed views produce a TF-IDF map aligned to a reference center crop. A separate dense pass on the same crop provides an attention map. After independent min max normalization, their elementwise product defines the REDI score. A fixed keep, merge, and compress operator then uses score rank to assign patch roles and score magnitude to weight merging and compression.
  With precomputed REDI scores, a frozen DINOv3 ViT-B/16 backbone, and the same linear classifier used for dense evaluation, the operator reduces the sequence length from 201 to 107 tokens, a 46.8% sequence reduction. The REDI variant based on incoming attention mass achieves 84.706% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, compared with 83.514% for the dense baseline, 82.634% for incoming attention mass alone, and 81.796% for supervised TF-IDF alone. The same corpus term also improves reduced classification for three alternative attention formulations relative to their attention only counterparts. Together, these controlled comparisons indicate that class specific corpus statistics and image specific attention provide complementary signals for patch ranking in this setting.

AI.tldr: REDI提出了一种用于Vision Transformer的token reduction方法，通过结合监督TF-IDF和注意力机制来分配有限的token预算，在ImageNet-1K上实现84.706%的Top-1准确率，比密集基线提高1.2%。
AI.motivation: 研究如何在图像分类任务中为固定预算的patch token分配最优策略，平衡准确率和效率。
AI.method: 1) 将DINOv3的patch表示量化到视觉词汇表；2) 使用监督TF-IDF计算类条件语料库分数；3) 结合注意力图生成REDI分数；4) 使用keep、merge和compress操作符分配patch角色。
AI.result: 将序列长度从201减少到107 (46.8% reduction)，Top-1准确率达到84.706%，相比密集基线(83.514%)提升1.2%。
AI.conclusion: 类特定的语料库统计和图像特定的注意力为patch排序提供了互补信号，REDI方法有效结合两者提升分类性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision Transformer token reduction for image classification on ImageNet. The application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. While both papers involve visual features, this paper addresses image classification tasks rather than video-based 3D motion generation. The methods (DINOv3, TF-IDF for token reduction) do not align with the required VLM, video generation models, or 3D motion generation methods mentioned in the profile.

title: ShellMaker: Language-Guided Exterior Completion under Structural Constraints
summary: Despite advances in indoor scene generation, synthesizing coherent building exteriors consistent with generated interiors remains largely unexplored. Existing methods can generate floor plans and wall layouts but typically stop at a structural shell, lacking stylistically consistent facades and roofs. Completing these exteriors is challenging because the footprint, wall geometry, and opening semantics must remain fixed-constraints that unconstrained generative models often violate. We introduce ShellMaker, a language-guided exterior completion framework that operates under these structural constraints. Given a building scaffold and a text style prompt, ShellMaker generates a complete exterior mesh with PBR materials by combining parametric roof generation, LLM-based part-aware prompt refinement, joint wall-roof material retrieval, and geometry-aware assembly. Operating on a format agnostic scaffold representation, ShellMaker generalizes to indoor generators, CityGML, and CAD inputs, while maintaining structural consistency and improving architectural coherence over retrieval and unconstrained generative baselines. The project page is available at https://ruiqixu37.github.io/ShellMaker_web/

AI.tldr: ShellMaker是一个语言引导的建筑外观补全框架，能够在保持建筑结构约束的前提下，根据文本提示生成完整的外观网格和PBR材质，实现与室内场景风格一致的建筑外立面。
AI.motivation: 现有室内场景生成方法只能生成Floor plans和墙体布局，无法生成风格一致的外立面和屋顶。完成建筑外观具有挑战性，因为必须保持建筑 footprint、墙体几何形状和开口语义的约束，而无约束的生成模型往往违反这些约束。
AI.method: ShellMaker结合了参数化屋顶生成、基于LLM的部件感知提示词优化、联合墙体-屋顶材质检索和几何感知组装技术。该方法在格式无关的scaffold表示上操作，可推广到室内生成器、CityGML和CAD输入。
AI.result: ShellMaker在保持结构一致性的同时，在建筑连贯性方面优于检索和无约束生成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ShellMaker是首个能够在保持结构约束下根据文本提示生成完整建筑外观的系统，填补了室内场景生成与建筑外观生成之间的空白，具有广泛的应用前景。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile focuses on 3D MOTION synthesis from video input (human/object motion generation), while ShellMaker is about architectural BUILDING EXTERIOR COMPLETION (generating building facades and roofs). These are entirely different application domains in computer graphics - one deals with dynamic motion, the other with static architectural geometry. The pain points, methods (VLM for video motion vs LLM for text prompts), and objectives have no alignment.

title: Semantic Occupancy Prediction with Dual Range-Voxel Representation
summary: LiDAR-based 3D semantic occupancy prediction, which aims to provide accurate and comprehensive scene representation, is crucial for autonomous driving systems. As point clouds suffer from sparsity and incompleteness, leading to insufficient semantic learning and difficult occupancy perception, existing methods often stack multi-sweep point clouds to obtain dense spatial information. However, such a naive strategy also results in efficiency (e.g., additional computational burden) and robustness (e.g., pose transformation noise) concerns, which hinder their practical applications. In this work, we propose a Dual Range-Voxel Representation (DRVR) that leverages the range-view context and voxel-view geometry of single-sweep point clouds for 3D semantic occupancy prediction, eliminating the concerns associated with the multi-sweeps. Specifically, we use the range-view encoder to extract the compact context of the scene. To fully exploit the spatial information, we design a geometry-aware voxel-view encoder that extracts multi-scale voxel-view features separately and combines them for better geometric occupancy prediction. Moreover, we propose a range-voxel fusion module to cooperate range- and voxel-view features via voxel-to-range and range-to-voxel fusions. Extensive experiments on nuScenes-Occupancy, SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS show the superiority of our method. Especially on nuScenes-Occupancy, our single-sweep DRVR achieves 5.4% improvement in mIoU and 2.1x acceleration compared to the multi-sweep method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于单次扫描点云的3D语义占用预测方法DRVR，通过结合距离视图上下文和体素视图几何信息，避免了多扫描方法带来的效率和安全问题。
AI.motivation: 点云具有稀疏性和不完整性，导致语义学习和占用感知困难。现有方法堆叠多次扫描点云获取密集空间信息，但带来计算负担和姿态变换噪声等效率和鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 设计双距离-体素表示(DRVR)框架：1)使用距离视图编码器提取场景紧凑上下文；2)设计几何感知体素视图编码器分别提取多尺度体素视图特征并融合；3)提出距离-体素融合模块通过体素到距离和距离到体素的融合协同两种视图特征。
AI.result: 在nuScenes-Occupancy、SemanticKITTI和SemanticPOSS数据集上验证。在nuScenes-Occupancy上，单次扫描的DRVR相比多扫描方法mIoU提升5.4%，推理速度提升2.1倍。
AI.conclusion: DRVR通过有效利用单次扫描点云的-range和voxel视图信息，在保证预测精度的同时显著提升了效率，为实际自动驾驶应用提供了一种更实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D semantic occupancy prediction from LiDAR point clouds for autonomous driving scene understanding. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion synthesis from video input, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. These are completely different application domains - the paper addresses autonomous driving perception, not video-to-3D motion synthesis. The methods are also different: point cloud processing (range-view, voxel-view encoders) vs. Vision-Language Models and video generation models. No alignment with any of the stated pain points.

title: Intrinsically Stable Spiking Neural Networks: Overcoming the Performance Barrier in the Absence of Batch Normalization
summary: The performance of deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) often relies on batch normalization (BN). However, the advanced dynamic BN variants used in state-of-the-art models introduce runtime multiplications, which weaken the hardware-efficiency motivation of SNNs. To address this tension, we identify catastrophic firing-rate decay as a primary cause of severe performance degradation in normalization-free SNNs. Guided by this insight, this work proposes the Intrinsically Stable SNN (IS-SNN) architecture, which removes activation-normalization layers by enforcing signal homeostasis through topology-aware weight standardization and modified residual connections. By folding the standardization operations into static weights offline, IS-SNN removes the runtime statistics tracking and multiplications introduced by activation normalization, restoring an accumulation-oriented inference datapath. Comprehensive experiments show that IS-SNN achieves performance competitive with or superior to computationally expensive dynamic BN techniques across VGG, ResNet, and Transformer-based models. Notably, it achieves a competitive accuracy of 68.05\% on ImageNet and overcomes the severe depth limitations of prior BN-free attempts. Together with a 96.4\% reduction in FPGA lookup table resource consumption for neuron implementations, these results support IS-SNN as a practical framework for building accurate and hardware-friendly deep neuromorphic systems.

AI.tldr: 本工作提出IS-SNN架构，通过拓扑感知权重标准化和修改残差连接替代激活归一化层，消除运行时统计追踪和乘法运算，在ImageNet上达到68.05%准确率的同时大幅降低硬件资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 深度脉冲神经网络(SNN)的性能通常依赖批归一化(BN)，但先进的动态BN变体引入运行时乘法运算，削弱了SNN的硬件效率优势
AI.method: 通过拓扑感知权重标准化和修改的残差连接来强制信号稳态，将标准化操作离线折叠到静态权重中，从而消除激活归一化层
AI.result: 在VGG、ResNet和Transformer模型上达到与计算昂贵的动态BN技术相当或更优的性能；在ImageNet上达到68.05%的竞争力准确率；FPGA查找表资源减少96.4%
AI.conclusion: IS-SNN是一个构建准确且硬件友好的深度神经形态系统的实用框架，通过消除运行时统计追踪和乘法运算，恢复了累加导向的推理数据路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) for image classification and hardware efficiency optimization (FPGA implementation), which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, extracting 3D visual guidance features from 2D video, and using Vision-Language Models for quality supervision. The paper addresses none of these pain points and uses completely different methods (SNN architecture optimization vs. video generation/motion synthesis models). This is a computer vision/neural network efficiency paper, not a computer graphics or video-to-3D motion synthesis paper.

title: Phantom: A Unified Face-Swap Deepfake Protection Framework with Latent and Spatial Constraints
summary: Face-swapping deepfakes pose an escalating threat to personal privacy by enabling unauthorized identity manipulation. While adversarial approaches have demonstrated success against black-box face recognition (FR) models, their applicability to face-swapping scenarios remains underexplored. In particular, reliance on fixed or random targets yields ambiguous latent guidance, and the lack of explicit spatial constraints causes perturbations to spill into identity-irrelevant regions. These issues are further exacerbated by identity-style disentanglement, which suppresses adversarial signals during deepfake generation. In this paper, we present Phantom, a unified face-swap deepfake protection framework that jointly constrains perturbations in latent and spatial domains. Phantom adaptively synthesizes identity-shifted yet attribute-preserving targets to guide identity-aware latent optimization, and applies masked perturbations confined to semantically relevant facial regions. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art face-swapping deepfakes demonstrate that Phantom improves protection success rates in dodging scenarios by 27.8%, 25.6%, and 16.6% on UniFace, INSwapper, and SimSwap, respectively, while also enhancing visual quality. Furthermore, Phantom generalizes to impersonation scenario, yielding up to 10.2% higher protection while improving perceptual fidelity. These results underscore the effectiveness of jointly leveraging latent and spatial constraints for robust and coherent facial privacy protection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Phantom框架，一种统一的人脸交换深度伪造防护系统，通过在潜在域和空间域联合约束扰动来保护个人隐私免受深度伪造技术的侵害。
AI.motivation: 人脸交换深度伪造对个人隐私构成日益严重的威胁。当前对抗性方法在应对人脸交换场景时存在局限性：固定或随机目标导致模糊的潜在指导；缺乏明确的空间约束导致扰动扩散到身份无关区域；身份-风格解耦在深度伪造生成过程中抑制对抗性信号。
AI.method: Phantom框架包含两个核心组件：1) 自适应合成保持属性但身份偏移的目标，以指导身份感知的潜在优化；2) 将扰动限制在语义相关面部区域的掩码扰动。
AI.result: 在UniFace、INSwapper和SimSwap上，Phantom在躲避场景中的防护成功率分别提升27.8%、25.6%和16.6%，同时改善了视觉质量。在 impersonation场景中，防护效果提升达10.2%，同时提高了感知保真度。
AI.conclusion: 联合利用潜在域和空间约束对于实现鲁棒且一致的面部隐私保护是有效的。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses deepfake face-swap protection, which is a cybersecurity/privacy application completely unrelated to the research profile's goal of 3D motion synthesis from video. While both involve "faces" in the broad computer vision sense, the application domain is fundamentally different: this paper focuses on protecting against deepfakes, not generating 3D motion from video. The methods (adversarial perturbations for deepfake detection) don't align with the research profile's methods (VLM, video generation models, 3D motion generation). The pain points are also completely unrelated - this paper addresses privacy protection, not extracting 3D visual guidance from video or bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation.

title: WIDER-FAIR: An Annotated Version of the WIDER-FACE Dataset for Fairness Evaluation
summary: The deployment of face detection models in real-world applications raises important fairness concerns, as these systems may showcase performance disparities across demographic groups. A key obstacle to studying and mitigating such biases is the lack of face detection datasets with sensitive feature annotations. To address this gap, we introduce WIDER-FAIR, a new dataset built on the widely used WIDER-FACE benchmark, manually annotated with the perceived ethnicity and sex of each face. The dataset contains 16,256 images annotated across four ethnic groups: Asian, Black, Indian, and White, and two sex categories. We assess the quality and coherence of the annotations using face embeddings, a K-Nearest Neighbors classifier, and a t-SNE visualization, all of which support the consistency of the labeling process. As a demonstration of the dataset's potential, we train a YOLOv5 model and perform ablation studies on each sensitive feature. Among other findings, our experiments show that detection performance is notably lower for faces of Black individuals, and that excluding this group from training increases fairness disparity more than excluding any other ethnic group. These observations illustrate the value of demographically annotated datasets for understanding and evaluating bias in face detection models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WIDER-FAIR数据集，用于研究人脸检测模型中的公平性问题。该数据集基于WIDER-FACE构建，手动标注了16,256张图片的种族（亚洲、黑人、印度、白人）和性别信息，并通过YOLOv5模型验证了数据集在检测种族偏见方面的价值。
AI.motivation: 人脸检测模型在现实部署中可能存在不同人口统计群体间的性能差异，但缺乏带有敏感特征标注的人脸检测数据集来研究和缓解这些偏见。
AI.method: 1) 在WIDER-FACE数据集基础上构建WIDER-FAIR数据集，手动标注16,256张图片的种族和性别信息；2) 使用人脸嵌入、KNN分类器和t-SNE可视化验证标注质量；3) 训练YOLOv5模型并进行消融实验。
AI.result: 检测性能在黑人群体中明显较低；将该群体排除在训练外会加剧公平性差异，超过了排除其他种族群体的影响。
AI.conclusion: 带有人口统计标注的数据集对于理解和评估人脸检测模型的偏见具有重要价值，WIDER-FAIR可作为研究公平性的重要基准。

relevance_reason: This paper is about face detection fairness and bias evaluation in computer vision - completely different application domain from the research profile focused on 3D motion synthesis from video in Computer Graphics. The paper addresses face detection bias, not 3D motion generation, video-to-3D conversion, or visual guidance features for motion synthesis. Despite both being in computer vision, the application domains are entirely unrelated.

title: UniCoder: Unified Visual-to-Code Generation via Symbolic Rewards and Reference-Guided Code Optimization
summary: Visual-to-Code generation, which transforms scientific plots, vector graphics, and webpages into executable scripts, demands a level of pixel-precise alignment that standard Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) fail to achieve through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) alone. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a theoretical pathway to bridge this gap, its application is hindered by two fundamental obstacles: (1) \textit{Reward Coarseness}, where semantic metrics like CLIP scores fail to penalize fine-grained element deviations, and (2) \textit{Exploration Stagnation}, where the sparse, heterogeneous code search space prevents the policy from bootstrapping valid trajectories. To overcome these limitations, we introduce UniCoder, a unified RL framework that integrates two novel mechanisms. First, we propose \textbf{Symbolic Attribute Alignment}, which employs a lightweight auxiliary LLM to parse generated code into discrete visual attributes (e.g., hex colors, coordinate limits), enabling dense, element-wise reward computation. Second, to escape local optima, we devise \textbf{Reference-Guided Code Optimization}, a strategy that dynamically injects ground-truth trajectories into low-performing rollout groups, transforming blind exploration into guided policy improvement. Extensive experiments on ChartMimic, UniSVG, Design2Code and ScreenBench benchmarks demonstrate that our 8B-parameter model not only surpasses all open-source baselines but also achieves state-of-the-art performance comparable to proprietary models, establishing a new paradigm for generalized visual-to-code synthesis.

AI.tldr: UniCoder是一个统一的强化学习框架，通过符号属性对齐和参考引导代码优化两个机制，解决了视觉到代码生成中精细对齐的挑战，使8B参数模型达到开源最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 标准多模态大语言模型通过监督微调无法实现视觉到代码生成所需的像素级精确对齐，而强化学习虽具理论潜力，但面临奖励粗糙和探索停滞两大根本障碍。
AI.method: 提出两个创新机制：(1)符号属性对齐 - 使用轻量级辅助LLM将生成代码解析为离散视觉属性(如十六进制颜色、坐标范围)，实现密集的元素级奖励计算；(2)参考引导代码优化 - 将真实轨迹动态注入低表现rollout组，将盲目探索转化为引导策略改进。
AI.result: 在ChartMimic、UniSVG、Design2Code和ScreenBench基准测试中，8B参数模型超越所有开源基线，达到与专有模型相当的先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 为通用视觉到代码合成建立了新范式，证明了强化学习结合精细奖励设计在多模态代码生成中的有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual-to-code generation (generating code like SVG, HTML from visual inputs), while the research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video input and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. These are completely different application domains - the paper deals with code generation, not 3D motion or video-to-3D understanding. Although both involve Vision-Language Models, the application domains are entirely different (code generation vs 3D motion synthesis).

title: MemLearner: Learning to Query Context memory for Video World Models
summary: Video World Models are interactive video generation models that predict future world states based on user actions and history video frames. A critical challenge in video world models is the lack of memory, causing inconsistent generated scenes over extended durations. Previous methods explored rule-based context frame retrieval as memory, but they fail to generalize in scenarios with scene occlusions and dynamic objects. We propose MemLearner, a learning-based adaptive context query method using query tokens to bridge context and predicted tokens. By leveraging the video generation model itself for context querying, MemLearner exploits pre-trained visual priors without training additional modules from scratch, and incorporates efficient strategies for training and inference. We collect a dataset of long videos with scene occlusions and dynamic objects, paired with camera pose annotations, and propose a multi-dataset training strategy leveraging both annotated rendered and unannotated real-world videos. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MemLearner significantly outperforms prior video world models in terms of scene consistency and memory, particularly under challenging occlusion and dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: MemLearner是一种基于学习的自适应上下文查询方法，用于解决视频世界模型中缺乏长期记忆导致场景不一致的问题。该方法通过查询令牌桥接上下文和预测令牌，利用视频生成模型本身的预训练视觉先验，无需从头训练额外模块。
AI.motivation: 视频世界模型面临关键挑战：缺乏记忆机制导致长时间生成场景不一致。现有基于规则的上下文帧检索方法无法在场景遮挡和动态物体的场景中泛化。
AI.method: 提出MemLearner方法，采用学习式自适应上下文查询：1)使用查询令牌桥接上下文和预测令牌；2)利用视频生成模型本身进行上下文查询，复用预训练视觉先验；3)收集包含场景遮挡和动态物体的长视频数据集，配有相机姿态标注；4)采用多数据集训练策略，结合标注渲染视频和未标注真实世界视频。
AI.result: MemLearner在场景一致性和记忆方面显著优于现有视频世界模型，尤其是在具有挑战性的遮挡和动态场景条件下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习式上下文查询而非规则-based方法，MemLearner成功解决了视频世界模型的长程记忆问题，为复杂场景下的视频生成提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: Uses similar video generation methods (like Wanxiang, Seedance mentioned in profile) but targets a DIFFERENT application domain. The paper focuses on video world models for robotics/simulation (scene consistency, memory mechanisms), while the research profile specifically needs 3D motion synthesis from video (human/character motion generation in Computer Graphics). The pain points are completely different: video world models deal with scene consistency for autonomous agents, while the research profile deals with extracting 3D motion from 2D video for graphics applications. This is a case of "similar methods but wrong application domain" - both use video generation but for fundamentally different purposes.

title: Rhythm-Structured Predictive Learning for Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) estimates physiological signals from facial videos by analyzing subtle pulse induced skin color variations. Despite recent progress, existing self-supervised rPPG methods mainly reconstruct masked pixels or low-level visual representations, which can bias the model toward facial appearance rather than latent physiological dy namics. Moreover, most recent Mamba-based approaches scan facial video tokens only in chronological order, limiting their ability to exploit the cyclic structure of pulse signals. To ad dress these limitations, we propose RhythmJEPA, a rhythm structured joint-embedding predictive learning framework for rPPG. Instead of reconstructing RGB frames, RhythmJEPA predicts latent teacher representations from masked facial videos, thereby encouraging physiology-aware representation learning in the embedding space. To explicitly model pulse-related tem poral structure, we introduce a Cyclic Rhythm-State Plan ner (CRSP), which estimates frame-wise latent physiological states and decodes the most plausible cyclic state path via dynamic programming with a constrained transition grammar. Guided by the decoded states, we further design a Dual Order Mamba Encoder (DOM), which combines conventional chronological scanning with state-ordered scanning to capture both local temporal continuity and long-range rhythm-consistent dependencies. Finally, a lightweight Spatial Pulse Mixer (SPM) extracts compact pulse-sensitive facial tokens with a favorable balance between complexity and performance. Experiments on PURE, UBFC-rPPG, and MMPD show competitive performance over representative rPPG methods. The codes are available at https://github.com/deconasser/RhythmJEPA.

AI.tldr: RhythmJEPA是一种用于远程光电容积脉搏波描记(rPPG)的节奏结构化联合嵌入预测学习框架，通过预测 masked 面部视频的潜在教师表示来学习生理感知表征，而非重建RGB帧。
AI.motivation: 1. 现有自监督rPPG方法主要重建被遮挡的像素或低层视觉表示，这会使模型偏向于面部外观而非潜在生理动态；2. 现有的Mamba方法仅按时间顺序扫描面部视频token，无法利用脉搏信号的循环结构。
AI.method: 1. 提出Cyclic Rhythm-State Planner (CRSP)：估计帧级潜在生理状态，通过动态规划和约束转换语法解码最可能的循环状态路径；2. Dual Order Mamba Encoder (DOM)：结合传统时间顺序扫描与状态顺序扫描，捕捉局部时间连续性和远程节奏一致性依赖；3. Spatial Pulse Mixer (SPM)：提取紧凑的脉搏敏感面部token，在复杂度和性能间取得良好平衡。
AI.result: 在PURE、UBFC-rPPG和MMPP数据集上展现出与代表性rPPG方法相当的竞争性能。
AI.conclusion: RhythmJEPA通过引入循环状态规划和双序Mamba编码器，有效解决了自监督rPPG方法中面部外观偏差和时序扫描限制的问题，为生理感知表征学习提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Remote Photoplethysmography (rPPG) - extracting physiological signals (heart rate/pulse) from facial videos for medical/biometric purposes. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion synthesis from video input, extracting 3D visual guidance features, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The application domain is entirely different - this is medical signal processing, not computer graphics or 3D motion generation.

title: Estimating Velocity of Spheres from Rolling-Shutter Image(s)
summary: Rolling-shutter cameras introduce characteristic distortions when imaging fast moving objects, and these effects are typically treated as artifacts to be corrected. In this work, we instead leverage rolling-shutter distortions as a valuable source of temporal information to estimate the 3D translational and angular velocities of rapidly moving spherical objects from a single rolling-shutter frame. We design a robust and easily detectable spherical pattern and propose a correspondence-free formulation that recovers motion by enforcing geometric consistency in a back-projection framework. By exploiting the geometry of the sphere, translational and rotational motions are decoupled and estimated through a two-stage optimization process, enabling reliable velocity recovery even for textureless objects. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate accurate and robust estimation of motion parameters under challenging high-speed conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用滚动快门相机在拍摄高速运动物体时产生的特征失真作为有价值的时间信息源，从单帧滚动快门图像中估计快速移动球形物体的3D平移和角速度。通过设计一种鲁棒且易于检测的球形图案，并在反投影框架中强制执行几何一致性来恢复运动，无需建立对应关系。利用球面几何特性，通过两阶段优化过程将平移和旋转运动解耦并分别估计，即使对无纹理物体也能实现可靠的运动恢复。合成数据和真实数据的广泛实验表明，在挑战性高速条件下能够准确鲁棒地估计运动参数。
AI.motivation: 滚动快门相机在拍摄快速移动物体时会引入特征失真，这些影响通常被视为需要校正的伪影。本文旨在将这些失真转化为有价值的时间信息源，用于运动估计。
AI.method: 1) 设计鲁棒易检测的球形图案；2) 提出无需对应关系的公式化方法，通过反投影框架强制执行几何一致性来恢复运动；3) 利用球面几何特性，通过两阶段优化过程将平移和旋转运动解耦估计。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的广泛实验表明，在挑战性高速条件下能够准确鲁棒地估计运动参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将滚动快门失真转化为优势，无需对应关系即可从单帧图像估计高速运动球形物体的3D平移和角速度，对无纹理物体同样有效。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about motion estimation from rolling shutter camera distortion (computer vision/photography domain), not about 3D motion synthesis from video. The research profile is about Computer Graphics with focus on using Vision-Language Models and Video Generation Models for 3D motion synthesis from video input. The paper uses traditional geometric optimization methods (not VLM or video generation models) and addresses a different application domain entirely - analyzing motion parameters rather than generating new 3D motion from video priors.

title: Mesh BDF: Barycentric Dominance Field for 3D Native Mesh Generation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) modeling has recently achieved remarkable progress in native 3D mesh generation, largely due to its natural ability to handle variable-length, discrete data structures. However, the inherent constraints of the AR paradigm severely restrict the generated meshes, leading to limited face counts, bounded vertex resolutions, and difficulties in supporting textures. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose the Barycentric Dominance Field (BDF), a continuous representation defined on triangular mesh surfaces that elegantly encodes vertex topological connectivity. BDF bridges the fundamental gap between discrete mesh topology and continuous diffusion-based generative modeling by transforming connectivity into a continuous surface signal. As an intrinsic mesh property, BDF shares strong similarities with texture maps, enabling its seamless integration into existing 3D diffusion pipelines without requiring architectural modifications. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BDF empowers diffusion models to generate native meshes with significantly higher quality, greater scalability, and stronger robustness compared to state-of-the-art autoregressive methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Barycentric Dominance Field (BDF)来解决自回归(AR)模型在原生3D网格生成中的局限性，通过将离散网格拓扑转换为连续表面信号，使扩散模型能够生成更高质量、更可扩展且更鲁棒的原生网格。
AI.motivation: 自回归建模在原生3D网格生成中面临严重限制，包括面数有限、顶点分辨率受限以及难以支持纹理等瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 提出Barycentric Dominance Field (BDF)，一种定义在三角网格表面上的连续表示方法，通过将连通性转换为连续表面信号来弥合离散网格拓扑与连续扩散生成建模之间的差距。
AI.result: BDF使扩散模型能够生成具有更高质量、更大可扩展性和更强鲁棒性的原生网格，显著优于当前最先进的自回归方法。
AI.conclusion: BDF作为内在网格属性，与纹理图具有强相似性，可无缝集成到现有3D扩散管道中而无需修改架构。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D native mesh generation (static geometry) using diffusion models, while the research profile is about 3D MOTION synthesis from video input. Although both are in Computer Graphics, they address completely different application domains: static mesh generation vs. dynamic motion generation. The pain points are also different - this paper addresses mesh topology limitations, while the profile focuses on extracting guidance from video priors and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods differ despite both using diffusion - this paper uses BDF for mesh generation, not video-to-motion synthesis.

title: SpikeLogBERT: Energy-Efficient Log Parsing Using Spiking Transformer Networks
summary: Log parsing is a fundamental step in automated log analysis, transforming raw system logs into structured event templates for downstream tasks such as anomaly detection and system monitoring. Existing log parsing methods range from rule-based and clustering-based approaches to neural models that learn semantic representations from log messages. However, neural approaches typically rely on dense matrix multiplications, which can result in high computational cost and energy consumption. This paper presents SpikeLogBERT, a spiking neural network framework for energy-efficient log parsing. The proposed model integrates a spiking transformer architecture with knowledge distillation from a BERT teacher model, enabling spike-driven computation while preserving semantic representation capability. By leveraging sparse spike activations and event-driven processing, the number of active operations during inference can be significantly reduced. As an initial benchmark study, experiments on the HDFS dataset demonstrate that SpikeLogBERT outperforms ANN-based neural log parsing models with a parsing accuracy of 0.99997, while reducing estimated theoretical energy consumption by up to 62.6% under standard 45nm CMOS assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpikeLogBERT，一种基于脉冲神经网络的能量高效日志解析框架，结合脉冲Transformer架构与BERT知识蒸馏，在HDFS数据集上实现0.99997的解析精度，同时降低62.6%的理论能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有神经日志解析方法依赖密集矩阵乘法，计算成本和能耗较高，需要一种既能保持语义表示能力又能实现能量高效处理的方案。
AI.method: 提出SpikeLogBERT框架，集成脉冲Transformer架构与BERT教师模型的知识蒸馏技术，利用稀疏脉冲激活和事件驱动处理减少推理过程中的活跃运算数量。
AI.result: 在HDFS数据集上，SpikeLogBERT达到0.99997的解析精度，优于ANN-based神经日志解析模型，在标准45nm CMOS假设下降低高达62.6%的理论能耗。
AI.conclusion: SpikeLogBERT成功将脉冲神经网络应用于日志解析任务，证明了通过知识蒸馏和稀疏脉冲激活可在保持高精度的同时显著降低能耗，为能量受限场景下的日志分析提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about log parsing (system/network administration domain) using spiking neural networks, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with parsing Hadoop Distributed File System (HDFS) logs, not visual/3D content generation. Although both profiles mention "BERT" (as a method reference), the context and application are totally different - this paper uses BERT for knowledge distillation in log analysis, not for visual understanding or motion generation tasks.

title: Self-Supervised Temporal Regularization for Landmark-Based Cardiac Segmentation with Automatic AHA Regional Mapping
summary: Graph-based cardiac segmentation with implicit anatomical correspondences provides topological guarantees and population-level analysis capabilities, but models trained on independent frames of image sequences exhibit temporal discontinuities that affect reliable clinical measurements, particularly in cardiac ultrasound. In this work, we introduce self-supervised temporal regularization as a post-training refinement stage that exploits the temporal coherence in image sequences to enforce consistent cardiac segmentation and motion estimation over time, without requiring per-frame annotations. By penalizing velocity and acceleration discontinuities across consecutive frames, our method achieves temporally consistent segmentations while maintaining the learned anatomical correspondences. We further leverage these correspondences to automatically map landmarks to the AHA 17-segment clinical standard, enabling standardized regional assessment and detection of pathological myocardial motion patterns. Validation on CAMUS dataset demonstrates the clinical utility of combining temporal consistency with automatic regional mapping. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/david-montalvoo/MaskHybridGNet-TempReg

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督时间正则化方法，用于心脏分割的后训练优化阶段。该方法利用图像序列的时间一致性，惩罚连续帧之间的速度和加速度不连续性，实现时间一致的心脏分割，同时保持学习的解剖对应关系，并可自动映射到AHA 17段临床标准进行区域评估。
AI.motivation: 当前基于独立帧训练的模型存在时间不连续性问题，影响临床测量的可靠性，特别是在心脏超声中。需要在图像序列中建立时间连贯性，以实现更准确的心脏分割和运动估计。
AI.method: 提出自监督时间正则化作为后训练优化阶段，利用图像序列的时间一致性，惩罚连续帧之间的速度和加速度不连续性，在保持学习的解剖对应关系的同时实现时间一致的分割。利用解剖对应关系将关键点自动映射到AHA 17段临床标准，实现标准化区域评估和病理心肌运动模式检测。
AI.result: 在CAMUS数据集上验证，实现了时间一致的心脏分割，同时保持了学习的解剖对应关系。结合时间一致性与自动区域映射的方法显示出临床实用性。
AI.conclusion: 将时间一致性与自动区域映射相结合的心脏分割方法具有临床实用价值，为心脏超声的标准化区域评估和病理运动模式检测提供了有效途径。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics (3D motion synthesis from video, video generation, visual feature extraction), while this paper is about medical image analysis (cardiac segmentation in ultrasound images for clinical diagnosis). This is medical imaging/medical image computing, not computer graphics. The methods, goals, and applications are entirely different - one deals with generating visual content/animations, the other deals with clinical segmentation for disease diagnosis.

title: MuSViT: A Foundation Vision Model for Sheet Music Representation
comment: Accepted at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV'26)
summary: Foundation models have transformed vision and language processing by providing rich, reusable representations that transfer across diverse tasks. Sheet music, as a visual encoding of musical language, lacks such a strong domain-specific backbone. We introduce MuSViT (Music Score Vision Transformer): the first foundation vision model for sheet music representation -- a ViT encoder pre-trained via Masked Autoencoders on 9.7 million pages from the IMSLP. To handle the complexity of real-world scores, we adopt a two-stage curriculum: a synthetic warm-up on typeset scores followed by large-scale training on the full IMSLP corpus. We evaluate MuSViT on four downstream tasks -- full-page and staff-level music score recognition, music symbol detection, and score difficulty classification -- under two scenarios: linear probing (frozen encoder) and fine-tuning. Under linear probing, MuSViT consistently outperforms modern vision encoders, revealing that general-purpose representations, regardless of scale, fall systematically short on the structured symbolic properties of musical notation. Under fine-tuning, MuSViT generally improves upon task-specific state-of-the-art methods. An additional embedding-transcription consistency analysis reveals that MuSViT encodes symbolic musical structure directly in its representation space -- unlike other encoders, whose embeddings do not correlate with music notation content.
