These results establish MuSViT as a foundation backbone for sheet music understanding.

AI.tldr: MuSViT是首个用于乐谱表示的基础视觉模型，通过掩码自编码器在IMSLP的970万页乐谱上预训练，采用两阶段课程学习（合成乐谱预热+大规模IMSLP训练），在四个下游任务上评估，展现出优越的符号音乐结构编码能力。
AI.motivation: 基础模型已变革视觉和语言处理，但乐谱作为音乐语言的视觉编码缺乏强领域特定的主干网络，需要可迁移到多种任务的丰富可复用表示。
AI.method: 提出MuSViT（音乐乐谱视觉Transformer）：首个乐谱基础视觉模型，采用ViT编码器通过掩码自编码器在IMSLP的970万页乐谱上预训练，采用两阶段课程学习策略（合成印刷乐谱预热+IMSLP全量大规模训练）。
AI.result: 在线性探测（冻结编码器）场景下，MuSViT始终优于现代视觉编码器，揭示了通用表示无论规模多大在音乐符号的结构化特性上均存在系统性不足；在微调场景下，MuSViT优于任务特定的最先进方法；嵌入-转录一致性分析表明MuSViT能直接在表示空间中编码符号化音乐结构。
AI.conclusion: MuSViT确立了作为乐谱理解的基础主干网络，证明领域特定的乐谱表示学习对于捕获音乐符号的结构化属性至关重要。

relevance_reason: This paper is about sheet music representation for symbolic music processing - a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While both use Vision Transformers, the paper focuses on music notation understanding (e.g., recognizing musical symbols, structure in sheet music), not on extracting 3D visual guidance features, video-to-3D motion generation, or Vision-Language Models for quality supervision. The methods and domain are entirely unrelated to the research profile's goals of bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation.

title: Generative Lane Topology Reasoning via Autoregressive Model with Geometry Prior
summary: Lane topology reasoning aims to construct a lane graph from onboard sensor observations. Existing methods follow a detection and association paradigm that treats each lane instance independently, leading to geometric inconsistency at connected endpoints and incomplete graphs due to visual occlusions. To address these issues, we propose TopoGPT, a generative framework that learns the geometry prior from typical lane graph structures through autoregressive sequence modeling. Specifically, we construct a large-scale map dataset comprising 3.3M scenes. For each lane graph, a lane tokenizer serializes it into discrete tokens, while a scene context encoder converts it into a rasterized image and extracts global features as scene tokens. We pre-train an autoregressive lane sequence transformer via scene-conditioned next-token prediction, endowing the model with the geometry prior over lane graph structures. Building upon this prior, a perception adapter aligns BEV features from multi-view images with the pre-trained scene condition, transferring the learned geometry prior to sensor-based lane graph prediction. On the OpenLane-V2 benchmark, TopoGPT outperforms existing methods by an average of +6.4 on lane-level and +11.6 on point-level metrics, and produces geometrically consistent and structurally complete lane graphs.

AI.tldr: TopoGPT是一种基于生成式自回归序列建模的车道拓扑推理框架，通过大规模预训练学习典型车道图结构的几何先验，并利用感知适配器将BEV特征与预训练场景条件对齐，实现传感器到车道图的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法遵循检测和关联范式，单独处理每个车道实例，导致连接端点的几何不一致，且因视觉遮挡造成图结构不完整。
AI.method: 构建包含330万个场景的大规模地图数据集；使用车道分词器将车道图序列化为离散标记；场景上下文编码器将车道图转换为光栅化图像并提取全局特征作为场景标记；通过场景条件下的自回归下一标记预测对车道序列Transformer进行预训练；感知适配器将BEV特征与预训练场景条件对齐。
AI.result: 在OpenLane-V2基准测试中，TopoGPT在车道级指标上平均提升+6.4，在点级指标上提升+11.6，生成几何一致且结构完整的车道图。
AI.conclusion: TopoGPT通过自回归序列建模成功将车道图的几何先验知识迁移到基于传感器的车道图预测任务中，显著优于现有方法。

relevance_reason: The paper is about autonomous driving/lane topology reasoning, which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While the research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video (human motion generation), this paper addresses lane detection and map prediction for self-driving cars. The application domains are entirely different - not related to computer graphics, motion synthesis, or video-to-3D motion generation at all.

title: Absorption-Feature-Guided Distance-Decoupled Estimation and Band Selection for LWIR Hyperspectral Passive Ranging
summary: Long-wave infrared (LWIR) hyperspectral observations contain distance-dependent atmospheric absorption signatures, providing a physical basis for long-range passive ranging. However, in natural scenes, these signatures are nonlinearly coupled with target temperature, material emissivity, and path radiance, making distance inversion from observed radiance ill posed. Existing methods typically rely on full-band measurements and pixel-wise joint optimization, which is computationally expensive and does not explicitly exploit sharp atmospheric absorption structures. This paper proposes an Absorption-Guided Distance-Decoupled Estimation and Refinement (ADER) framework for LWIR hyperspectral passive ranging. ADER represents emissivity with B-spline control points under a smoothness prior, suppressing overfitting to atmospheric absorption structures and enabling distance-decoupled estimation. It further uses ozone-absorption cues to classify pixels into emission-dominant and reflection-dominant groups. For emission-dominant pixels, ADER compensates path radiance and transmittance and estimates distance by one-dimensional absorption-residual minimization. For reflection-dominant pixels, ADER refines the initial estimate using downwelling-radiance compensation based on the complete radiative model. To reduce spectral redundancy, ADER also introduces a greedy band selection strategy based on multi-scene effective Fisher information for the distance parameter. Experiments on real scenes show that ADER recovers LiDAR-consistent spatial distance structures under both full-band and 20-band settings, improves ranging accuracy in the evaluated regions, and achieves approximately two orders of magnitude speedup over a public full-band hyperspectral ranging method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于LWIR高光谱被动测距的吸收引导距离解耦估计与细化(ADER)框架，通过B样条控制点表示发射率并利用臭氧吸收线索分类像素，实现距离解耦估计和快速精确的被动测距。
AI.motivation: LWIR高光谱观测包含距离依赖的大气吸收特征，为被动测距提供物理基础。然而自然场景中这些特征与目标温度、材料发射率和路径辐射非线耦合，导致距离反演病态。现有方法依赖全波段测量和逐像素联合优化，计算量大且未显式利用尖锐的大气吸收结构。
AI.method: 提出ADER框架：1)利用B样条控制点表示发射率并施加平滑先验，抑制对大气吸收结构的过拟合；2)使用臭氧吸收线索将像素分为发射主导和反射主导两类；3)对发射主导像素，补偿路径辐射和透射率，通过一维吸收残差最小化估计距离；4)对反射主导像素，基于完整辐射模型使用下行辐射补偿细化初始估计；5)引入基于多场景有效费舍尔信息的贪婪波段选择策略减少冗余。
AI.result: 在真实场景实验中，ADER在20波段设置下恢复了与LiDAR一致的空间距离结构，提高了评估区域的测距精度，比公开的全波段高光谱测距方法提速约两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: ADER框架通过吸收引导和距离解耦策略有效解决了LWIR高光谱被动测距的病态问题，在精度和效率上均取得显著提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LWIR hyperspectral passive ranging for remote sensing/distance measurement, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video, Vision-Language Models, and video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance). This paper addresses atmospheric absorption features for passive ranging - a completely different application domain (remote sensing, atmospheric physics). The methods used (B-spline emissivity representation, ozone absorption-based pixel classification, Fisher information band selection) have no relevance to the Computer Graphics field or any of the specified methods. This is a remote sensing paper about distance measurement, not graphics/motion generation.

title: PriorEye: Geospatial Visual Priors for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Most end-to-end autonomous driving methods rely solely on instantaneous sensor observations, limiting them to reactive behavior without the anticipatory foresight human drivers employ through prior experience. We introduce geospatial visual priors, street-level visual context anchored to the intended driving route, providing visual-spatial foresight independent of real-time sensors. We propose a memory augmentation module featuring a dual-memory architecture and an adaptive memory gate, which can be easily integrated into existing end-to-end approaches. This design pairs a contextual memory for retrieved priors with a persistent fallback memory, and dynamically regulates the influence of memories based on current state compatibility. Evaluated on the NAVSIM-v2 benchmark, our approach consistently improves performance across diverse end-to-end baselines. Furthermore, because these priors are independent of onboard sensors, our method inherently improves robustness against sensor corruption, while the dual-memory design ensures safe fallback when the retrieved priors themselves become unreliable. Our project page is available at https://ori-mrg.github.io/PriorEye.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PriorEye方法，通过引入地理空间视觉先验（geospatial visual priors）来增强端到端自动驾驶系统的预测能力。该方法使用记忆增强模块，结合双记忆架构和自适应记忆门，使自动驾驶系统能够利用路线相关的视觉上下文信息，而不仅仅依赖实时传感器观测。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法仅依赖即时传感器观测，限制了其只能做出反应性行为，缺乏人类驾驶员通过经验积累获得的预测性前向视野。这导致系统在复杂场景下的表现受限。
AI.method: 提出记忆增强模块，包含：1）双记忆架构（上下文记忆+持久后备记忆）；2）自适应记忆门，根据当前状态兼容性动态调节记忆影响力。该设计可轻松集成到现有端到端自动驾驶方法中。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM-v2基准测试中，该方法在多种端到端自动驾驶基线模型上均取得一致性性能提升。由于视觉先验独立于车载传感器，该方法还提高了对传感器故障的鲁棒性，双记忆设计确保了当检索的先验不可靠时的安全回退。
AI.conclusion: 地理空间视觉先验是一种有效增强端到端自动驾驶系统的方法，能够提供独立于实时传感器的视觉-空间预测能力，同时提高系统对传感器故障的容忍度。

relevance_reason: The paper is about autonomous driving, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While the research profile focuses on extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video priors, quality supervision through VLMs, and 3D motion generation, PriorEye addresses autonomous driving prediction using geospatial visual priors and memory-augmented modules. The methods (dual memory architecture, adaptive memory gates) are specific to autonomous driving and not related to 3D motion generation or video-to-motion synthesis. This is a case of completely different application domains - computer graphics/animation vs. autonomous vehicles.

title: Towards Voxel Spacing Consistency for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Volumetric medical image segmentation is essential for both preoperative diagnosis and intraoperative guidance. While recent years have witnessed rapid progress in segmentation architectures, comparatively little attention is paid to the physical voxel spacing of anatomical data. Indeed, volumetric image resampling is a ubiquitous preprocessing step before segmentation, yet its interaction with downstream segmentation has not been systematically exploited. In this work, we study the correlation between image resampling and segmentation, and propose Consispace, a semantic-aware resampling framework that achieves consistent voxel spacing in the axial direction while preserving anatomical and semantic consistency. Consispace introduces an ODE-based anatomical constraint to model inter-slice dynamics with a continuous interpolator, enabling faithful reconstruction under complex anatomical transitions beyond discrete interpolation. To further couple resampling with segmentation objectives, we leverage dense features from a pretrained vision model to build intra-slice semantic correlation maps and inject class-wise semantic consistency via feature reweighting during resampling. Both intra-slice and inter-slice constraints are integrated into an implicit neural network, supporting arbitrary-scale resampling. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that Consispace achieves superior reconstruction quality and perceptual fidelity, produces smoother inter-slice anatomy, and improves downstream segmentation performance when used as a preprocessing step.

AI.tldr: Consispace是一个语义感知的医学图像重采样框架，通过ODE约束和语义相关性建模，在保持解剖结构和语义一致性的同时实现任意尺度的重采样，显著提升下游分割性能。
AI.motivation: volumetric medical image segmentation在术前诊断和术中指导中至关重要，但现有研究忽视了一个关键问题：图像重采样（resampling）与分割任务之间的相互作用尚未被系统探索。解剖数据的物理体素间距（voxel spacing）对分割效果有重要影响，但这一因素长期被忽略。
AI.method: 提出Consispace框架，包含两个核心创新：1）基于ODE的解剖约束：利用常微分方程对层间动态进行建模，通过连续插值器实现复杂解剖过渡的忠实重建，突破传统离散插值的局限；2）语义相关性建模：利用预训练视觉模型的密集特征构建层内语义相关性图，通过特征重注入实现类级语义一致性。框架将层内和层间约束集成到隐式神经网络中，支持任意尺度的重采样。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛实验表明：Consispace实现了卓越的重建质量和感知保真度，产生了更平滑的层间解剖结构，作为预处理步骤使用时显著提升了下游分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统性地探索了医学图像重采样与分割任务之间的关联，提出了一个统一框架同时优化重建质量和分割性能，为 volumetric medical image analysis提供了新的预处理范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image segmentation with voxel spacing consistency, which is entirely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are completely unrelated - medical imaging vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The methods (ODE-based resampling for medical images) also do not align with the required methods (VLM, video generation models, 3D motion generation). This is a case of complete domain mismatch.

title: SENSE-VAD: Sentient and Semantic Video Anomaly Detection for Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) must navigate not only motion-based hazards but also socially complex situations whose danger is constituted by inter-agent relationships rather than movement statistics alone. A child running away from a guardian, a person being carried by another, or a pursuer chasing a pedestrian across a sidewalk are all anomalous in social context, yet none produces an obvious motion signal that current anomaly detectors are equipped to flag. We introduce SENSE-VAD, the first synthetic video anomaly detection benchmark for autonomous driving explicitly designed around socially complex anomalies. Using the CARLA simulator and Unreal Engine (UE), we generate distinct anomaly scenarios across multiple categories: individual behaviors, group behaviors, person--object interactions, cyclist interactions, vehicle & agent, each annotated with per-frame binary labels. A key design principle is the separation of social anomaly from motion-based or appearance-based anomaly: many scenarios involve motion of objects that appears unremarkable in isolation but is anomalous in relational context. We additionally provide real-world normal and anomalous videos as a sim-to-real transfer probe. We evaluate state-of-the-art video anomaly detection baselines and demonstrate that socially complex anomalies constitute a distinct and currently unsolved challenge. Our dataset, annotations, and generation code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SENSE-VAD，这是首个针对自动驾驶的合成视频异常检测基准，专门围绕社会复杂异常进行设计。使用CARLA模拟器和虚幻引擎生成不同类别的异常场景，包括个人行为、群体行为、人-物体交互、骑行者交互以及车辆与代理交互，并提供每帧二进制标签。关键设计原则是将社会异常与运动或外观异常分离。许多场景涉及单独看起来不显眼但在关系背景下异常的物体运动。研究还提供了真实世界的正常和异常视频作为模拟到真实的迁移测试。结果表明，当前最先进的视频异常检测方法在处理社会复杂异常时存在显著不足。数据集、注释和生成代码已公开可用。
AI.motivation: 当前异常检测器无法检测因代理间关系而非运动统计构成的危险的异常情况。例如，一个孩子逃离监护人、被人携带的人、或追捕行人的追逐者，这些在社会背景下异常，但不会产生明显的运动信号。现有的运动异常检测器无法识别这些社会关系层面的异常。
AI.method: 使用CARLA模拟器和虚幻引擎(UE)生成多类异常场景：个人行为、群体行为、人-物体交互、骑行者交互、车辆与代理交互。每个场景都标注了每帧二进制标签。关键设计是分离社会异常与运动/外观异常。此外还提供真实世界的正常和异常视频用于模拟到真实迁移测试。评估了当前最先进的视频异常检测基线方法。
AI.result: 评估结果表明，社会复杂异常构成了一种独特的、目前尚未解决的挑战。现有的最先进视频异常检测方法在处理这类社会复杂异常时表现不佳，证明需要新的检测方法。
AI.conclusion: SENSE-VAD数据集通过专注于社会复杂性而非仅运动或外观，弥补了自动驾驶异常检测的空白。社会复杂异常是一种独特的威胁，需要专门的检测方法，现有方法在此方面存在明显不足。该数据集、注释和生成代码已公开可用。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video anomaly detection for autonomous driving, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are entirely different: the profile targets 3D human motion generation and visual feature extraction, while this paper focuses on detecting anomalies in driving scenarios. The methods and goals do not align - the profile seeks to bridge 2D video to 3D motion representation, while this paper uses simulators to generate anomaly detection data. No overlap in pain points, methods, or application domain.

title: RESOLVE: A Multi-Resolution and Multi-Modal Dataset for Roadside Cooperative Perception
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Including supplementary material
summary: LiDAR has increasingly been integrated into traffic cameras to expand coverage and mitigate occlusion in roadside cooperative perception. However, how unimodal and camera-LiDAR fusion architectures behave under variations in LiDAR point sparsity induced by sensor configurations and scene-dependent sensing conditions remains underexplored. We introduce RESOLVE, a large-scale real-world benchmark dataset featuring multi-resolution roadside LiDAR and synchronized camera-LiDAR sensing for systematic evaluation of unimodal and fusion-based architectures in roadside 3D detection and tracking. RESOLVE contains over 100k images and 26k point cloud frames with 220k manually annotated bounding boxes, captured at a real-world urban intersection across diverse lighting and weather conditions and spanning 10 classes of traffic participants. In particular, RESOLVE enables controlled evaluation across three LiDAR resolution levels while keeping all other sensing and environmental factors fixed. This allows fair cross-architecture comparisons under point cloud distribution shifts resulting from resolution variations, sensing distance, and training-inference resolution mismatches. Results from extensive benchmark experiments reveal insights into how multimodal fusion can compensate for LiDAR point sparsity, offering clues for designing cost-efficient roadside multimodal perception. The dataset and benchmark codes are available at https://github.com/ASU-Suo-Lab/RESOLVE.

AI.tldr: RESOLVE是一个大规模真实路侧感知数据集，包含多分辨率LiDAR和同步相机-LiDAR数据，用于系统评估单模态和融合架构在路侧3D检测和跟踪中的表现。数据集包含10万+图像和2.6万点云帧，22万个标注框。
AI.motivation: 当前研究对LiDAR点云稀疏性变化（由传感器配置和场景依赖的传感条件引起）下单模态和相机-LiDAR融合架构的行为缺乏探索，需要一个大规模基准数据集来系统评估这些架构。
AI.method: 构建包含三种LiDAR分辨率水平的数据集，保持其他传感和环境因素不变，从而实现公平的跨架构比较。进行广泛的基准实验评估单模态和融合方法。
AI.result: 实验揭示了多模态融合如何补偿LiDAR点云稀疏性，为设计成本高效的路侧多模态感知系统提供线索。
AI.conclusion: RESOLVE数据集能够支持对路侧3D检测和跟踪的全面评估，为未来路侧感知系统的设计和优化提供了重要基准和见解。

relevance_reason: This paper is about roadside perception for autonomous driving (LiDAR + camera 3D detection/tracking), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics, 3D motion synthesis from video, and video generation models. The application domains are entirely different - autonomous vehicle perception vs. computer graphics/motion generation. Despite both using multi-modal approaches, the goals, methods, and domains are fundamentally mismatched.

title: DriveWeaver: Point-Conditioned Video Inpainting for Controllable Vehicle Insertion in Autonomous Driving Simulation
summary: A pivotal step in autonomous driving simulation involves inserting foreground vehicles with predefined trajectories into simulated scenes. This process enhances scene diversity and facilitates the creation of various corner cases for testing and improving autonomous driving models. However, existing methods often rely on pre-reconstructed 3D assets, which frequently lead to lighting inconsistencies between the inserted foreground and the background. Moreover, the reliance on limited, manually-curated 3D assets hinders large-scale deployment. To address these challenges, we propose DriveWeaver, a novel framework for controllable vehicle insertion in autonomous driving simulation. Specifically, for a masked target insertion area, DriveWeaver performs video inpainting conditioned on vehicle point clouds to generate high-quality, temporally consistent vehicles. This video-inpainting-based approach ensures seamless blending between the foreground and background, while the readily available point cloud conditions enable superior generalization. To support long-term generation, we further design a global-to-local hierarchical inpainting strategy, ensuring the consistent identity and appearance of the inserted vehicles. Meanwhile, we extract explicit 3D Gaussian representations of the inserted vehicles through an urban reconstruction pipeline to enable real-time rendering for autonomous driving simulation. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms existing baselines in visual realism and geometric consistency, providing a robust tool for scalable autonomous driving scene augmentation.

AI.tldr: DriveWeaver是一种用于自动驾驶模拟中可控车辆插入的新框架，通过视频修复技术结合车辆点云来生成高质量、时间一致的车辆，解决现有方法中光照不一致和3D资产有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶模拟中的关键步骤是将具有预定义轨迹的前景车辆插入模拟场景中，以增强场景多样性并创建各种角例用于测试。然而，现有方法依赖预重建的3D资产，常导致插入前景与背景之间的光照不一致，且有限的手动策划3D资产阻碍了大规模部署。
AI.method: 1. 对于遮罩的目标插入区域，基于车辆点云进行视频修复以生成高质量、时间一致的视频修复结果，确保前景与背景的无缝融合；2. 设计全局到局部层次化视频修复策略以支持长期生成，确保插入车辆的同一性和外观一致性；3. 通过城市场景重建管道提取插入车辆的显式3D高斯表示，实现自动驾驶模拟的实时渲染。
AI.result: 在多个不同数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在视觉真实感和几何一致性方面优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DriveWeaver为可扩展的自动驾驶场景增强提供了一种稳健的工具。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses vehicle insertion in autonomous driving simulation using video inpainting techniques, which is different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from video. While it involves video generation and some 3D aspects (3D Gaussian splatting), the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about scene composition for autonomous driving, not about extracting motion from video or synthesizing 3D human/motion dynamics. The paper doesn't address Vision-Language Models for quality supervision or multi-modal learning for motion generation as specified in the research profile.

title: InstanceControl: Controllable Complex Image Generation without Instance Labeling
summary: Controllable image generation methods, such as ControlNet, have demonstrated a remarkable capacity to introduce visual conditions(e.g., depth maps) to guide image generation. However, these methods often struggle with complex multi-instance scenes, frequently leading to attribute confusion among instances. While recent approaches attempt to mitigate this via manual instance labeling, such requirements are labor-intensive. In this paper, we propose InstanceControl, a novel multi-instance controllable generation method that eliminates the need for instance labeling. We identify the primary bottleneck in existing methods as the inability to accurately associate instance descriptions with their corresponding regions within visual conditions. To address this, we leverage the Vision-Language Model (VLM) to establish instance-level correspondences between text prompts and visual conditions. Specifically, the VLM automatically parses instance descriptions from the text prompts and simultaneously predicts instance masks based on the visual conditions. Furthermore, since the predicted masks may contain noise, we introduce an adaptive mask refinement strategy that dynamically refines these instance masks during the generation process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior fidelity and precise instance-level control.

AI.tldr: InstanceControl是一种无需人工标注实例的多实例可控图像生成方法，利用视觉语言模型(VLM)建立文本提示与视觉条件之间的实例级对应关系，并通过自适应掩码 refinement策略动态优化噪声掩码，在多实例场景下实现精确的实例级控制。
AI.motivation: 现有可控图像生成方法（如ControlNet）在复杂多实例场景中存在属性混淆问题，而现有解决方案需要人工标注实例标签，劳动密集。因此需要一种无需人工标注即可实现精确多实例控制的方法。
AI.method: 1. 利用VLM自动从文本提示中解析实例描述，同时根据视觉条件预测实例掩码，建立实例级对应关系；2. 引入自适应掩码refinement策略，在生成过程中动态优化实例掩码以处理噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于现有最先进方法，实现了更高的保真度和精确的实例级控制。
AI.conclusion: InstanceControl成功实现了无需人工标注的多实例可控图像生成，通过VLM建立文本-视觉对应关系并结合自适应掩码refinement，有效解决了多实例属性混淆问题，为复杂场景下的可控生成提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 2D image generation (InstanceControl for controllable image synthesis), while the research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from video input in Computer Graphics. Even though both use Vision-Language Models (VLM), the application domains are completely different - this paper focuses on multi-instance controllable 2D image generation with attribute control, not 3D motion generation or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The pain points addressed (attribute confusion in image generation) are unrelated to the research profile's goals of extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video priors and achieving high-quality 3D motion synthesis.

title: No Place to Hide: Benchmarking Video Hallucination with Background-Controlled Pairs
summary: We introduce VidPair-Halluc, a new benchmark for evaluating video hallucination in large video models (LVMs) under rigorous and controlled conditions. Unlike previous benchmarks that primarily rely on text-based perturbations or adversarial questions while neglecting the consistency of visual backgrounds, VidPair-Halluc features video pairs with highly similar backgrounds but distinctly different foreground semantics, enabling precise attribution of model errors to genuine hallucination rather than background variation. The benchmark is constructed through PairFlow, a pipeline that leverages recent advances in text-to-image and video generation to systematically compose stories, generate coherent video clips, and assemble them into adversarial pairs. Covering both spatial and temporal reasoning across ten semantic aspects, VidPair-Halluc comprises 1K high-quality adversarial video pairs and 11K spatio-temporal QA pairs with control over background and foreground variations. Evaluations on mainstream LVMs show persistent difficulty with robust fine-grained video understanding in adversarial settings, and code and data are available at the https://jethrojames.github.io/VidPair-Halluc/.

AI.tldr: VidPair-Halluc是一个用于评估大型视频模型中视频幻觉的新基准测试，通过创建具有相似背景但不同前景语义的视频对来精确识别模型幻觉问题。基准包含1K个对抗性视频对和11K个时空问答对，评估表明主流LVM在对抗性设置下仍存在细粒度视频理解的持续困难。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要依赖文本扰动或对抗性问题，忽视了视觉背景的一致性，无法准确区分真正的幻觉和背景变化导致的问题。需要一个在严格受控条件下的视频幻觉评估基准。
AI.method: 通过PairFlow管道，利用最新的文本到图像和视频生成技术，系统性地创作故事、生成连贯视频片段，并组装成对抗性视频对。覆盖空间和时间推理的十个语义方面。
AI.result: 主流LVM在对抗性设置下表现出细粒度视频理解的持续困难，基准包含1K高质量对抗性视频对和11K时空问答对，可控制背景和前景变化。
AI.conclusion: VidPair-Halluc基准能够精确地将模型错误归因于真正的幻觉而非背景变化，为评估大型视频模型的视频理解能力提供了严格受控的测试环境。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video hallucination benchmarking for large video models, which is a different application domain entirely from Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis. While it uses Vision-Language Models, they are used for evaluating video understanding/hallucination detection, not for extracting 3D visual guidance features from video, quality supervision for 3D motion generation, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. The paper addresses video understanding evaluation, not the core pain points of 3D motion synthesis from video input.

title: World Narrative Model for Highly Controllable Video Generation: A Paradigm Shift from Pixel Sampling to Physical World Orchestration
summary: The fundamental obstacle to industrial grade video generation is the lack of controllability: existing models treat video as a pixel distribution sampling problem, bypassing the explicit, instance level $4D$ $(3D + T)$ physical world. Consequently, content creators cannot specify geometry, motion, camera parameters, or lighting in a deterministic, quantitative way, leading to the infamous ''gacha'' loop that makes professional content creation prohibitively inefficient and expensive. To address this, we introduce the World Narrative Model (WNM), a paradigm that decouples what to render -- the structured physical narrative -- from how to render -- the pixel generation process. WNM replaces end-to-end black-box sampling with orchestrated $4D$ pre-visualization for media generation. Collaborative agents translate sparse multimodal inputs, including text, reference videos, and sketches, into a fully editable world representation with scene geometry, object layouts, character/animal skeleton motion, trajectories, camera motion, and lighting at quantitative, physically meaningful granularity. This representation acts as a deterministic structural blueprint that drives existing video foundation models, either frozen or lightly adapted, to render final footage, turning the base model into a faithful neural shader. Built on this engine, our human-AI platform supports automatic world generation and pre-visualization aligned with professional filmmaking pipelines, while director consoles enable seamless human refinement. Experiments show that WNM greatly reduces probabilistic ``gacha'' calls and produces videos whose layout, motion, and cinematography closely follow creator intent. The framework is open and modular, allowing each component, such as world representation, control agents, and adapters, to be independently improved. Project website: https://glassroom.sjtu.edu.cn/WNM/.

AI.tldr: World Narrative Model (WNM)是一个新的视频生成范式，将"渲染什么"(物理叙事)与"如何渲染"(像素生成)解耦，通过4D预可视化替代端到端的黑盒采样，解决工业级视频生成中的可控性问题。
AI.motivation: 工业级视频生成的核心障碍是缺乏可控性：现有模型将视频视为像素分布采样问题，绕过了显式的实例级4D(3D+T)物理世界，导致内容创作者无法以确定性、定量方式指定几何、运动、相机参数或照明，产生著名的"gacha"循环，使专业内容创作效率低下且成本高昂。
AI.method: WNM框架包含：1)协作代理将稀疏的多模态输入(文本、参考视频、草图)转换为完全可编辑的世界表示，包含场景几何、对象布局、角色/动物骨架运动、轨迹、相机运动和照明；2)这个确定性结构蓝图驱动现有的视频基础模型(冻结或轻量适配)渲染最终画面，将基础模型转化为忠实的神经着色器。
AI.result: WNM大大减少了概率性的"gacha"调用，生成的视频在布局、运动和电影摄影方面紧密遵循创作者意图。该框架是开放和模块化的，允许独立改进每个组件。
AI.conclusion: WNM通过解耦物理叙事与像素生成，实现了可控制的工业级视频生成，支持自动世界生成和预可视化，与专业电影制作流程对齐，导演控制台支持无缝人工 refinement。

relevance_reason: This paper is about VIDEO GENERATION (creating videos from text/sketch inputs), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION EXTRACTION/GENERATION from video (extracting 3D motion from 2D video). These are fundamentally different application domains: the paper generates videos, but the research needs to extract/analyze 3D motion from existing videos. Although both involve video/motion, the direction is opposite - generation vs. extraction. The paper uses similar multi-modal inputs but addresses a completely different problem in the computer graphics pipeline.

title: AnyBokeh: Physics-Guided Any-to-Any Bokeh Editing with Optical Fingerprint Transfer
summary: Depth-of-field control is a fundamental tool in photography, yet post-capture bokeh editing from a single image remains challenging. A practical editor should handle images captured under arbitrary focus and aperture settings. Existing methods typically assume an all-in-focus input, or first recover an all-in-focus image before rendering new bokeh. Such pipelines can discard useful blur cues from the source image and propagate reconstruction artifacts into the final edit. We introduce AnyBokeh, a physics-guided framework for any-to-any bokeh editing. Instead of treating source blur merely as a degradation to be removed, AnyBokeh estimates the source blur state with a signed circle-of-confusion map and a disparity map. By modeling the linear relation between signed circle of confusion and disparity difference, AnyBokeh estimates a source-specific optical fingerprint and transfers the source optical characteristics to the desired focus and aperture setting. A generative editor conditioned on both source and target circle-of-confusion maps then performs relative blur synthesis, enabling spatially adaptive deblurring, preservation, and defocus rendering. To support physically supervised learning, we further construct a high-fidelity synthetic dataset with accurate depth, focus distance, and full EXIF metadata. Experiments on real-world benchmarks show that AnyBokeh achieves faithful and controllable editing across any-to-any bokeh editing, all-in-focus-to-bokeh rendering, and defocus deblurring, while avoiding all-in-focus reconstruction and test-time bokeh-level calibration commonly required by existing approaches. The code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/itsmag11/AnyBokeh.

AI.tldr: AnyBokeh是一个物理引导的任意到任意焦外成像编辑框架，能够处理任意焦点和光圈设置下的图像编辑任务，无需重建全焦图像即可实现焦外成像编辑、景深渲染和散焦去模糊。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常假设输入为全焦图像，或需要先重建全焦图像再渲染新焦外效果，这会丢弃源图像中有用的模糊线索并传播重建伪影。实际应用中需要处理任意焦点和光圈设置下拍摄的图像。
AI.method: 1) 估计源图像的模糊状态，包括有符号弥散圆(Signed Circle-of-Confusion)地图和视差地图；2) 通过建模有符号弥散圆与视差差之间的线性关系，估计源特定的光学指纹；3) 将源光学特征转移到目标焦点和光圈设置；4) 基于源和目标弥散圆地图的条件生成编辑器进行相对模糊合成，实现空间自适应的去模糊、保留和散焦渲染；5) 构建高保真合成数据集，包含准确深度、焦距和完整EXIF元数据。
AI.result: 在真实世界基准测试上，AnyBokeh在任意到任意焦外编辑、全焦到焦外渲染和散焦去模糊三种任务中都实现了忠实和可控的编辑效果，同时避免了现有方法所需的全焦重建和测试时焦外水平校准。
AI.conclusion: AnyBokeh是一个创新的物理引导框架，通过估计源模糊状态和光学指纹，实现了任意到任意的焦外成像编辑，在保持物理一致性的同时提供了高质量的编辑结果。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about 2D image bokeh/depth-of-field editing, not 3D motion generation from video. The research profile specifically requires 3D motion synthesis methods, but AnyBokeh focuses on optical blur effects in photographs. Even though both involve visual features, the application domains are entirely different - one deals with 2D image rendering while the other requires 3D motion generation from video inputs.

title: Planar-SfM: Camera Pose Estimation via Homography Graph Embeddings
summary: Structure from Motion (SfM) systems traditionally struggle with planar scenes, where standard epipolar geometry-based methods become degenerate. Rather than viewing planar surfaces as a limitation, we propose a unified framework that leverages them as a source of geometric constraints. Our key insight is that each planar surface visible across multiple views provides an independent estimate of relative camera poses through homography decomposition. By aggregating estimates from multiple planes or even from a single dominant plane we achieve robust pose recovery in scenarios where traditional methods fail. We introduce a novel graph-based approach that constructs a pose-graph from homography estimates and employs spectral embedding to identify and filter unreliable edges. Our method maps homography-based pose estimates onto the real line based on their geometric and visual consistency, enabling efficient extraction of a maximally consistent spanning tree for pose recovery. This approach naturally handles both highly planar scenes, such as indoor sports arenas, and general $3$D environments. We demonstrate superior performance on basketball court imagery where existing methods struggle, while matching or exceeding state-of-the-art results on unconstrained outdoor scenes from the IMC Phototourism benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用平面表面作为几何约束源的统一SfM框架，通过从多个视图中的平面区域提取单应性矩阵来估计相对相机姿态，并采用基于图谱嵌入的方法来识别和过滤不可靠的边，从而在传统方法失效的平面场景中实现鲁棒的姿态恢复。
AI.motivation: 传统SfM系统在处理平面场景时存在根本性困难，标准基于极线几何的方法会退化。论文旨在将平面表面从限制转化为可以利用的几何约束来源，特别是对于篮球场等高度平面化的场景。
AI.method: 1) 利用每个平面表面在多视图间提供独立的相对相机姿态估计（通过单应性分解）；2) 构建基于单应性估计的姿态图；3) 采用谱嵌入将单应性姿态估计映射到实数轴；4) 提取最大一致生成树进行姿态恢复。
AI.result: 在篮球场图像上表现优于现有方法，同时在IMC Phototourism户外场景基准上达到或超越最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够自然处理高度平面场景（如室内体育馆）和一般3D环境，为平面场景中的SfM提供了一种有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses camera pose estimation via homography graph embeddings - a traditional computer vision/SfM problem for 3D reconstruction. The application domain is fundamentally different from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video using VLMs and video generation models. While both deal with "3D" in some sense, this paper is about recovering camera poses, not generating 3D motion. The methods (homography decomposition, spectral embeddings) have no overlap with the profile's methods (VLMs, video generation, motion generation models). This is a case of using completely different methods for completely different application domains.

title: ERA: Entropy-Guided Visual Token Pruning with Rectified Attention for Efficient MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) incur prohibitive inference costs due to long visual token sequences. Training-free visual token reduction provides an efficient solution. However, existing methods distort attention distributions, giving rise to a phenomenon we term Attention Logit Collapse. To address this issue, we propose ERA, an Entropy-guided visual token pruning framework with Rectified Attention for efficient MLLMs. Specifically, ERA comprises three crucial components: Dual-view Entropy Pruning (DEP), Bias-aware Token Recycling (BTR), and Logit-preserving Attention Rectification (LAR). First, DEP identifies representative anchor tokens by jointly modeling visual diversity and head-wise saliency. BTR then recycles pruned tokens into their corresponding anchors while estimating a cluster-level logit bias. Building upon this, LAR injects the estimated bias into attention logits, effectively rectifying the collapse induced by token reduction. Together, these components preserve visual evidence even under aggressive compression, enabling robust performance across single-image, multi-image, and video settings on a wide range of MLLMs. Beyond delivering practical acceleration, ERA establishes logit-preserving visual token pruning as a principled framework for efficient MLLMs, unifying theoretical foundation, algorithmic design, and practical deployment. The code is at https://github.com/924973292/ERA.

AI.tldr: ERA是一种用于高效多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的无需训练的视觉token压缩框架,通过 entropy指导的token剪枝和注意力校正来解决注意力logit崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: MLLMs因长视觉token序列导致推理成本过高,现有无需训练的视觉token压缩方法会扭曲注意力分布,产生"注意力logit崩溃"现象,需要一种能保留logit的token压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出ERA框架,包含三个组件:1)双视图熵剪枝(DEP)通过视觉多样性和头部wise显著性识别代表性anchor tokens;2)偏差感知token回收(BTR)将剪枝的tokens回收至对应anchor并估计聚类级logit偏差;3)保logit注意力校正(LAR)将估计的偏差注入注意力logits,有效纠正token减少导致的崩溃。
AI.result: 在单图像、多图像和视频设置下,跨多种MLLMs实现了鲁棒性能,提供实际加速的同时建立了保logit视觉token剪枝的原则化框架。
AI.conclusion: ERA通过entropy指导和注意力校正机制成功解决了视觉token压缩中的注意力logit崩溃问题,为高效MLLMs提供了一种统一理论基和实际部署的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses efficient visual token pruning for MLLMs (multimodal large language models) to reduce inference costs. While it uses Vision-Language Models (similar to the research profile's methods), the APPLICATION DOMAIN is completely different. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video in Computer Graphics, bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation. This paper is about optimizing MLLM efficiency for general vision-language tasks, not about video-to-3D motion generation or computer graphics. Using similar methods (VLMs) in completely different application domains should be considered irrelevant - this is like comparing diffusion for image generation vs diffusion for human motion generation.

title: CoLT: Teaching Multi-Modal Models to Think with Chain of Latent Thoughts
comment: Accepted by ECCV2026. Code is available at https://github.com/hulianyuyy/CoLT
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has enabled multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) to tackle complex visual reasoning tasks by generating explicit intermediate reasoning steps in natural language. However, this text-based reasoning paradigm is inherently slow at inference time with even thousands of tokens and fundamentally constrained by the expressiveness of natural language. In this paper, we propose CoLT, (Chain of Latent Thoughts), a novel framework that teaches multi-modal models to reason through a chain of latent thought representations instead of verbose text tokens, which can perform thinking with as few as 3 steps. Naively forcing the model to think with latent states easily produces meaningless semantics and makes training unstable. To effectively regulate the latent reasoning process, we introduce a lightweight external decoder that provides step-level supervision for each latent reasoning step in two complementary directions: a forward mode that decodes latent thoughts into the textual reasoning of the next step, and a backward mode that aligns decoder hidden states with the model's latent thoughts given preceding textual context. We further incorporate internal supervision that encourages coherent step-by-step latent transitions. The decoder and internal supervision are removed during inference to maintain high efficiency of latent reasoning. Extensive experiments on eight benchmarks demonstrate that CoLT not only outperforms existing latent reasoning methods such as CODI and SIM-CoT, but also surpasses latent visual reasoning approaches that rely on auxiliary images with costly annotation requirements. Compared to text CoT methods, CoLT can notably reduce the inference time by 10.1$\times$ and text decoding time by 22.6$\times$. Code is released at https://github.com/hulianyuyy/CoLT.

AI.tldr: CoLT（Chain of Latent Thoughts）是一种新型的多模态大语言模型推理框架，通过使用潜在思维表示代替冗长的文本token进行推理，可在仅3步内完成复杂视觉推理任务，显著提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 当前基于文本的思维链（CoT）推理范式存在两个核心问题：1）推理速度慢，需要生成大量文本token；2）受限于自然语言的表达能力。因此需要一种更高效、更具表达力的推理方式。
AI.method: 提出CoLT框架，包含三个核心组件：1）外部解码器的前向模式：将潜在思维解码为下一步的文本推理；2）外部解码器的反向模式：将解码器隐藏状态与模型的潜在思维对齐；3）内部监督：鼓励步骤间潜在状态的一致性转换。推理时移除解码器和内部监督以保持高效。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集上，CoLT性能超过现有潜在推理方法（CODI和SIM-CoT）及依赖辅助图像的潜在视觉推理方法；推理时间减少10.1倍，文本解码时间减少22.6倍。
AI.conclusion: CoLT成功实现了用少量潜在思维步骤（3步）替代大量文本token进行多模态推理，在保持高性能的同时大幅提升推理效率，为多模态大语言模型的高效推理提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper uses Vision-Language Models (a method mentioned in the profile) but addresses a completely different application domain. The CoLT paper focuses on multi-modal reasoning and visual question answering - general AI reasoning tasks - while the research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video input. This is analogous to asking about diffusion for human motion generation but getting diffusion for image generation - the application domains are entirely different. The pain points (extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, achieving high-quality 3D motion synthesis, bridging 2D video to 3D motion) are not addressed at all by this paper.

title: Automated Background Swapping for Robustness against Spurious Backgrounds
summary: Classifiers based on Deep Neural Networks exhibit strong performance across domains, yet can fail catastrophically if they rely on spurious correlations, i.e., features that are predictive of the target label in the training data but are not causally linked and thus fail to generalize. For the vision domain, many such spurious correlations manifest themselves within the background of the image, where only the foreground is predictive of the class label. In this paper, we introduce Automated Background Swapping (AutoBackSwap) to reduce the reliance of classifiers on such spurious backgrounds. AutoBackSwap uses a secondary network to disentangle the foreground and background, followed by infilling to synthesize complete backgrounds, and finally combines different foregrounds and inpainted backgrounds to augment the training data. We find that patch-wise labeling of just a few hundred samples suffices to train the secondary network and automatically augment the full training dataset on challenging image classification tasks. In contrast to many previous methods, AutoBackSwap proves very effective even if there is not a single sample in the training data breaking the spurious correlation. Across a range of image classification tasks with spurious backgrounds, AutoBackSwap consistently outperforms prior methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoBackSwap方法，通过分离前景背景、图像修复和数据增强来减少分类器对虚假背景特征的依赖，解决深度神经网络因依赖虚假相关性而在测试集上泛化失败的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络分类器可能依赖虚假相关性（即训练数据中可预测标签但无因果关系的特征）导致灾难性失败。在视觉领域，许多虚假相关性体现在图像背景中，仅前景与类别标签相关。因此需要一种方法减少分类器对虚假背景的依赖。
AI.method: AutoBackSwap使用辅助网络分离前景和背景，然后通过修复合成完整背景，最后组合不同前景与修复后的背景来增强训练数据。仅需对几百个样本进行patch-wise标注即可训练辅助网络并自动增强完整训练集。
AI.result: 在多个具有虚假背景的图像分类任务中，AutoBackSwap始终优于先前方法。即使训练数据中没有打破虚假相关性的样本，该方法也非常有效。
AI.conclusion: AutoBackSwap能有效减少分类器对虚假背景特征的依赖，在各种图像分类任务中表现优异，且仅需少量标注即可实现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image classification robustness and spurious background handling in Computer Vision, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics and 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are entirely different - the profile seeks methods for extracting 3D visual guidance from video, synthesizing 3D motion, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion, while this paper addresses classifier robustness to background correlations in static image classification. No alignment with the specified pain points or methods (VLM, video generation models, 3D motion generation) exists.

title: Cross-Space Distillation: Teaching One-Step Students with Modern Diffusion Teachers
summary: Modern one-step diffusion models achieve impressive quality through distribution-based timestep distillation. Yet, they rely on a critical assumption: Teacher and Student must inhabit the same latent space. This Shared-Space constraint prevents knowledge transfer from modern high-capacity Teachers (e.g., SD 3.5 and Flux) into compact, deployment-friendly Students such as SD 1.5, whose latent resolution and VAE parameterization differ from the Teacher. We formalize this overlooked regime as Cross-Space Distillation, where Teacher and Student differ in both latent resolution and VAE space. To enable distillation under this mismatch, we introduce the Bridge, a lightweight latent interface that maps Student latents into the Teacher space without modifying the Student backbone. Bridge combines a frozen Student VAE decoder as a spatial prior with a compact learnable projector, and is trained with latent reconstruction and attention fidelity objectives for stable Teacher-space alignment. Across diverse modern Teachers, Bridge enables substantial gains for compact one-step Students; for example, it improves SD 1.5 from 5.4 to 9.4 HPSv3 while preserving one-step inference, low latency, and broad ecosystem compatibility. These results show that heterogeneous large Teachers can be distilled into efficient, deployable backbones through a lightweight latent-space interface.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了跨空间蒸馏（Cross-Space Distillation）方法，解决现代高容量教师模型（如SD 3.5、Flux）无法蒸馏到紧凑学生模型（如SD 1.5）的难题。通过引入Bridge轻量级潜在空间接口，在不修改学生骨干网络的情况下，将学生潜在空间映射到教师空间，实现异构模型间的知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 当前一步式扩散模型依赖分布时间步蒸馏，但假设教师和学生必须处于相同潜在空间（共享空间约束）。这阻止了将现代高容量教师模型的知识迁移到紧凑部署友好的学生模型，因为它们的潜在分辨率和VAE参数化不同。
AI.method: 提出Bridge方法：1）冻结学生VAE解码器作为空间先验；2）添加紧凑可学习的投影器；3）使用潜在重建和注意力保真度目标进行训练，实现稳定的教师空间对齐。
AI.result: 在多种现代教师模型上，Bridge为紧凑一步式学生模型带来显著提升。例如，SD 1.5的HPSv3从5.4提升到9.4，同时保持一步推理、低延迟和广泛生态兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 通过轻量级潜在空间接口，可以将异构大教师模型蒸馏到高效可部署的骨干网络中，突破了传统蒸馏方法的潜在空间限制。

relevance_reason: Major application domain mismatch. The paper is about distilling diffusion models for 2D IMAGE generation (SD 1.5, SD 3.5, Flux), while the research profile requires diffusion models for 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS from video input. The pain points clearly focus on "3D motion synthesis from video" and "bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation." While both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different - image generation vs human/robot motion generation. The paper addresses model compression for image generation, not 3D motion synthesis from video priors.

title: SpheRoPE: Zero-Shot Optimization-Free 360 Panorama Generation with Spherical RoPE
summary: We present a zero-shot, training-free and optimization-free framework for generating 360 panoramic images and videos by directly injecting spherical priors into pre-trained diffusion transformers. Existing methods either rely on costly fine-tuning on scarce panoramic data that limits generalization, or leverage multi-step optimization that incurs prohibitive inference latency. We observe that contemporary generative models natively exhibit some panoramic priors from large-scale training. However, these emergent capabilities are insufficient, as the models fundamentally fail to satisfy the rigorous topological constraints imposed by equirectangular projection (ERP). We introduce a zero-shot and optimization-free approach that resolves these constraints at inference time. Spherical RoPE replaces standard rotary position embeddings: low-frequency channels are re-parameterized as 3D Cartesian coordinates to natively encode the spherical manifold, while high-frequency channels are harmonically quantized to enforce exact periodicity. Coupled with complementary Semantic Distortion classifier-free guidance (CFG) that explicitly steers geometry, we avoid retraining and inherit the full creative breadth of state-of-the-art models. Our approach generalizes across diverse backbones and 360 generation modalities. We demonstrate this across text-to-panorama using Flux.1, Flux.2, and LTX-Video backbones, achieving competitive performance against baselines, all while remaining training-free. Project page: https://orhir.github.io/SpheRoPE

AI.tldr: 提出SpheRoPE框架，无需训练和优化即可利用预训练扩散变换器生成360度全景图像和视频，通过球面位置编码和语义失真引导解决等距柱状投影的拓扑约束问题。
AI.motivation: 解决现有方法依赖昂贵全景数据微调或多次优化导致推理延迟过高的问题，同时利用预训练模型从大规模数据中学习到的原生全景先验。
AI.method: 提出球面位置编码(Spherical RoPE)替换标准旋转位置嵌入：低频通道重新参数化为3D笛卡尔坐标以原生编码球面流形，高频通道进行谐波量化以强制精确周期性。同时引入语义失真分类器无关引导(Semantic Distortion CFG)来显式引导几何结构。
AI.result: 在Flux.1、Flux.2和LTX-Video等多种骨干网络上实现文本到全景生成，与基线方法相比达到竞争性能，且完全无需训练。
AI.conclusion: SpheRoPE是一个零样本、无需训练和优化的框架，通过在预训练扩散变换器中直接注入球面先验来生成360度全景图像和视频。该方法在保持最先进模型创造力的同时，避免了微调成本和推理延迟问题，展示了良好的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 360 panorama IMAGE generation using diffusion transformers, while the research profile is about 3D MOTION synthesis from video input. Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different - this paper generates static/spatial image content (panoramas), not temporal motion sequences. The research profile specifically focuses on extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, achieving high-quality 3D motion synthesis, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation - none of which are addressed by this panorama generation work. This is a classic case of similar method (diffusion) but wrong application domain (image generation vs motion generation).

title: PointSplat: Compact Gaussian Splatting via Human-Centric Prediction
summary: Producing 3D human representations from input views on the fly is essential for immersive live streaming systems, where representation compactness is as critical as high fidelity given limited computational power and transmission bandwidth. Although recent feed-forward reconstruction methods achieve impressive quality through the view-centric prediction of 3D representations, they repeatedly encode the same subject content across multiple views, leading to significant inter-view redundancy. Our key insight is to perform predictions directly in 3D space, enabling the network to learn and produce a highly compact representation. To this end, we propose PointSplat, a novel human-centric approach that directly infers Gaussian primitives from an input point set. The proposed method first estimates a coarse geometric proxy and performs ray casting to prune redundant points and establish explicit 2D--3D correspondences. Subsequently, it employs a Point-Image Transformer to fuse appearance and geometry features, predicting Gaussian attributes in a single forward pass. This design restricts predictions to foreground regions of interest, substantially reducing the total number of Gaussians while improving novel-view rendering quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PointSplat achieves higher efficiency and quality while exhibiting strong robustness to variations in view count and image resolution across multiple datasets.

AI.tldr: PointSplat是一种从输入视图实时生成紧凑高质量3D人体表示的新方法，通过直接从点集推理高斯原语，避免了传统方法中的视图间冗余。
AI.motivation: 在沉浸式直播系统中，从输入视图生成3D人体表示至关重要，但现有前馈重建方法在处理多视图时存在显著的视图间冗余问题，因为需要对同一主体内容进行重复编码。
AI.method: 提出PointSplat方法，首先估计粗略几何代理并执行射线投射以剪枝冗余点并建立2D-3D对应关系，然后使用Point-Image Transformer融合外观和几何特征，在单次前向传递中预测高斯属性。
AI.result: 该方法将预测限制在前景感兴趣区域，显著减少了高斯总数同时提高了新视角渲染质量。实验表明PointSplat在多个数据集上实现了更高的效率和质量，并对视角数量和图像分辨率变化表现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PointSplat通过直接在3D空间进行预测，学习并产生高度紧凑的表示，成功实现了效率与质量的有效平衡。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 3D human representation but focuses on multi-view reconstruction from camera arrays (like in studio setups), not motion synthesis from monocular video. The pain points mention "video input" and "bridging 2D video to 3D motion" which typically refers to extracting motion from single RGB videos. This paper uses Gaussian Splatting for rendering rather than the specified methods (VLM, Video Generation Models). While it's in the same general domain (3D human graphics), it addresses a different problem - multi-view 3D reconstruction vs. video-to-motion synthesis. Moderate relevance as it deals with 3D human representation but uses different methods and addresses a different input modality.

title: GEAR: Guided End-to-End AutoRegression for Image Synthesis
summary: Visual generative models are typically trained in two stages. A tokenizer is first trained for reconstruction and then frozen, after which a generator is trained on its discrete indices or continuous latents. This decoupling leaves the tokenizer unaware of what the generator finds easy to model. We present GEAR (Guided End-to-end AutoRegression), which trains a vector-quantized (VQ) tokenizer and an autoregressive (AR) generator jointly and end-to-end, guided by representation alignment. The key obstacle is that the VQ index fed to the AR model is non-differentiable, so gradients cannot reach the tokenizer, and a straight-through estimator collapses. GEAR resolves this with a dual read-out of the codebook assignment. A hard, one-hot branch trains the AR with next-token prediction, while a differentiable soft branch carries a representation-alignment loss that flows back to guide only the tokenizer. The AR model thereby steers its tokenizer toward an index distribution it can predict more easily. This shifts the alignment burden from the tokenizer to the AR: the tokenizer's own features become less DINOv2-like while the AR's become more so, the opposite of diffusion-side recipes that make the latent itself semantic. GEAR speeds up ImageNet gFID convergence by up to 10x relative to the strong LlamaGen-REPA baseline, learns markedly better patch-level and spatially-coherent features, and generalizes across quantizers (VQVAE, LFQ, IBQ) and to text-to-image generation.

AI.tldr: GEAR提出了一种端到端联合训练VQ分词器和自回归生成器的方法，通过双分支读取（硬分支用于AR训练，软分支用于表征对齐）来解决梯度无法反向传播到分词器的问题，使AR模型能够引导分词器学习更容易预测的索引分布。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉生成模型采用两阶段训练：先训练分词器用于重建，然后冻结分词器，再训练生成器。这种解耦方式使分词器无法获知生成器容易建模的内容，导致训练效率受限。
AI.method: 提出双读取机制：硬分支使用独热编码进行自回归的下一个token预测训练；软分支使用可微分的软编码携带表征对齐损失，将梯度传回分词器进行引导。该方法适用于多种量化器（VQVAE、LFQ、IBQ）。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上gFID收敛速度比LlamaGen-REPA快达10倍，学习到更好的patch级和空间连贯特征，并可泛化到文本到图像生成任务。
AI.conclusion: GEAR将对齐负担从分词器转移到自回归模型：分词器特征变得不那么像DINOv2，而AR特征变得更像，这与让潜在变量具有语义性的扩散方法相反。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D image synthesis using autoregressive models and VQ tokenizers, while the research profile is focused on 3D motion synthesis from video. The application domains are fundamentally different - image generation vs motion/3D generation. Although both use generative modeling techniques, the paper does not address extracting 3D visual guidance features, achieving 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion representation, which are the core pain points in the research profile.

title: FaceMoE: Mixture of Experts for Low-Resolution Face Recognition
summary: Low-resolution face recognition (LR-FR) remains a challenging task due to poor feature extraction and aggregation, as probe images often contain limited identity information resulting from extreme degradations such as blur, occlusion, and low contrast. Additionally, the domain gap between high-resolution (HR) gallery images and low-resolution (LR) probe images poses a significant challenge. A single feature encoder struggles to generalize effectively across both domains when fine-tuned on an LR dataset, and this issue is further magnified by catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we propose FaceMoE, an effective adaptation of Mixture of Experts (MoE) transfomer architecture for low-resolution face-recognition . Specifically, we introduce multiple specialized feed-forward network (FFN) experts and incorporate a top-k router, which dynamically assigns tokens to appropriate experts. This design emergently promotes specialization across experts for different semantic regions of the face, which enables FaceMoE to perform resolution-aware feature extraction. Moreover, the top-k router facilitates sparse expert activation, enabling the model to preserve pretrained knowledge when finetuned on a LR dataset, while increasing model capacity without proportional computational overhead. FaceMoE is trained with a combined face recognition loss, router z-loss, and load balancing loss to ensure expert specialization and stable training. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work leveraging MoE for LR-FR. Extensive experiments across eleven datasets, spanning HR, mixed-quality, and LR benchmarks, demonstrate that FaceMoE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code: https://github.com/Kartik-3004/FaceMoE

AI.tldr: FaceMoE是一种基于混合专家(MoE)Transformer架构的低分辨率人脸识别方法,通过动态token分配和稀疏专家激活实现分辨率感知的特征提取,在11个数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 低分辨率人脸识别面临三大挑战:1)特征提取和聚合困难,探针图像因模糊、遮挡、低对比度等退化导致身份信息有限;2)HR gallery与LR probe之间的域差距;3)单特征编码器在LR数据集上微调时容易发生灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出FaceMoE,采用MoE Transformer架构:1)引入多个专用FFN专家;2)使用top-k路由器动态分配token给合适的专家;3)训练使用人脸识别损失、路由器z-loss和负载均衡损失的组合。
AI.result: 在11个数据集(涵盖HR、混合质量和LR基准)上,FaceMoE显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将MoE应用于低分辨率人脸识别任务,实现了分辨率感知的特征提取,有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题,在保持预训练知识的同时增加了模型容量,且计算开销未成比例增加。

relevance_reason: The paper is about low-resolution face recognition using MoE (Mixture of Experts) Transformer, which is a computer vision task. This is completely different from the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion synthesis from video input, bridging 2D video and 3D motion representation. The application domain (face recognition vs. 3D motion generation) is entirely different. While both may use transformer architectures, the purpose and domain are unrelated. The pain points addressed are also completely different - this paper addresses face recognition challenges (HR gallery vs LR probe domain gap), not 3D motion synthesis from video.
